enum 5446126 "TSRD Calc. Charging Method"
{
    Extensible = true;
    Caption = 'Charging Method';

    value(0; Included)
    {
        Caption = 'Included';
    }
    value(1; CalcSeparately)
    {
        Caption = 'Calc. Separately';
    }
}

table 5445913 "TSRD Calc. Cost"
{
    Caption = 'Cost';
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Costs";

    //Always update archive table as well!

    fields
    {
        field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
        }
        field(3; "Cost Type"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Cost Type';
            NotBlank = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Cost Type"."Code";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
            begin
                if CalcCostType.Get("Cost Type") then begin
                    Rec.Description := CalcCostType.Description;
                    Rec."Transfer to Purchase" := CalcCostType."Transfer to Purchase";
                    if CalcCostType."Sales Item Charge" = '' then
                        Rec.Validate("Charging Method", Rec."Charging Method"::Included);
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(4; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(5; Amount; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Amount';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Base Amount Type" <> "Base Amount Type"::" " then
                    FieldError("Base Amount Type");
                if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                    UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice();
            end;
        }
        field(6; "Base Amount Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Base Amount Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Base Amount Type';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Base Amount Type" = "Base Amount Type"::" " then begin
                    Percentage := 0;
                    UpdateCostAmount();
                end else
                    Amount := 0;
            end;
        }
        field(7; Percentage; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>%';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Percentage';
            DecimalPlaces = 0 : 5;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                Percentage /= 100;
                UpdateCostAmount();
            end;
        }
        field(8; "Allocate to Service Item"; Code[20])
        {
            AccessByPermission = tabledata "Service Item" = R;
            Caption = 'Allocate to Service Item';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "Service Item";
        }
        field(9; "Allocate to Trade No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Allocate to Trade No.';
            TableRelation = "TSRM Trade No."."No." where("Service Item No." = field("Allocate to Service Item"));
        }
        field(10; "Equipment Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Equipment Line No.';
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line No." where("Forecast No." = field("Forecast No."));
        }
        field(11; "Transfer to Purchase"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Transfer to Purchase';
        }
        field(20; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
            Editable = false;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(21; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(22; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Charging Method")
        {
            Caption = 'Charging Method';
            InitValue = Included;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
                SepNotAllowedErr: Label 'Calc. Separately requires a Sales Item Charge on the cost type.';
                PercentSepNotAllowedErr: Label 'Calc. Separately is only supported for cost lines with a fixed amount.';
            begin
                if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then begin
                    if not CalcCostType.Get("Cost Type") then
                        Error(SepNotAllowedErr);
                    CalcCostType.TestField("Sales Item Charge");
                    if "Base Amount Type" <> "Base Amount Type"::" " then
                        Error(PercentSepNotAllowedErr);
                    if "Sales Price" = 0 then begin
                        "Sales Price" := Amount;
                        UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice();
                    end;
                end else begin
                    Clear("Sales Price");
                    Clear("Margin %");
                    Clear("Margin Amount");
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(23; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Sales Price';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                    FieldError("Charging Method");
                UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice();
            end;
        }
        field(24; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>%';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                    FieldError("Charging Method");
                SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                IsMarginPercentageViable(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
                UpdateSalesPriceFromMarginPct();
            end;
        }
        field(25; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption();

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                    FieldError("Charging Method");
                UpdateSalesPriceFromMarginAmt();
            end;
        }
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
    }

    trigger OnInsert()
    begin
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
    end;

    trigger OnModify()
    begin
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
    end;

    internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
    begin
        GetCalcForecast("Forecast No.");
        CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
    end;

    local procedure GetCalcForecast(ForecastNo: Code[20])
    begin
        if not HasCalcForecast then
            HasCalcForecast := CalcForecast.Get(ForecastNo);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCostAmount()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        Amount := CalcForecastMgt.GetCostAmount(Rec);
    end;

    procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
    var
        CalcCost: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost";
    begin
        CalcCost.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
        if CalcCost.IsEmpty() then
            exit(10000);
        CalcCost.FindLast();
        exit(CalcCost."Line No." + 10000);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateMarginFromSalesPrice()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - Amount;
        "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage(Amount, "Sales Price", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesPriceFromMarginPct()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        "Sales Price" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(Amount, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), 0.01);
        "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - Amount;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesPriceFromMarginAmt()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        "Sales Price" := Amount + "Margin Amount";
        "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage(Amount, "Sales Price", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
    end;

    internal procedure IsMarginPercentageViable(MarginCalculator: Interface "TSRD MarginCalculator")
    begin
        MarginCalculator.IsMarginPercentageViable("Margin %");
    end;

    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        HasCalcForecast: Boolean;
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
}
page 5446024 "TSRD Calc. Costs"
{
    ApplicationArea = All;
    AutoSplitKey = true;
    Caption = 'Costs';
    ContextSensitiveHelpPage = '/machine-trade/trade-price-management/trade-dms-forecast';
    DelayedInsert = true;
    DeleteAllowed = false;
    PageType = ListPart;
    RefreshOnActivate = true;
    ShowFilter = false;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Cost";
    UsageCategory = None;

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            repeater(GroupName)
            {
                field("Cost Type"; Rec."Cost Type")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Cost Type.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field(Description; Rec.Description)
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Cost Description.';
                }
                field("Transfer to Purchase"; Rec."Transfer to Purchase")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Transfer to Purchase field.';
                }
                field("Base Amount Type"; Rec."Base Amount Type")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Base Amount Type.';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field(Amount; Rec.Amount)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption(Amount), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = (Rec."Base Amount Type" = Rec."Base Amount Type"::" ") and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Cost Amount.';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Charging Method"; Rec."Charging Method")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies whether the cost amount is included in the main unit price or calculated as a separate sales line.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (Rec."Base Amount Type" = Rec."Base Amount Type"::" ") and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price for this cost when it is charged on a separate sales line.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (Rec."Base Amount Type" = Rec."Base Amount Type"::" ") and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the margin percentage for separate charging.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Margin Amount"; Rec."Margin Amount")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Margin Amount"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (Rec."Base Amount Type" = Rec."Base Amount Type"::" ") and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the margin amount for separate charging.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field(Percentage; Rec.Percentage)
                {
                    Editable = (Rec."Base Amount Type" = Rec."Base Amount Type"::" ") and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Amount percentage.';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Allocate to Service Item"; Rec."Allocate to Service Item")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Allocation to Service Item.';
                }
                field("Allocate to Trade No."; Rec."Allocate to Trade No.")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Allocation to Trade No.';
                }
                field("Eqipment Line No."; Rec."Equipment Line No.")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies linked Equipment Line No.';
                }
            }
            group(Totals)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field("Total Costs"; TotalCosts)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostsLbl, Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Cost Amounts from all cost lines.';
                }
            }
        }
    }

    actions
    {
        area(Processing)
        {
            action("Delete")
            {
                Caption = 'Delete';
                Enabled = (Rec."Line No." <> 0) and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                Image = DeleteRow;
                ShortcutKey = 'Ctrl+Del';
                ToolTip = 'Delete the selected row (Ctrl+Del)';

                trigger OnAction()
                var
                    CalcCost: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost";
                begin
                    CurrPage.SetSelectionFilter(CalcCost);
                    if not CalcForecastMgt.ShouldDeleteLine(CalcCost) then
                        exit;
                    CalcCost.DeleteAll(true);
                end;
            }
            action(InsertTemplate)
            {
                Caption = 'Insert Cost Template';
                Image = Cost;
                ToolTip = 'Choose template you want to insert into Calculation Worksheet cost lines.';

                trigger OnAction()
                begin
                    CalcForecastMgt.InsertCalcCostFromTemplate(Rec);
                end;
            }
        }
    }

    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        SalesCalcWonOrLost: Boolean;
        TotalCosts: Decimal;
        TotalCostsLbl: Label 'Total Costs';

    trigger OnAfterGetCurrRecord()
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.CalculateCostsSubPageTotals(Rec, TotalCosts);
    end;

    trigger OnOpenPage()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        if not CalcForecast.Get(Rec."Forecast No.") then
            exit;
        SalesCalcWonOrLost := CalcForecast.GetSalesCalculationStatus() in [
            "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Won,
            "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::"Lost"
        ];
    end;
}
table 5446017 "TSRD Calc. Cost Type"
{
    Caption = 'Cost Type';
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Cost Types";

    fields
    {
        field(1; "Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Code';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            NotBlank = true;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(2; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(3; "Item Charge"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Item Charge';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            NotBlank = true;
            TableRelation = "Item Charge"."No." where("TSRM Calc. Type" = filter("Purchasing costs" |
                                                                                 "External service" |
                                                                                 "Purchase Freight" |
                                                                                 "Internal Warranty" |
                                                                                 "Cost of Sale" |
                                                                                 "Sales Freight"));
        }
        field(4; "Transfer to Purchase"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Transfer to Purchase';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(5; "Sales Item Charge"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Item Charge';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = "Item Charge"."No." where("TSRM Calc. Type" = filter("Cost of Sale" | "Sales Freight"));
        }
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; Code)
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
    }

    trigger OnInsert()
    begin
        TestField("Item Charge");
    end;

    trigger OnModify()
    begin
        TestField("Item Charge");
    end;

    trigger OnDelete()
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.CheckIfTypeIsUsedOnForecast(Rec);
    end;
}
page 5446035 "TSRD Calc. Cost Types"
{
    ApplicationArea = All;
    Caption = 'Calc. Cost Types';
    PageType = List;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
    UsageCategory = Lists;
    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            repeater(General)
            {
                field("Code"; Rec.Code)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Code.';
                }
                field(Description; Rec.Description)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Description.';
                }
                field("Item Charge"; Rec."Item Charge")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the linked Item Charge';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Sales Item Charge"; Rec."Sales Item Charge")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the item charge used when this cost type is calculated separately on a sales document.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Transfer to Purchase"; Rec."Transfer to Purchase")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Transfer to Purchase field.';
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

enum 5446127 "TSRD Calc. Equip. Chrg. Method"
{
    Extensible = true;
    Caption = 'Charging Method (Add. Config.)';

    value(0; " ")
    {
        Caption = ' ', Locked = true;
    }
    value(1; Included)
    {
        Caption = 'Included';
    }
    value(2; CalcSeparately)
    {
        Caption = 'Calc. Separately';
    }
    value(3; CapService)
    {
        Caption = 'Cap. Service';
    }
    value(4; Attach)
    {
        Caption = 'Attach';
    }
}

page 5446027 "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup"
{
    ApplicationArea = All;
    AutoSplitKey = true;
    Caption = 'Additional Configuration Lookup';
    DelayedInsert = true;
    Editable = false;
    PageType = List;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    UsageCategory = None;

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            repeater(Group)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field(Type; Rec.Type)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies type of Additional Configuration.';
                }
                field("No."; Rec."No.")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Number of Additional Configuration.';
                }
                field("Vendor Item No."; Rec."Vendor Item No.")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Vendor Item No. of Extermal Equipment.';
                }
                field(Description; Rec.Description)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Description of Additional Configuration.';
                }
                field(Quantity; Rec.Quantity)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Quantity';
                }
                field("List Price"; Rec."List Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration List Price';
                }
                field("Discount %"; Rec."Discount %")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Discount %';
                }
                field("Direct Unit Cost"; Rec."Direct Unit Cost")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Direct Unit Cost';
                }
                field("Line Amount"; Rec."Line Amount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Line Amount';
                }
                field("Charging Method"; Rec."Charging Method")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies how this line is included in the calculation worksheet price and on the sales document.';
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price when this line is calculated separately.';
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Margin % field';
                }
                field("Calculated Sales Price"; Rec."Calculated Sales Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Calculated Sales Price';
                    ObsoleteState = Pending;
                    ObsoleteTag = '2402.250800';
                    ObsoleteReason = 'This field has no functionality and is not required for Calc. Additional Configuration.';
                    Visible = false;
                    Editable = false;
                }
                field("Calculate Separately"; Rec."Calculate Separately")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should price be Calculated Separately';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field("Show in Sales Document"; Rec."Show in Sales Document")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should Additional Configuration be shown in Sales Document';
                }
                field("Vendor Name"; Rec."Vendor Name")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Vendor Name';
                }
                field("Line Action"; Rec."Line Action")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the action to be performed on the Service line.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

table 5446001 "TSRD Calc. External Equipment"
{
    Caption = 'Additional Configuration';
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";

    //Always update archive table as well!

    fields
    {
        field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast"."No.";
        }
        field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
        }
        field(6; "No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = if (Type = const(Item)) Item."No."
            else
            if (Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."No." where("TSRM In Stock As" = filter("Current Asset" | "Fixed Asset"))
            else
            if (Type = const(Comment)) "Standard Text";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Item: Record Item;
                ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
                StandardText: Record "Standard Text";
                TempCalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment" temporary;
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
                ItemTemplMgt: Codeunit "Item Templ. Mgt.";
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
                ServiceItemDataMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Item Data mgt";
                UsedPartsTaxMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Used Parts Tax Mgt.";
                VendorItemNoMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Vendor Item No. Mgt.";
            begin
                CalcForecastMgt.RemoveAttachedCommentLinesEquipment(Rec);
                TempCalcExternalEquipment := Rec;
                Init();
                Type := TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type;
                "No." := TempCalcExternalEquipment."No.";
                "Vendor No." := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Vendor No.";
                "Vendor Name" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Vendor Name";
                "Purchase Order Type" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Order Type";
                "Responsibility Center" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Responsibility Center";
                "Location Code" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Location Code";
                if "Line No." = 0 then
                    "Line No." := Rec.GetNextLineNo();
                case Type of
                    Type::Item:
                        begin
                            if not Item.Get("No.") then
                                exit;
                            Description := Item.Description;
                            if Vendor.Get(Item."Vendor No.") then
                                Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                            Quantity := 1;
                            Validate("Unit of Measure", Item."Base Unit of Measure");
                            UsedPartsTaxMgt.UpdateLineOnAfterValidateNo(Rec);
                            CalcForecastMgt.InsertExtendedTextEquipment(Rec);
                            if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("No.") then
                                DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
                        end;
                    Type::"Service Item":
                        begin
                            if not ServiceItem.Get("No.") then
                                exit;
                            case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
                                ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Current Asset":
                                    if ServiceItem."Item No." = '' then begin
                                        Commit();
                                        ItemTemplMgt.InsertItemFromTemplate(Item);
                                        ServiceItem.Validate("Item No.", Item."No.");
                                        ServiceItem.Modify();
                                    end;
                                ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
                                    ServiceItem.TestField("TSRM Fixed Asset No.");
                            end;
                            Description := ServiceItem.Description;
                            "List Price" := ServiceItem."Sales Unit Price";
                            "Direct Unit Cost" := ServiceItem."Sales Unit Cost";
                            Validate(Quantity, 1);
                            "Unit of Measure" := ServiceItem."Unit of Measure Code";
                            if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("No.") then
                                DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
                            EquipmentMgt.FillAttachedEquipmentLines(Rec);
                            ServiceItemDataMgt.FillServiceItemData(Rec);
                        end;
                    Type::Comment:
                        begin
                            StandardText.Get("No.");
                            Description := StandardText.Description;
                            CalcForecastMgt.InsertExtendedTextEquipment(Rec);
                        end;
                end;
                VendorItemNoMgt.TransferVendorItemNo(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(7; "Unit of Measure"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Unit of Measure';
            TableRelation = if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const(Item)) "Item Unit of Measure".Code where("Item No." = field("No."))
            else
            if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."Unit of Measure Code" where("No." = field("No."))
            else
            "Unit of Measure".Code;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Item: Record Item;
                ItemUnitofMeasure: Record "Item Unit of Measure";
            begin
                if "Unit of Measure" = xRec."Unit of Measure" then
                    exit;

                if "Unit of Measure" = '' then
                    exit;

                if Type = Type::Item then begin
                    Item.Get("No.");

                    ItemUnitofMeasure.Get(Item."No.", "Unit of Measure");

                    if Item."Unit Price" <> 0 then
                        Validate("List Price", Item."Unit Price" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity)
                    else
                        if "List Price" = 0 then
                            Validate("List Price", Item."Unit Cost" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity);
                    Validate("Direct Unit Cost", Item."Unit Cost" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity);
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(9; Type; Enum "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Type';
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                TempCalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment" temporary;
            begin
                TempCalcExternalEquipment := Rec;
                Init();
                if TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type <> TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type::Comment then begin
                    Rec.InitOrderType();
                    Rec.InitResponsibilityCenter();
                end;
                Type := TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type;
            end;
        }
        field(10; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(12; Quantity; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Quantity';

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                UsedPartsTaxMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Used Parts Tax Mgt.";
                WrongQuantityErr: Label 'Quantity cannot be more than 1 when Type is Service Item.';
            begin
                if (Quantity > 1) and (Type = Type::"Service Item") then
                    Error(WrongQuantityErr);
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMargin();
                UsedPartsTaxMgt.CheckIsQuantityChangeAllowed(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(13; "List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'List Price';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateDirectUnitCost();
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMargin();
            end;
        }
        field(14; "Direct Unit Cost"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Direct Unit Cost';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateDiscount();
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMarginAmount();
            end;
        }
        field(15; "Line Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Line Amount';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateMargin();
            end;
        }
        field(16; "Discount %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Discount % (List Price)';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateDirectUnitCost();
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMargin();
            end;
        }
        field(17; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
            begin
                SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                IsMarginPercentageViable(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMarginAmount();
            end;
        }
        field(19; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption();
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(30; "Calculated Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402.250800';
            ObsoleteReason = 'This field has no functionality and is not required for Calc. External Equipment.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(31; "Calculate Separately"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculate Separately';
            ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by field Charging Method.';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2502.260200';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Calculate Separately" then
                    Validate("Charging Method", "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately)
                else
                    case "Line Action" of
                        "Line Action"::"Cap. Service":
                            Validate("Charging Method", "Charging Method"::CapService);
                        "Line Action"::Attach:
                            Validate("Charging Method", "Charging Method"::Attach);
                        else
                            Validate("Charging Method", "Charging Method"::Included);
                    end;
            end;
        }
        field(121; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Equip. Chrg. Method")
        {
            Caption = 'Charging Method';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then begin
                    Validate("Show in Sales Document", true);
                    CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
                    CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
                    "Calculate Separately" := true;
                    if "Sales Price" = 0 then
                        "Sales Price" := "Line Amount";
                end else begin
                    "Calculate Separately" := false;
                    Clear("Sales Price");
                    if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                        Validate("Margin %", 0);
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(122; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                    FieldError("Charging Method");
            end;
        }
        field(32; "Show in Sales Document"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show in Sales Document';
            InitValue = true;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateShowInSalesOnLinkedExtEquipmentLines();
            end;
        }
        field(33; "Comments exist"; Boolean)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Sale Forecast Comment" where("Comment Type" = const("External Equipment"), "No." = field("Forecast No."),
                                                                    "Document Line No." = field("Line No.")));
            Caption = 'Comments exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(36; "Attached to Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Attached to Line No.';
        }
        field(40; "Vendor No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = Vendor."No.";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
            begin
                if "Vendor No." = xRec."Vendor No." then
                    exit;
                if "Vendor No." <> '' then begin
                    Vendor.Get("Vendor No.");
                    "Vendor Name" := Vendor.Name;
                end else
                    "Vendor Name" := '';
                InitResponsibilityCenter();
            end;
        }
        field(41; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor Name';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
            begin
                CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed();
                if Page.RunModal(0, Vendor) = Action::LookupOK then begin
                    if Vendor.Name = '' then
                        Vendor.FieldError(Name);
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                end;
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
                HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
                LookupVar: Variant;
            begin
                CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed();
                if "Vendor Name" <> '' then begin
                    LookupVar := Vendor;
                    if not HelperTools.FindRecordUsingUpToTwoFields(LookupVar, "Vendor Name", Vendor.FieldNo("No."), Vendor.FieldNo(Name)) then
                        Error('');
                    Vendor := LookupVar;
                    if Vendor.Name = '' then
                        Vendor.FieldError(Name);
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                end else
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", '');
            end;
        }
        field(50; "Workshop Line No."; Integer)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Services to Line No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(51; "Linked to Workshop"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. Workshop" where("Line No." = field("Workshop Line No."),
                                                                "Forecast No." = field("Forecast No.")));
            Caption = 'Linked to Services';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(52; "Line Amount (List Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Line Amount (List Price)';
        }
        field(54; "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)';
        }
        field(60; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
            Editable = false;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(61; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(62; "Purchase Document Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Line No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(67; "Discounted Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Discounted Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'This field was not needed for the price options feature. #17865';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402';
        }
        field(70; "Vendor Item No."; Text[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor Item No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(75; "Purchase Order Type"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Order Type';
            TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Purchase" = const(true));
        }
        field(80; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
            TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;

            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
                RespCenterCode: Code[10];
            begin
                RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
                if RespCenterCode <> '' then
                    Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
            begin
                RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
                CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
            end;
        }
        field(85; "Location Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Location Code';
            TableRelation = Location;
        }
        field(90; "Service Item Doc. Data Comment"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item Document Data Comment';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(95; "Status (Purchase)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Purchase)")
        {
            Caption = 'Status (Purchase)';
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Table field not needed #24654';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2302.241100';
        }
        field(100; "Attached Equipment"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Attached Equipmen';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(110; "Linked to Service Item"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Linked to Service Item';
        }
        field(120; "Line Action"; Enum "TSRD Service Line Action")
        {
            Caption = 'Line Action';
            ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by field Charging Method.';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2502.260200';
            ValuesAllowed = " ", "Attach", "Cap. Service";
        }
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
        key(Key2; "Type", "No.")
        {
        }
        key(Key3; "Forecast No.", "Linked to Service Item")
        {
        }
        key(Key4; "Forecast No.", "Vendor No.")
        {
        }
        key(TSRDShowInSales; "Forecast No.", "Show in Sales Document") { }
    }

    fieldgroups
    {
        fieldgroup(DropDown; Type, "No.", Description)
        { }
    }

    trigger OnInsert()
    begin
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
        InitOrderType();
        InitResponsibilityCenter();
        GetCalcForecast();
        if not CalcForecast."Fix Price allowed" then
            Rec.Validate("Charging Method", Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately)
        else
            Rec.Validate("Charging Method", Rec."Charging Method"::Included);
    end;

    trigger OnModify()
    begin
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
    end;

    internal procedure InitType()
    begin
        Type := xRec.Type;
    end;

    trigger OnDelete()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.DeleteNonStockExtEquipment(Rec);
        CalcForecastMgt.RemoveAttachedCommentLinesEquipment(Rec);
    end;

    internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
    begin
        GetCalcForecast();
        CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
        CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDiscount()
    begin
        if "List Price" <> 0 then
            "Discount %" := (1 - ("Direct Unit Cost" / "List Price")) * 100
        else
            "Discount %" := 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDirectUnitCost()
    begin
        "Direct Unit Cost" := Round("List Price" - ("List Price" * ("Discount %" / 100)), 0.01);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateLineAmounts()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        LineDiscAmt: Decimal;
    begin
        "Line Amount (List Price)" := "List Price" * Quantity;
        "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" := "Direct Unit Cost" * Quantity;

        LineDiscAmt := Round(Quantity * "List Price" * ("Discount %" / 100), 0.01);
        "Line Amount" := (Quantity * "List Price") - LineDiscAmt;
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        "Line Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin("Line Amount", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), 0.01);
        if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
            "Sales Price" := "Line Amount";
    end;

    local procedure UpdateMargin()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        UpdateMarginAmount();
        "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Line Amount", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
    end;

    local procedure UpdateMarginAmount()
    begin
        "Margin Amount" := "Line Amount" - "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)";
    end;

    local procedure GetCalcForecast()
    begin
        CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
    end;

    local procedure CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed()
    var
        AlreadyExistErr: Label 'Purchase document already exist for this line, Vendor cannot be changed.';
    begin
        if "Purchase Document No." <> '' then
            Error(AlreadyExistErr);
    end;

    internal procedure IsMarginPercentageViable(MarginCalculator: Interface "TSRD MarginCalculator")
    begin
        MarginCalculator.IsMarginPercentageViable("Margin %");
    end;

    procedure GetCommentLineForm() CommentForm: Text[100]
    var
        DescriptionExtension: Text;
    begin
        if Quantity <> 0 then begin
            DescriptionExtension := ' (' + Format(Quantity);
            if "Unit of Measure" <> '' then
                DescriptionExtension += ' ' + "Unit of Measure" + ')'
            else
                DescriptionExtension += ')';
        end;
        CommentForm := CopyStr(Description, 1, MaxStrLen(CommentForm) - StrLen(DescriptionExtension)) + DescriptionExtension;
    end;

    procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."Forecast No.");
        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit(10000);
        CalcExternalEquipment.FindLast();
        exit(CalcExternalEquipment."Line No." + 10000);
    end;

    internal procedure InitOrderType()
    var
        UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
    begin
        UserSetup.Get(UserId());
        if UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type" <> '' then
            Rec.Validate("Purchase Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type");
    end;

    internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
    var
        RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
        RespCenterCode: Code[10];
    begin
        RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase, Rec."Vendor No.");
        if RespCenterCode <> '' then
            Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
    end;

    internal procedure OpenLinkedPurchaseDocument()
    var
        PurchaseInvoiceHeader: Record "Purch. Inv. Header";
        PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header";
    begin
        case "Purchase Document Type" of
            "Purchase Document Type"::Order:
                if PurchaseHeader.Get(PurchaseHeader."Document Type"::Order, "Purchase Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Purchase Order", PurchaseHeader);
            "Purchase Document Type"::"Posted Invoice":
                if PurchaseInvoiceHeader.Get("Purchase Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Posted Purchase Invoice", PurchaseInvoiceHeader);
        end
    end;

    local procedure UpdateShowInSalesOnLinkedExtEquipmentLines()
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", "Line No.");
        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Show in Sales Document", "Show in Sales Document");
    end;

    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
}
page 5446001 "TSRD Calc. External Equipments"
{
    AutoSplitKey = true;
    Caption = 'Additional Configuration';
    ContextSensitiveHelpPage = '/machine-trade/trade-price-management/trade-dms-forecast';
    DelayedInsert = true;
    DeleteAllowed = false;
    PageType = ListPart;
    RefreshOnActivate = true;
    ShowFilter = false;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    UsageCategory = None;

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            repeater(Group)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field(Type; Rec.Type)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies type of additional configuration';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        EnableSearchField();
                    end;
                }
                field(SearchTextLbl; SearchTextVar)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Search';
                    Enabled = IsTypeItem;
                    ToolTip = 'Searches by entered text and selected line type item and inserts the selected line from results. Use ''#'' as prefix for searching through Description for Items.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    var
                        ItemSearchMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Item Search Mgt.";
                    begin
                        if SearchTextVar <> '' then begin
                            ItemSearchMgt.SearchForExtEquipment(SearchTextVar, Rec);
                            CurrPage.Update();
                        end;
                    end;
                }
                field("No."; Rec."No.")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ShowMandatory = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Number of additional configuration';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Vendor Item No."; Rec."Vendor Item No.")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Vendor Item No. of Additional Configuration';
                }
                field("Status (Purchase)"; GetServiceItemStatus(Rec))
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Status (Purchase)';
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Status of Purchase Order for Additional Configuration';

                    trigger OnDrillDown()
                    var
                        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
                        ServiceItemStatusMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Item Status Mgt.";
                    begin
                        if Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::"Service Item" then
                            exit;
                        if Rec."No." = '' then
                            exit;
                        if ServiceItem.Get(Rec."No.") then
                            ServiceItemStatusMgt.OpenRelatedDocumentFromServiceItemStatus(ServiceItem, ServiceItem.FieldNo("TSRM Status(Purchase)"));
                    end;
                }
                field("Purchase Order Type"; Rec."Purchase Order Type")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Show Purchase Order Types that can be used for additional configuration-Purchases.';
                }
                field("Responsibility Center"; Rec."Responsibility Center")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Responsibility Center that will be used in the Purchase Order for Additional Configuration.';
                }
                field("Location Code"; Rec."Location Code")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Location Code, that will be used in the Purchase Order for Additional Configuration.';
                }
                field("Linked to Workshop"; Rec."Linked to Workshop")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    AssistEdit = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies connection to Services';
                }
                field("Charging Method"; Rec."Charging Method")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies how this line is included in the calculation worksheet price and on the sales document.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Line Amount"; Rec."Line Amount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Line Amount"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies additional configuration Line Amount';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field(Description; Rec.Description)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = not Rec."Service Item Doc. Data Comment";
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Description of additional configuration';
                }
                field("Unit of Measure"; Rec."Unit of Measure")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the Unit of Measure of the Item.';
                }
                field(Quantity; Rec.Quantity)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies additional configuration Quantity';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("List Price"; Rec."List Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("List Price"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies additional configuration List Price';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Discount %"; Rec."Discount %")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies additional configuration Discount %';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Direct Unit Cost"; Rec."Direct Unit Cost")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Direct Unit Cost"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies additional configuration Direct Unit Cost';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    BlankZero = true;
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Margin % field';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Margin Amount"; Rec."Margin Amount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    BlankZero = true;
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Margin Amount field';
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price when this line is calculated separately.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Calculated Sales Price"; Rec."Calculated Sales Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies additional configuration Calculated Sales Price';
                    ObsoleteState = Pending;
                    ObsoleteTag = '2402.250800';
                    ObsoleteReason = 'This field has no functionality and is not required for Calc. External Equipment.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field("Calculate Separately"; Rec."Calculate Separately")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should price be Calculated Separately';
                    Visible = false;

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Show in Sales Document"; Rec."Show in Sales Document")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = Rec."Charging Method" <> Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should additional configuration be shown in Sales Document';
                }
                field("Comments exist"; Rec."Comments exist")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies does additional configuration have Comments';
                }
                field("Vendor Name"; Rec."Vendor Name")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies additional configuration Vendor Name';
                }
                field("Purchase Document No."; Rec."Purchase Document No.")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies additional configuration linked Purchase Document No.';
                    Visible = false;

                    trigger OnDrillDown()
                    begin
                        Rec.OpenLinkedPurchaseDocument();
                    end;
                }
                field("Line Action"; Rec."Line Action")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Editable = (Rec.Type = "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type"::"Service Item") or
                               (Rec.Type = "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type"::Item);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the action to be performed on the Service line.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
            }
            group(Totals)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field("Total Equip. List Price"; TotalEquipListPrice)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalListPriceLbl, Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Line Amount (List Price) from all additional configuration lines.';
                }
                field("Total Equip. Costs"; TotalEquipCosts)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostsLbl, Rec."Forecast No.");
                    DrillDown = false;
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Line Amount (Direct Unit Costs) from all additional configuration lines.';
                }
                field("Total Equip. Calc. Sales Price"; TotalEquipCalcSalesPrice)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCalcSalesPriceLbl, Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Line Amounts from all additional configuration lines.';
                }
            }
        }
    }
    actions
    {
        area(Processing)
        {
            action("Delete")
            {
                ApplicationArea = All;
                Caption = 'Delete';
                Enabled = Rec."Line No." <> 0;
                Image = DeleteRow;
                ShortcutKey = 'Ctrl+Del';
                ToolTip = 'Delete the selected row (Ctrl+Del)';

                trigger OnAction()
                var
                    CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
                begin
                    CurrPage.SetSelectionFilter(CalcExternalEquipment);
                    if not CalcForecastMgt.ShouldDeleteLine(CalcExternalEquipment) then
                        exit;
                    CalcExternalEquipment.DeleteAll(true);
                end;
            }
            action("TSRD AddAdditionalText")
            {
                ApplicationArea = Basic, Suite;
                Caption = 'Add Text Lines';
                Image = Text;
                ToolTip = 'Add Text Lines to additional configuration';
                trigger OnAction()
                var
                    MultiLineTextEditor: Page "TSR MultiLine Text Editor";
                begin
                    MultiLineTextEditor.SetGlobalRecord(Rec);
                    MultiLineTextEditor.RunModal();
                end;
            }
            action(TSRAddLineComment)
            {
                ApplicationArea = Basic, Suite;
                Caption = 'Comments';
                Image = ViewComments;
                RunObject = page "TSRD Sale Forecast Comments";
                RunPageLink = "Comment Type" = const("External Equipment"),
                              "No." = field("Forecast No."),
                              "Document Line No." = field("Line No.");
                ToolTip = 'Add Comment Lines to additional configuration';
            }
            action("TSRD Update Service Item Data")
            {
                ApplicationArea = All;
                Caption = 'Update Service Item Document Data';
                Enabled = (Rec.Type = Rec.Type::"Service Item") and (Rec."No." <> '');
                Image = Category;
                ToolTip = 'Update the service item data for the document.';

                trigger OnAction()
                var
                    ServiceItemDataMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Item Data mgt";
                begin
                    ServiceItemDataMgt.ReplaceServiceItemData(Rec);
                end;
            }
            action(Equipment)
            {
                ApplicationArea = All;
                Caption = 'Equipment';
                Enabled = EquipmentEnabled;
                Image = Components;
                ToolTip = 'Specifies Equipment, that is linked to the base service item.';
                trigger OnAction()
                begin
                    OpenEquipment();
                end;
            }
            group("TSRD Link")
            {
                Caption = 'Link (Services)';
                ToolTip = 'Link additional configuration lines with Services.';
                action("TSRD Link with Workshop")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Link with Services';
                    Image = Link;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Link with Services, only type of Items can be linked.';
                    trigger OnAction()
                    var
                        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
                        CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
                        AlreadyLinkedErr: Label 'additional configuration is already linked with Services.';
                    begin
                        CurrPage.SetSelectionFilter(CalcExternalEquipment);
                        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
                            exit;
                        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Linked to Workshop", true);
                        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
                            Error(AlreadyLinkedErr);
                        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Linked to Workshop");

                        CalcWorkshop.FilterGroup(2);
                        CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."Forecast No.");
                        if Rec."Line Action" <> "TSRD Service Line Action"::" " then
                            CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Capitalized Service", true);
                        CalcWorkshop.FilterGroup(0);
                        if Page.RunModal(0, CalcWorkshop) <> Action::LookupOK then
                            exit;
                        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
                            CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Workshop Line No.", CalcWorkshop."Line No.");
                    end;
                }
                action("TSRD Unlink from Workshop")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Unlink from Services';
                    Image = UnLinkAccount;
                    ToolTip = 'Unlinks additional configuration lines from Services.';
                    trigger OnAction()
                    var
                        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
                    begin
                        CurrPage.SetSelectionFilter(CalcExternalEquipment);
                        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
                            CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Workshop Line No.", 0);
                    end;
                }
            }
            group(Purchase)
            {
                Caption = 'Purchase';
                Image = Purchase;
                action("TSRD Create Purchase Order")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Create/Update Purchase Order';
                    Enabled = Rec."Purchase Document Type" <> Rec."Purchase Document Type"::"Posted Invoice";
                    Image = NewPurchaseInvoice;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies action for Creating/Updating new Purchase Order out of additional configuration.';

                    trigger OnAction()
                    var
                        CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
                    begin
                        CalcForecastToPurch.CreatePurchaseOrder(Rec);
                    end;
                }
                action("TSRD Open Purchase Document")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Open document';
                    Enabled = Rec."Purchase Document No." <> '';
                    Image = Document;
                    ToolTip = 'Opens the Purchase Document that is created from this additional configuration.';

                    trigger OnAction()
                    var
                        CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
                    begin
                        CalcForecastToPurch.OpenPurchaseDocument(Rec);
                    end;
                }
                action("TSRD Delete Purchase Document")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Delete Purchase Document';
                    Enabled = (Rec."Purchase Document No." <> '') and (Rec."Purchase Document Type" = Rec."Purchase Document Type"::Order);
                    Image = Delete;
                    ToolTip = 'Executes the Delete Purchase Document action.';

                    trigger OnAction()
                    var
                        CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
                    begin
                        if CalcForecastToPurch.DeletePurchaseDocument(Rec."Purchase Document No.") then
                            CalcForecastToPurch.ResetPurchaseOrderLink(Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Vendor No.");
                    end;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    trigger OnNewRecord(BelowxRec: Boolean)
    begin
        Rec.InitType();
        if Rec.Type <> Rec.Type::Comment then begin
            Rec.InitOrderType();
            Rec.InitResponsibilityCenter();
        end;
    end;

    trigger OnAfterGetCurrRecord()
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.CalculateExternalEquipmentSubPageTotals(Rec, TotalEquipListPrice, TotalEquipCosts, TotalEquipCalcSalesPrice);
        SetEquipmentEnabled();
    end;

    trigger OnAfterGetRecord()
    begin
        EnableSearchField();
        SetEquipmentEnabled();
    end;

    local procedure SetEquipmentEnabled()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        CalcForecast.Get(Rec."Forecast No.");
        EquipmentEnabled := CalcForecast."Service Item No." <> '';
    end;

    local procedure EnableSearchField()
    begin
        IsTypeItem := Rec.Type = Rec.Type::Item;
    end;

    local procedure GetServiceItemStatus(CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment"): Enum "TSRM Status(Purchase)"
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
    begin
        if CalcExternalEquipment.Type <> CalcExternalEquipment.Type::"Service Item" then
            exit("TSRM Status(Purchase)"::" ");
        if not ServiceItem.Get(CalcExternalEquipment."No.") then
            exit("TSRM Status(Purchase)"::" ");
        exit(ServiceItem."TSRM Status(Purchase)");
    end;

    local procedure OpenEquipment()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        EquipmentHeader: Record "TSRM Equipment Header";
    begin
        CalcForecast.Get(Rec."Forecast No.");
        EquipmentHeader.SetRange("Service Item No.", CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
        Page.RunModal(Page::"TSRM Assign/Remove Equipment", EquipmentHeader);
        CurrPage.Update();
    end;

    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        EquipmentEnabled: Boolean;
        IsTypeItem: Boolean;
        TotalEquipCalcSalesPrice: Decimal;
        TotalEquipCosts: Decimal;
        TotalEquipListPrice: Decimal;
        TotalCalcSalesPriceLbl: Label 'Total Calc. Sales Price';
        TotalCostsLbl: Label 'Total Costs';
        TotalListPriceLbl: Label 'Total List Price';
        SearchTextVar: Text;
}
table 5446003 "TSRD Calc. Forecast"
{
    Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet';
    DataCaptionFields = "No.", Description;
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Forecasts";

    //Always update archive table as well!

    fields
    {
        field(1; "No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(2; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(3; "Vendor No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = Vendor."No.";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                if "Vendor No." <> '' then begin
                    Vendor.Get("Vendor No.");
                    "Vendor Name" := Vendor.Name;
                end else
                    "Vendor Name" := '';
                InitResponsibilityCenter();
                if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Vendor No.")) or
                   (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Vendor Name"))
                then
                    DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
            end;
        }
        field(4; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor Name';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                if Page.RunModal(0, Vendor) = Action::LookupOK then begin
                    if Vendor.Name = '' then
                        Vendor.FieldError(Name);
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                end;
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
                HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
                LookupVar: Variant;
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                if "Vendor Name" <> '' then begin
                    LookupVar := Vendor;
                    if not HelperTools.FindRecordUsingUpToTwoFields(LookupVar, "Vendor Name", Vendor.FieldNo("No."), Vendor.FieldNo(Name)) then
                        Error('');
                    Vendor := LookupVar;
                    if Vendor.Name = '' then
                        Vendor.FieldError(Name);
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                end else
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", '');
            end;
        }
        field(5; "Manufacturer Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Manufacturer';
            TableRelation = Manufacturer.Code;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
