                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                AttributeMgt.ManufacturerValidate(Rec, xRec);
                CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
                UpdateDescription();
                SetCalculationCurrency();
            end;
        }
        field(6; "Category Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Category';
            TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Category"."Code";
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                AttributeMgt.CategoryValidate(Rec, xRec);
                CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
            end;
        }
        field(7; "Subcategory Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Subcategory';
            TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Subcategory"."Code" where("Category Code" = field("Category Code"));
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                AttributeMgt.SubcategoryValidate(Rec, xRec);
                CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
            end;
        }
        field(8; "Model Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Model';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Model"."Code" where("Manufacturer Code" = field("Manufacturer Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code"), "Subcategory Code" = field("Subcategory Code"));
            ValidateTableRelation = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
                EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                AttributeMgt.ModelValidate(Rec);
                CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
                UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
                UpdateDescription();
                if CurrFieldNo <> 0 then
                    EquipmentMgt.TransferStandardEquipmentAndModel(Rec, xRec);
            end;
        }
        field(9; "Manufacturer Name"; Text[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup(Manufacturer.Name where(Code = field("Manufacturer Code")));
            Caption = 'Manufacturer Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(10; "Category Name"; Text[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Category".Name where(Code = field("Category Code")));
            Caption = 'Category Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(11; "Subcategory Name"; Text[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Subcategory".Name where(Code = field("Subcategory Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code")));
            Caption = 'Subcategory Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(12; "Model Name"; Text[100])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Model".Name where(Code = field("Model Code"), "Manufacturer Code" = field("Manufacturer Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code"), "Subcategory Code" = field("Subcategory Code")));
            Caption = 'Model Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(13; "Service Item No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "Service Item";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                MachineCommSalesMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Comm. Sales Mgt";
                OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                PrefillVATProdPostingGroup();
                CalcForecastMgt.ValidateServItemNoOnForecast(Rec, xRec);
                if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Service Item No.") then
                    DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
                MachineCommSalesMgt.ValidateServiceItemNo(Rec);
                CopyUnitCostOfServiceItem();
                HandleEquipment();
                OverAllowanceMgt.SetServiceItemNoOnRetValueAllocs(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(14; "Calc. Sales Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Configure Price Quote No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(15; Status; Enum "TSRD Calc. Status")
        {
            Caption = 'Status';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(16; "Series Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Series Code';

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
            begin
                AttributeMgt.SeriesValidate(Rec, xRec);
                UpdateDescription();
            end;
        }
        field(17; "Series Name"; Text[100])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Series".Name where(Code = field("Series Code")));
            Caption = 'Series Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(18; "Creation Date"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Creation Date';
        }
        field(19; "Creation by User"; Code[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Creation by User ID';
        }
        field(20; "Last Date Modified"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Last Date Modified';
        }
        field(21; "Last Modified by User"; Code[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Last Modified by User ID';
        }
        field(22; "Base Code"; Code[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Base Code';
        }
        field(23; "List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'List Price';
        }
        field(24; "Base Machine Net Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Base Machine Net Price';
            ObsoleteReason = 'Due to calculation changes this field has been replace by "Base Machine List Price"';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402';
        }
        field(25; "Purchase Document Exist"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("Purchase Header" where("TSRD Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(26; "Sales Document Exist"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("Sales Header" where("TSRD Sales Forecast No." = filter(<> ''), "TSRD Sales Forecast No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No.")));
            Caption = 'Sales Document Exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(27; Closed; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Closed';
        }
        field(28; "Customer No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Customer No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = Customer."No.";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Customer: Record Customer;
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
            begin
                if Rec."Customer No." = '' then
                    exit;
                Customer.Get(Rec."Customer No.");
                Rec."Customer Name" := Customer.Name;
                if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Customer No.")) or
                   (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Customer Name"))
                then
                    DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
            end;
        }
        field(29; "Customer Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Customer Name';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(30; "Contact No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Contact No.';
            TableRelation = Contact."No.";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Contact: Record Contact;
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
            begin
                if Rec."Contact No." = '' then
                    exit;
                Contact.Get(Rec."Contact No.");
                Rec."Contact Name" := Contact.Name;
                if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Contact No.")) or
                   (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Contact Name"))
                then
                    DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
            end;
        }
        field(31; "Contact Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Contact Name';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(32; "List Price Conf. Options"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'List Price Configuration Options';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(33; "Configuration Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Configuration Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(34; "Total Discount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts"."Discount Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Total Purchase Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(35; "Workshop Amount Labour"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Amount (Labor)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Services Amount Labor';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(36; "Workshop Amount Parts"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Amount (Parts)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Services Amount Parts';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(37; "Workshop Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(Included)));
            Caption = 'Services Amount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(38; "Total Costs"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost".Amount where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(Included)));
            Caption = 'Total Costs';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(39; "Equipment List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration List Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(40; "Equipment Cost"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration Cost';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(41; "Equipment Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(Included)));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(42; "Equipment (Separate)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately)));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(43; "Calc. Sales For. Version No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Configure Price Quote Version No.';
            ObsoleteReason = 'New field: Version No.';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2102.230700.0.0';
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast Line"."Version No." where("Forecast No." = field("No."));
        }
        field(44; "Total Sales Discount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts"."Discount Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Total Sales Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(45; "Base Machine List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Base Machine List Price';
            MinValue = 0;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                UpdateListPrice();
                UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
                CalcForecastMgt.RecalculatePurchDiscountsOnDealerNetPriceChange(Rec);
                CalcForecastMgt.RecalculateSalesDiscountsOnSalesPriceChange(Rec);
                if "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
                    UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
                UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice();
                UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
                if Rec."Base Machine List Price" <> xRec."Base Machine List Price" then
                    OverAllowanceMgt.RecreateOverAllowances(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(50; Template; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Template';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(60; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
            Editable = false;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(61; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(62; "Service Item Created"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item Created';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(70; "Location Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Location Code';
            TableRelation = Location;
        }
        field(80; "Calculated Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            Caption = 'Calculated Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(CalculatedMarginLbl, ' %');
            Editable = false;
            MinValue = 0.0001;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
            end;
        }
        field(81; "Calculated Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
            Editable = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if ((xRec."Calculated Sales Price" = "Sales Price") and ("Calculated Sales Price" <> "Sales Price"))
                    or ("Sales Price" < "Calculated Sales Price") and (Status <> Status::Released)
                then begin
                    Rec.Validate("Sales Price", "Calculated Sales Price");
                    exit;
                end;
                UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
                UpdateCalcSalesPriceSCC();
            end;
        }
        field(82; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
            MinValue = 0;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
            begin
                CheckAndFixMinimumMargin();
                if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                    "Sales Price" := CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
                    UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
                    "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
                end;
                UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
            end;
        }
        field(83; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            MinValue = 0;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
            begin
                if CurrFieldNo <> 0 then
                    TestStatusOpen();
                if "Sales Price" = 0 then
                    "Sales Price" := "Calculated Sales Price";
                if "Calculated Sales Price" = 0 then
                    exit;
                if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                    "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
                    "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
                end;
                UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
                if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Sales Price") then
                    UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
            end;
        }
        field(84; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            CaptionClass = GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(), Rec."Calculation Currency");
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                    "Sales Price" := GetCalculatedUnitCost() + "Margin Amount";
                    "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
                    FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
                end;
                UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
            end;
        }
        field(90; "Workshop (Separate)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately)));
            Caption = 'Services (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(95; "Conf Price with Calc. Discount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Discount" = const(true)));
            Caption = 'Configuration Price with Calc. Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Not needed anymore. Field Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost) is used instead.';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2302.2411';
        }
        field(96; "Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Discount" = const(true)));
            Caption = 'Direct unit cost Price with Calc. Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(100; "Return Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Forecast Ret Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Return Type';
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AgencyBusinessMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Agency Business Mgt.";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                ReturnTypeErr: Label 'Fix Price is allowed for this Calculation Worksheet. You can''t change the Return Type.';
            begin
                if Rec."Return Type" = xRec."Return Type" then
                    exit;
                CheckIsReturnTypeEditable();
                if Rec."Fix Price allowed" then
                    Error(ReturnTypeErr);
                if "Return Type" = "Return Type"::"Agency Business" then
                    AgencyBusinessMgt.CheckUserSetupActivated();
                CalcForecastMgt.CheckAndDeleteRelatedData(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(101; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(102; "Created from Template"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. Forecast" where("No." = field("Template Forecast No."), Template = const(true)));
            Caption = 'Created from Template';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(103; Quantity; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Quantity';
            Editable = false;
            InitValue = 1;
            MinValue = 1;
        }
        field(104; "Template Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet Template No';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(105; "Sort No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Sort No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(106; "Version No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Version No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(107; "System-Created"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'System-Created';
            DataClassification = SystemMetadata;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(108; "Service Item Status(Purchase)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Purchase)")
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("Service Item"."TSRM Status(Purchase)" where("No." = field("Service Item No.")));
            Caption = 'Status (Purchase)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(109; "Service Item Status (Sales)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Sales)")
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("Service Item"."TSRM Status(Sales)" where("No." = field("Service Item No.")));
            Caption = 'Status (Sales)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(110; "Sales Calculation Status"; Enum "TSRD Sales Calculation Status")
        {
            Caption = 'Configure Price Quote Status';
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Field was never needed.';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2502.251100';
        }
        field(111; "Standard Equipment"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Standard Equipment" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Standard Configuration';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(115; "Discounted Machine Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Discounted Machine Sales Price';
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Field was missnamed in conception. Actual field is "Calculated Machine Sales Price"';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402';
        }
        field(120; "Show discounted Sales Prices"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show discounted Sales Prices';
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Field was missnamed in conception. Actual field is "Show Calculated Sales Prices"';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402';
        }
        field(121; "Show List Prices"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show List Prices';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Show List Prices" then
                    TestField("Show calculated Sales Prices", false);
                UpdateListPrice();
                UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice()
            end;
        }
        field(122; "Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                MinimumMargin: Decimal;
                MarginTooLowErr: Label 'The calculated Fix Price for %1 must not be below the minimum margin.', Comment = '%1 = Calculation Worksheet No.';
            begin
                "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := "Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" - CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", GetCalculatedUnitCost());
                "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := ("Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" / ("Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" - "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)") - 1) * 100;
                MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");

                if "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" < MinimumMargin then
                    Error(MarginTooLowErr, Rec."No.");
            end;
        }
        field(123; "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Surcharge Amount (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(124; "Surcharge % (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            Caption = 'Surcharge % (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(125; "Purchase Order Type"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Order Type';
            TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Purchase" = const(true));
        }
        field(126; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
            TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;

            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
                RespCenterCode: Code[10];
            begin
                RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
                if RespCenterCode <> '' then
                    Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
            begin
                RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
                CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
            end;
        }
        field(127; "Fix Price allowed"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Fix Price allowed';

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
                FixPriceAlreadyCalculatedErr: Label 'Fix Price has already been calculated. Please remove the Fix Price first';
                ReturnTypeErr: Label 'You can''t set Fix Price Allowed if Return Type is set.';
            begin
                if not Rec."Fix Price allowed" then begin
                    Rec."Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" := 0;
                    Rec."Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := 0;
                    Rec."Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := 0;
                end else begin
                    if Rec."Return Type" <> Rec."Return Type"::" " then
                        Error(ReturnTypeErr);
                    CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
                    if CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then
                        Error(FixPriceAlreadyCalculatedErr);
                    TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(FieldCaption("Fix Price allowed"));
                    CheckCalcWorkShopForSeparate();
                    CheckCalcExternalEquipmentForSeparate();
                    CheckCalcCostForSeparate();
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(128; "Calculated Machine Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Machine Sales Price';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(129; "Show calculated Sales Prices"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show calculated Sales Prices';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Show calculated Sales Prices" then begin
                    TestField("Show List Prices", false);
                    TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(FieldCaption("Show calculated Sales Prices"));
                    UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
                end else
                    EmptyCalculatedSalesPriceFields();
            end;
        }
        field(130; "Includes Sales Discount"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Includes Sales Discount';
            Editable = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Includes Sales Discount" then
                    if "Margin %" <> "Calculated Margin %" then
                        Validate("Margin %", "Calculated Margin %");
            end;
        }
        field(131; "FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Fixed Asset Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                MinimumMargin: Decimal;
                MarginTooLowErr: Label 'The calculated Fix Price for %1 must not be below the minimum margin.', Comment = '%1 = Calculation Worksheet No.';
            begin
                if Rec."Service Item In Stock As" <> Rec."Service Item In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset" then
                    exit;
                "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := "FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" - CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", GetCalculatedUnitCost());
                "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := ("FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" / ("FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" - "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)") - 1) * 100;
                MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");

                if "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" < MinimumMargin then
                    Error(MarginTooLowErr, Rec."No.");
            end;
        }
        field(132; "VAT Prod. Posting Group"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'VAT Prod. Posting Group';
            TableRelation = "VAT Product Posting Group";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
                VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
            begin
                if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
                    exit;
                CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
                VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", "VAT Prod. Posting Group");
                UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
            end;
        }
        field(135; "Sales Price incl. VAT"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price incl. VAT';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                Validate("Sales Price", "Sales Price incl. VAT" * (100 / (100 + "VAT %")));
            end;
        }
        field(140; "VAT %"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'VAT %';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(145; "VAT Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'VAT Amount';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(150; "Service Item In Stock As"; Enum "TSRM In Stock As")
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item In Stock As';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(151; "Calculated Price (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Price (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(152; "Configuration Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Calculated Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Configuration Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(160; "Calculation Currency"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Currency';
            TableRelation = Currency;
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
            begin
                GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
                if ("Calculation Currency" = "Sales Currency") and
                   ("Calculation Currency" <> '') and
                   ("Calculation Currency" = GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code") then
                    Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
                PrefillCalcExchangeRate();
                UpdateAllPricesWithMultiplier();
            end;
        }
        field(165; "Calc Currency Exchange Rate"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Currency Exchange Rate';
            DecimalPlaces = 4;
            InitValue = 1;
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcCurrExchangeRateErr: Label 'Exchange Rate cannot be 0';
                CalculationCurrNotDefinedErr: Label 'Calculation Currency is not defined';
            begin
                if ("Calculation Currency" = '') and (CurrFieldNo = (FieldNo("Calc Currency Exchange Rate"))) then
                    Error(CalculationCurrNotDefinedErr);
                if "Calc Currency Exchange Rate" = 0 then
                    Error(CalcCurrExchangeRateErr);
            end;
        }
        field(170; "Calculated Sales Price (SCC)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(175; "Sales Price (SCC)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            MinValue = 0;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Sales Price (SCC)") then
                    UpdateSalesPriceFromSCC();
            end;
        }
        field(180; "Sales Currency Exchange Rate"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Currency Exchange Rate';
            DecimalPlaces = 4;
            Editable = false;
            InitValue = 1;
        }
        field(185; "Sales Currency"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Currency';
            Editable = false;
            TableRelation = Currency;
        }
        field(190; "Service Item Calculation"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item Calculation Worksheet';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(200; "Over-Allowance Cost"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula =
                sum(
                    "TSRD Return Value Allocation"."Over-Allowance Allocation"
                    where(
                        "Sales Calculation No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No."),
                        "Source Forecast No." = field("No.")
                    )
                );
            Caption = 'Over-Allowance Cost';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(201; "Over-Allowance Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula =
                sum(
                    "TSRD Return Value Allocation"."Return Price Allocation"
                    where(
                        "Sales Calculation No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No."),
                        "Source Forecast No." = field("No.")
                    )
                );
            Caption = 'Over-Allowance Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(202; "Over-Allowance Lines Exist"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula =
                exist(
                    "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch"
                    where(
                        "Forecast No." = field("No."),
                        "Over-Allowance Value" = filter(<> 0),
                        "Over-Allowance Posted" = const(false)
                    )
                );
            Caption = 'Over-Allowance Lines Exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(203; "Add. Conf. Cost (Sep.)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately)));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration Price (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(204; "Service Amount (Sep.)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately)));
            Caption = 'Service Amount (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(205; "Cost Amount (Sep.)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost".Amount where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately)));
            Caption = 'Total Costs (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(206; "Costs Sales Price (Sep.)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost"."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately)));
            Caption = 'Costs (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(983; "Service Activities"; Enum "TSRD CPQ Related Activities")
        {
            Caption = 'Service Activities';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(984; "Return Status"; Enum "TSRD CPQ Related Activities")
        {
            Caption = 'Return Status';
            Editable = false;
        }

    }
    keys
    {
        key(PK; "No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
        key(ServiceItemNoKey; "Service Item No.")
        {
        }
        key(SortKey; "Sort No.", "Version No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.")
        {
        }
        key(SalesPriceKey; "Calc. Sales Forecast No.")
        {
            MaintainSiftIndex = true;
            SumIndexFields = "Sales Price";
        }
        key(TemplateKey; Template, "System-Created", "Purchase Document Type", "Purchase Document No.", "Base Code")
        {
        }
        key(StatusKey; Status)
        {
        }
    }
    trigger OnInsert()
    var
    begin
        if "No." = '' then
            GenerateNoSeries(true);
        "Creation Date" := Today();
        "Creation by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
        InitOrderType();
        InitResponsibilityCenter();
        TestMandatoryFields();
        UpdateDescription();
        CheckServItemCalculation();
    end;

    trigger OnModify()
    var
    begin
        TestStatusOpen();
        "Last Date Modified" := Today();
        "Last Modified by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
        TestMandatoryFields();
    end;

    trigger OnRename()
    begin
        "Last Date Modified" := Today();
        "Last Modified by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
        TestMandatoryFields();
    end;

    trigger OnDelete()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        TestStatusOpen();
        TestSystemCreatedFalse();
        TestSalesCalculationStatus();
        if not SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader then
            CalcForecastMgt.ClearForecastNoInPurchaseOrder(Rec."No.");
        CalcForecastMgt.RenumberSortNos(Rec);
    end;

    procedure GenerateNoSeries(FromTemplate: Boolean)
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        case FromTemplate of
            true:
                begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Template Forecast Nos.");
                    "No." := NoSeries.GetNextNo(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Template Forecast Nos.");
                    Template := true;
                end;
            false:
                begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Forecast Nos.");
                    "No." := NoSeries.GetNextNo(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Forecast Nos.");
                end;
        end
    end;

    procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Line No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", "Version No.");
        if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit(10000);
        CalcForecast.FindLast();
        exit(CalcForecast."Line No." + 10000);
    end;

    procedure GetNextSortNo(): Integer
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Sort No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", "Version No.");
        if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit(1);
        CalcForecast.FindLast();
        exit(CalcForecast."Sort No." + 1);
    end;

    procedure SetSkipCheckSystemCreated(NewSkipCheckSystemCreated: Boolean)
    begin
        SkipCheckSystemCreated := NewSkipCheckSystemCreated;
    end;

    internal procedure GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() BaseMachineListPriceSales: Decimal
    var
        Handled: Boolean;
    begin
        OnBeforeGetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, BaseMachineListPriceSales);
        if Handled then
            exit;
        exit(Rec."Base Machine List Price");
    end;

    internal procedure GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() ListPriceSales: Decimal
    var
        Handled: Boolean;
    begin
        OnBeforeGetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, ListPriceSales);
        if Handled then
            exit;
        exit(Rec."List Price");
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateDescription()
    var
        StringMgt: Codeunit "TSR String Mgt.";
        ReturnList: List of [Text];
        Descr: Text;
        xDescr: Text;
    begin
        CalcFields("Manufacturer Name", "Subcategory Name", "Series Name", "Model Name");
        Descr := "Manufacturer Name" + ' ' + "Subcategory Name" + ' ' + "Series Name" + ' ' + "Model Name";
        xDescr := xRec."Manufacturer Name" + ' ' + xRec."Subcategory Name" + ' ' + xRec."Series Name" + ' ' + xRec."Model Name";
        Descr := Descr.Trim().Replace('  ', ' ');
        xDescr := xDescr.Trim().Replace('  ', ' ');
        if Description <> '' then
            if Description <> xDescr then
                exit;
        if StringMgt.SplitStringSpecificLen(Descr, MaxStrLen(Description), ' ', ReturnList) then
            Validate(Description, ReturnList.Get(1));
    end;

    internal procedure GetDate(): Date
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.") and (CalcSalesForecast.Date <> 0D) then
            exit(CalcSalesForecast.Date);
        exit(WorkDate());
    end;

    internal procedure GetStatusStyleText() StatusStyleText: Text
    begin
        case Status of
            Status::Open:
                StatusStyleText := 'Favorable';
            Status::Alternative:
                StatusStyleText := 'StrongAccent'
            else
                StatusStyleText := 'Strong';
        end;

        OnAfterGetStatusStyleText(Rec, StatusStyleText);
    end;

    procedure SetSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader(NewSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader: Boolean)
    begin
        SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader := NewSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader;
    end;

    procedure TestStatusOpen()
    begin
        if DoNotTestStatusOpen or StatusCheckSuspended then
            exit;
        if not (Rec.Status in [Status::Open, Status::Alternative]) then
            Rec.FieldError(Status);
    end;

    internal procedure TestSalesCalculationStatus()
    var
        StatusWonOrLostErr: Label 'Configure Price Quote status is either won or lost. You can''t change the Calculation Worksheet.';
    begin
        if Rec.GetStatusCheckSuspended() then
            exit;
        if Rec.GetSalesCalculationStatus() in ["TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Won, "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Lost] then
            Error(StatusWonOrLostErr);
    end;

    procedure GetCalculatedUnitCost() CalculatedUnitCost: Decimal
    begin
        CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount", "Configuration Price", "List Price Conf. Options", "Over-Allowance Cost");
        case true of
            "Show calculated Sales Prices":
                CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."Configuration Price"
                                       + "Base Machine List Price"
                                       + "Equipment Price"
                                       + "Total Costs"
                                       + "Workshop Amount"
                                       - "Total Discount";
            "Show List Prices":
                CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price Conf. Options"
                                           + "Base Machine List Price"
                                           + "Equipment Price"
                                           + "Total Costs"
                                           + "Workshop Amount"
                                           - "Total Discount";
            else
                CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price"
                                           + "Equipment Price"
                                           + "Total Costs"
                                           + "Workshop Amount"
                                           - "Total Discount";
        end;

        if "Over-Allowance Cost" > 0 then
            CalculatedUnitCost += "Over-Allowance Cost";
    end;

    internal procedure GetCalculatedUnitPrice() CalculatedUnitPrice: Decimal
    begin
        CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Sales Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount");
        CalculatedUnitPrice := Rec.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc()
                                   + "Equipment Price"
                                   + "Total Costs"
                                   + "Workshop Amount"
                                   - "Total Sales Discount";
    end;

    local procedure CheckAndFixMinimumMargin()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
        NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
        MinimumMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
        if "Margin %" >= MinimumMargin then
            exit;
        "Margin %" := MinimumMargin;
        if "Sales Price" <= 0 then
            exit;
        if xRec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate" <> Rec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate" then
            exit;
        if "List Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        NotificationManagement.CreateAndSendNotification(MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr, RecordId);
    end;

    internal procedure CheckMargingSetToMinimumMargin()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
        NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
        MinimumMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        if "List Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
        if ("Margin %" = MinimumMargin) and (xRec."Margin %" > Rec."Margin %") then
            NotificationManagement.CreateAndSendNotification(MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr, RecordId);
    end;

    procedure UpdateCalcSalesPrice()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateCalcSalesPrice(Rec, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        MinimumMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        if "Sales Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        if "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
            "Sales Price" := GetCalculatedUnitPrice();
            UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
            "Margin Amount" := GetCalculatedUnitPrice() - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
            "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), GetCalculatedUnitPrice());
            MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                               Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
            if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then begin
                if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Base Machine List Price") then
                    "Base Machine List Price" := xRec."Base Machine List Price";
                UpdateListPrice();
                FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
            end;
        end
        else begin
            MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
            if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then
                FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin()
            else begin
                "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
                if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then
                    FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
                "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
            end;
        end;
        Rec.Modify();
    end;

    local procedure FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CheckAndFixMinimumMargin();
        "Sales Price" := CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
        UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
        "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateSalesPrice()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateSalesPrice(Rec, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
        UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT();
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcMarginPercentage()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
        MarginPercentage: Decimal;
    begin
        MarginPercentage := MarginSetup.GetMarginPercentage("Manufacturer Code", "Category Code", "Subcategory Code", "Series Code", "Model Code");
        Validate("Calculated Margin %", MarginPercentage);
        Validate("Margin %", MarginPercentage);
    end;

    local procedure TestSystemCreatedFalse()
    begin
        if not SkipCheckSystemCreated or StatusCheckSuspended then
            TestField("System-Created", false);
    end;

    local procedure TestMandatoryFields()
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
    begin
        TestField("Manufacturer Code");
        TestField("Category Code");
        TestField("Model Code");
        if ServiceMgt.IsSubcategoryMandatory() then
            TestField("Subcategory Code");
        if ServiceMgt.IsSeriesMandatory() then
            TestField("Series Code");
    end;

    local procedure CheckAttributesOnConfigurations()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        AttributeChangeErr: Label '%1 cannot be changed since it is used in Configurations. Delete Configuration Lines in order to change %1.', Comment = '%1=Manufacturer Code/Category Code/Subcategory Code/Model Code';
    begin
        case CurrFieldNo of
            FieldNo("Manufacturer Code"):
                begin
                    if xRec."Manufacturer Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Manufacturer Code" = xRec."Manufacturer Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Manufacturer Code", '<>%1', "Manufacturer Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Manufacturer Code"));
                end;
            FieldNo("Category Code"):
                begin
                    if xRec."Category Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Category Code" = xRec."Category Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Category Code", '<>%1', "Category Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Category Code"));
                end;
            FieldNo("Subcategory Code"):
                begin

                    if xRec."Subcategory Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Subcategory Code" = xRec."Subcategory Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Subcategory Code", '<>%1', "Subcategory Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Subcategory Code"));
                end;
            FieldNo("Series Code"):
                begin
                    if xRec."Series Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Series Code" = xRec."Series Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Series Code", '<>%1', "Model Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Series Code"));
                end;
            FieldNo("Model Code"):
                begin
                    if xRec."Model Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Model Code" = xRec."Model Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Model Code", '<>%1', "Model Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Model Code"));
                end;
        end;
    end;

    internal procedure SetCalculationCurrencyFromVendor(VendorNo: Code[20])
    var
        Vendor: Record Vendor;
        ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        ExchangeCurrencyConfirmMsg: Label 'The vendor has the currency code %1. Do you want to use it in calculation worksheet?', Comment = '%1 - Vendor Currency Code';
    begin
        if not Vendor.Get(VendorNo) then
            exit;
        if Vendor."Currency Code" = '' then
            exit;
        if Vendor."Currency Code" = Rec."Calculation Currency" then
            exit;
        if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponse(StrSubstNo(ExchangeCurrencyConfirmMsg, Vendor."Currency Code")) then
            exit;
        Rec.Validate("Calculation Currency", Vendor."Currency Code");
        Rec.Modify();
    end;

    procedure SetDoNotTestStatusOpen(NewDoNotTestStatusOpen: Boolean)
    begin
        DoNotTestStatusOpen := NewDoNotTestStatusOpen;
    end;

    procedure UpdateListPrice()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        LineAmount: Decimal;
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Line Amount (List Price)");
        if "Show List Prices" then
            LineAmount := CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (List Price)"
        else
            LineAmount := CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)";
        Validate("List Price", LineAmount + "Base Machine List Price");
        OnAfterUpdateListPrice(Rec, LineAmount);
    end;

    internal procedure SetIncludesSalesDiscount(NewIncludesSalesDiscount: Boolean)
    begin
        if "Includes Sales Discount" = NewIncludesSalesDiscount then
            exit;

        Validate("Includes Sales Discount", NewIncludesSalesDiscount);
        Modify();
    end;

    internal procedure GetTotalPurchDiscountPercentage(): Decimal
    var
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts";
    begin
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.CalcSums("Absolute Discount %");
        exit(CalcPurchaseDiscounts."Absolute Discount %");
    end;

    internal procedure InitOrderType()
    var
        UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
    begin
        if not UserSetup.Get(UserId()) then
            exit;
        if UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type" <> '' then
            Rec.Validate("Purchase Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type");
    end;

    internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
    var
        RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
        RespCenterCode: Code[10];
    begin
        RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase, Rec."Vendor No.");
        if RespCenterCode <> '' then
            Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
    end;

    local procedure CheckIsReturnTypeEditable()
    var
        CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
        ReturnTypeErr: Label 'Return Type cannot be changed after Purchase/Trade-In/Agency Business document is created. Please first delete Purchase/Trade-In/Agency Business document if it is not posted.';
    begin
        CalcTradeInPurch.SetFilter("Document No.", '<>%1', '');
        CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        if not CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
            Error(ReturnTypeErr);
    end;

    local procedure TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(SalesCalculationOption: Text)
    var
        CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
        DiscountsErr: Label 'There are Sales Discounts defined. You have to delete them first to apply "%1"', Comment = '%1 - Configure Price Quote option you''re trying to apply';
    begin
        CalcSalesDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        if not CalcSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            Error(DiscountsErr, SalesCalculationOption);
    end;

    internal procedure EmptyCalculatedSalesPriceFields()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll("Calculated Sales Price", 0);
        CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll("Calculated Sales Amount", 0);
    end;

    procedure UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices()
    var
        Currency: Record Currency;
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal;
        PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal;
        SalesPriceSplitTotal, SplitDiff : Decimal;
        SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        if not "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
            exit;
        if "List Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        Currency.Initialize('');
        GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(PriceWithoutMargin, SalesPriceWithMargin, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
        if SalesPriceWithMargin = 0 then
            exit;
        SalesPriceSplitTotal += "Calculated Machine Sales Price";
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("List Price", '<>%1', 0);
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Quantity, '<>%1', 0);
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(CalcConfiguration, SalesPriceSplitTotal, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);

        if SalesPriceSplitTotal <> SalesPriceWithMargin then begin
            SplitDiff := SalesPriceWithMargin - SalesPriceSplitTotal;
            CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" -= SplitDiff;
            CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := Round(CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity, Currency."Unit-Amount Rounding Precision");
            CalcConfiguration.Modify();
        end;
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices(var CurrCalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration")
    var
        Currency: Record Currency;
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal;
        PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal;
        SalesPriceSplitTotal, SplitDiff : Decimal;
        SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        if not "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
            exit;
        if "List Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        Currency.Initialize('');
        GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(PriceWithoutMargin, SalesPriceWithMargin, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
        if SalesPriceWithMargin = 0 then
            exit;
        SalesPriceSplitTotal += "Calculated Machine Sales Price";
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', CurrCalcConfiguration."No.");
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("List Price", '<>%1', 0);
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Quantity, '<>%1', 0);
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(CalcConfiguration, SalesPriceSplitTotal, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);

        if SalesPriceSplitTotal <> SalesPriceWithMargin then begin
            SplitDiff := SalesPriceWithMargin - SalesPriceSplitTotal;
            CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" -= SplitDiff;
            CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := Round(CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CurrCalcConfiguration.Quantity, Currency."Unit-Amount Rounding Precision");
            CurrCalcConfiguration.Modify();
        end;
    end;

    local procedure GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(var PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal; var SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal; var PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal; Currency: Record Currency)
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcFields("Total Discount", "Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc", "Configuration Price", "List Price Conf. Options");
        if "Show List Prices" then
            PriceWithoutMargin := "List Price Conf. Options" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() - "Total Discount"
        else
            PriceWithoutMargin := "Configuration Price" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() - "Total Discount";

        SalesPriceWithMargin := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(PriceWithoutMargin,
                                                                              "Margin %",
                                                                              SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
        if (SalesPriceWithMargin = 0) or ("List Price" = 0) then begin
            "Calculated Machine Sales Price" := 0;
            exit;
        end;
        if "Total Discount" <> 0 then
            PurchDiscountMultiplier := 1 - "Total Discount" / ("Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
        else
            PurchDiscountMultiplier := 1;

        "Calculated Machine Sales Price" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() * PurchDiscountMultiplier, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"; var SalesPriceSplitTotal: Decimal; PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal; Currency: Record Currency)
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Calculate Discount", true);
        if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
            repeat
                CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" * PurchDiscountMultiplier, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
                CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity;
                CalcConfiguration.Modify();
                SalesPriceSplitTotal += CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount";
            until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
        end;

        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Calculate Discount", false);
        if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
            repeat
                CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
                CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity;
                CalcConfiguration.Modify();
                SalesPriceSplitTotal += CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount";
            until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
        end;
    end;

    internal procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup()
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
        PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast, true);
    end;

    internal procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    begin
        PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast, false);
    end;

    local procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; ExecuteValidate: Boolean)
    var
        Item: Record Item;
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
    begin
        if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
            exit;
        if Rec."Service Item No." = '' then begin
            Clear(Rec."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
            exit;
        end;
        ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
        if not Item.Get(ServiceItem."Item No.") then
            exit;

        VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
        if ExecuteValidate then
            Rec.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group")
        else
            Rec."VAT Prod. Posting Group" := Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group";

        UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup")
    var
        VATCalculationTypeErr: Label 'Calculation Type Full VAT in VAT Posting Setup is not possible in Configure Price Quote';
    begin
        case VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type" of
            VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Reverse Charge VAT",
            VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Sales Tax":
                "VAT %" := 0;
            VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Normal VAT":
                "VAT %" := VATPostingSetup."VAT %";
            VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Full VAT":
                Error(VATCalculationTypeErr);
        end;
        UpdateVATAmount();
        UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT();
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateVAT()
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
        VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
    begin
        if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
        if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
            exit;
        if not VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", "VAT Prod. Posting Group") then
            exit;
        UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT()
    begin
        "Sales Price incl. VAT" := "Sales Price" * (1 + "VAT %" / 100);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateVATAmount()
    begin
        "VAT Amount" := "Sales Price" * ("VAT %" / 100);
    end;

    local procedure SetCalculationCurrency()
    var
        Manufacturer: Record Manufacturer;
    begin
        if "Manufacturer Code" = '' then begin
            Clear("Calculation Currency");
            exit;
        end;
        Manufacturer.Get("Manufacturer Code");
        if ("Sales Currency" = Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code") and
           (Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code" <> '') then
            Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
        if Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code" <> '' then
            Validate("Calculation Currency", Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code");
    end;

    internal procedure PrefillSalesCurrency()
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
        if (CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency" = "Calculation Currency") and (CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency" <> '') then
            Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
        Validate("Sales Currency", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency");
        Validate("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate");
    end;

    local procedure UpdateAllPricesWithMultiplier()
    var
        CurrencyExchangeRate: Record "Currency Exchange Rate";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        CurrSalesPrice: Decimal;
        ExchangeRate: Decimal;
        PriceMultuplier: Decimal;
        xExchangeRate: Decimal;
    begin
        if Rec."Calculation Currency" = xRec."Calculation Currency" then
            exit;
        ExchangeRate := CurrencyExchangeRate.ExchangeRate(Today(), Rec."Calculation Currency");
        xExchangeRate := CurrencyExchangeRate.ExchangeRate(Today(), xRec."Calculation Currency");

        if (ExchangeRate = 0) or (xExchangeRate = 0) then
            exit;

        PriceMultuplier := ExchangeRate / xExchangeRate;
        if PriceMultuplier = 1 then
            exit;
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateAllForecastPricesWithMultiplier(Rec."No.", PriceMultuplier);
        CurrSalesPrice := "Sales Price";
        "Base Machine List Price" := "Base Machine List Price" * PriceMultuplier;
        UpdateListPrice();
        CalcForecastMgt.RecalculatePurchDiscountsOnDealerNetPriceChange(Rec);
        UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
        Validate("Sales Price", CurrSalesPrice * PriceMultuplier);
    end;

    local procedure CheckCalcWorkShopForSeparate()
    var
        CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
        SeparateWorkshopErr: Label 'There are Services with charging method "Calc. Separately". You have to delete them first to Allow Fix Price.';
    begin
        CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Charging Method", CalcWorkshop."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately);
        if not CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
            Error(SeparateWorkshopErr);
    end;

    local procedure CheckCalcExternalEquipmentForSeparate()
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
        SeparateEquipmentErr: Label 'There are Additional Configurations with charging method "Calc. Separately". You have to delete them first to Allow Fix Price.';
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Charging Method", CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately);
        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            Error(SeparateEquipmentErr);
    end;

    local procedure CheckCalcCostForSeparate()
    var
        CalcCost: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost";
        SeparateCostErr: Label 'There are costs with "Calc. Separately" defined. You have to delete them first to Allow Fix Price.';
    begin
        CalcCost.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcCost.SetRange("Charging Method", CalcCost."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately);
        if not CalcCost.IsEmpty() then
            Error(SeparateCostErr);
    end;

    internal procedure ReInitOrderTypeAndResponsibilityCenter()
    var
        CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
    begin
        CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."No.");
        if CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcTradeInPurch.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            CalcTradeInPurch.InitOrderType();
            CalcTradeInPurch.InitResponsibilityCenter();
            CalcTradeInPurch.Modify(true);
        until CalcTradeInPurch.Next() = 0;
    end;

    procedure UpdateAllPriceRelatedFields()
    begin
        UpdateListPrice();
        UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
        UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice();
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcSalesPriceSCC()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        Validate("Calculated Sales Price (SCC)", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Calculated Sales Price"));
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateSalesPriceSCC()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        Validate("Sales Price (SCC)", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Price"));
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesPriceFromSCC()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        Validate("Sales Price", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Price (SCC)"));
    end;

    local procedure PrefillCalcExchangeRate()
    var
        CurrencyExchangeRate: Record "Currency Exchange Rate";
        LatestDate: Date;
        ExchangeRateAmount: Decimal;
    begin
        if "Calculation Currency" = '' then begin
            Validate("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", 1);
            exit;
        end;
        CurrencyExchangeRate.GetLastestExchangeRate("Calculation Currency", LatestDate, ExchangeRateAmount);
        Validate("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", ExchangeRateAmount);
    end;

    local procedure GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode: Text; Currency: Code[10]): Text
    var
        GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
    begin
        if Currency = '' then
            exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
        GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
        if Currency = GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code" then
            exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
        exit(StrSubstNo('%1 (%2)', CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode, Currency));
    end;

    local procedure CheckServItemCalculation()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        ServItemCalcErr: Label 'There already exist a Service Item Calculation Worksheet for Service Item No. %1', Comment = '%1 Service Item No.';
    begin
        if not Rec."Service Item Calculation" then
            exit;
        if CalcForecastMgt.HasServiceItemCalculation(Rec."Service Item No.") then
            Error(ServItemCalcErr, Rec."Service Item No.");
    end;

    procedure CreatePurchaseOrder()
    var
        CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
    begin
        CalcForecastToPurch.CreatePurchaseOrder(Rec);
    end;

    procedure OpenPurchaseDocument()
    var
        CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
    begin
        CalcForecastToPurch.OpenPurchaseDocument(Rec."Purchase Document Type", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
    end;

    procedure OpenListOfPOs()
    var
        PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header";
    begin
        if not Rec.Template then
            exit;
        PurchaseHeader.FilterGroup(2);
        PurchaseHeader.SetRange("Document Type", PurchaseHeader."Document Type"::Order);
        PurchaseHeader.SetRange("TSRD Forecast No.", Rec."No.");
        PurchaseHeader.FilterGroup(0);
        Page.Run(Page::"Purchase Order List", PurchaseHeader);
    end;

    internal procedure CopyUnitCostOfServiceItem()
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
        UnitCost: Decimal;
    begin
        if "Service Item No." = '' then begin
            if CheckLinkedDocument() then
                SetBaseMachinePrice(0);
            exit;
        end;
        ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
