        ServiceMgt.CalculateServiceItemCardUnitCost(ServiceItem, UnitCost, false);
        if not GetSkipBaseMachineListPrice() then
            SetBaseMachinePrice(UnitCost);
    end;

    local procedure CheckLinkedDocument(): Boolean
    var
        PurchInvLine: Record "Purch. Inv. Line";
        PurchaseLine: Record "Purchase Line";
    begin
        if (xRec."Service Item No." = '') or (Rec."Purchase Document No." = '') then
            exit(true);
        PurchaseLine.SetRange("Document Type", "Purchase Document Type"::Order);
        PurchaseLine.SetRange("Document No.", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
        PurchaseLine.SetRange("TSRM Service Item No.", xRec."Service Item No.");

        PurchInvLine.SetRange("Document No.", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
        PurchInvLine.SetRange("TSRM Service Item No.", xRec."Service Item No.");
        if PurchaseLine.IsEmpty() and PurchInvLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(true);
    end;

    internal procedure HandleEquipment()
    var
        EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
    begin
        EquipmentMgt.TransferStandardEquipmentAndModel(Rec, xRec);
        EquipmentMgt.DeleteForecastEquipmentOnServItemNoValidate(Rec, xRec);
        EquipmentMgt.DeleteServiceItemLinkedEquipment(Rec);
        EquipmentMgt.CopyServiceItemEquipmentToForecast(Rec);
        EquipmentMgt.ServiceItemEquipmentToStandardEquipment(Rec);
    end;

    local procedure SetBaseMachinePrice(NewBasePrice: Decimal)
    var
        Margin: Decimal;
    begin
        Margin := "Margin %";
        Validate("Base Machine List Price", NewBasePrice);
        Validate("Margin %", Margin);
    end;

    internal procedure SetBaseMachineListPrice()
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        ConfirmMgt: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
        UnitCost: Decimal;
        ConfirmLbl: Label 'Calculation Review is not approved. When creating a Calculation Worksheet, the Base Machine List Price will be set to ''0'', do you want to continue?';
    begin
        if Rec."Service Item No." = '' then
            exit;
        ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
        SalesReceivablesSetup.GetRecordOnce();
        case SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Base Machine List Price" of
            "TSRD Base Machine List Price"::"Unit Cost of Service Item":
                ServiceMgt.CalculateServiceItemCardUnitCost(ServiceItem, UnitCost, false);
            "TSRD Base Machine List Price"::"Calculation Unit Cost":
                if not (ServiceItem."TSRM Calc. Review Status" in [
                    "TSRM Calc. Review Status"::Approved,
                    "TSRM Calc. Review Status"::"No Calc. Review Required"
                ])
                then begin
                    if not ConfirmMgt.GetResponse(ConfirmLbl) then
                        Error('')
                    else
                        UnitCost := 0
                end else
                    UnitCost := ServiceItem."TSRM Calc. Unit Cost";
        end;
        SetBaseMachinePrice(UnitCost);
    end;

    internal procedure TestStatusOpenSalesCalc()
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("No.", Rec.GetFilter("Calc. Sales Forecast No."));
        CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("Version No.", Rec.GetFilter("Version No."));
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.FindFirst();
        CalcSalesForecast.TestStatusOpen();
    end;

    internal procedure SetStatusCheckSuspended(Suspend: Boolean)
    begin
        StatusCheckSuspended := Suspend;
    end;

    internal procedure GetStatusCheckSuspended(): Boolean
    begin
        exit(StatusCheckSuspended);
    end;

    internal procedure SetSkipBaseMachineListPrice(Skip: Boolean)
    begin
        SkipBaseMachineListPrice := Skip;
    end;

    internal procedure GetSkipBaseMachineListPrice(): Boolean
    begin
        exit(SkipBaseMachineListPrice);
    end;

    internal procedure SetSkipRelatedActivities(Skip: Boolean)
    begin
        SkipRelatedActivities := Skip;
    end;

    internal procedure GetSkipRelatedActivities(): Boolean
    begin
        exit(SkipRelatedActivities);
    end;

    procedure GetSalesCalculationStatus(): Enum "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if not CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.") then
            exit("TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::" ");
        exit(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Calculation Status");
    end;

    protected var
        SkipCheckSystemCreated: Boolean;
        SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader: Boolean;

    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        NoSeries: Codeunit "No. Series";
        DoNotTestStatusOpen: Boolean;
        FromCPQDelete: Boolean;
        SkipBaseMachineListPrice: Boolean;
        SkipRelatedActivities: Boolean;
        StatusCheckSuspended: Boolean;
        CalculatedMarginLbl: Label 'Calc. ';
        MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr: Label 'Margin too low. Reseting to minimum margin';
        SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr: Label 'You can''t set up the same value for Sales and Calculation Currency.';

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterGetStatusStyleText(Rec: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var StatusStyleText: Text)
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeGetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var Handled: Boolean; var BaseMachineListPriceSales: Decimal)
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeGetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var Handled: Boolean; var ListPriceSales: Decimal)
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterUpdateListPrice(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; LineAmount: Decimal)
    begin
    end;

}
page 5446016 "TSRD Calc. Forecast FactBox"
{
    Caption = 'Worksheet Calculations';
    PageType = CardPart;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Forecast";

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            group(GroupName)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                label(PurchaseCostsLabel)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(PurchaseCostsLbl, Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                }
                field("Base Machine List Price"; Rec."Base Machine List Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Base Machine List Price"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Base Machine List Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Configuration Price"; Rec."Configuration Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
                }
                field("List Price"; Rec."List Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the List Price field';
                }
                field("Total Discount"; Rec."Total Discount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Total Purchase Discount';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Discount"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Discount Amounts from all Purchase discount lines.';
                }
                field("Equipment Price"; Rec."Equipment Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Equipment Price"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Total Additional Configuration Calculated Sales Price field';
                }
                field("Workshop Amount"; Rec."Workshop Amount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Service';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Workshop Amount"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Service Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Total Costs"; Rec."Total Costs")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Costs';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Costs"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                group(OverAllowance)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::"Trade-In") or (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::Purchase) or ShowOverAllowancePrice;
                    field("Over-Allowance Cost"; Rec."Over-Allowance Cost")
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        Caption = 'Over-Allowance Cost';
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Over-Allowance Cost field';
                        trigger OnDrillDown()
                        var
                            OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
                        begin
                            OverAllowanceMgt.DrillDownOnForecastFactbox(Rec."No.");
                        end;
                    }
                }
                field(CalculatedUnitCosts; CalculatedUnitCosts)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Calculated Unit Costs';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(CalculatedUnitCostsLbl, Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Calculated Unit Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("List Price Conf. Options"; Rec."List Price Conf. Options")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    ToolTip = 'Sum of all Configuration Options List Price Amounts.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
            }
            group(Sales)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                Visible = Rec."Includes Sales Discount";

                label(SalesLabel)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Sales';
                    Style = Strong;
                }
                field("Sales Base Machine List Price"; Rec.GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Base Machine List Price"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Base Machine List Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                group(ConfigurationListPrice)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = Rec."Show List Prices";

                    field("Sales Configuration List Price"; Rec."List Price Conf. Options")
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
                    }
                }
                group(ConfigurationPrice)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = not Rec."Show List Prices";

                    field("Sales Configuration Price"; Rec."Configuration Price")
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
                    }
                }
                field("Sales List Price"; Rec.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'List Price';
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the List Price field';
                }
                field("Total Sales Discount"; Rec."Total Sales Discount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = all;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Sales Discount"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Discount Amounts from all Sales discount lines.';
                }
                field("Equipment Price (Sales)"; Rec."Equipment Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Equipment Price"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Total Additional Configuration Calculated Sales Price field';
                }
                field("Workshop Amount (Sales)"; Rec."Workshop Amount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Services';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Workshop Amount"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Service Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Total Costs (Sales)"; Rec."Total Costs")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Costs';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Costs"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Sales Price (without Separate)"; SalesPriceWithoutSeparately)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Sales Price (without Separate)';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(SalesPriceWithoutSeparateLbl, Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Sales Price for Calculation Worksheet excluding separate calculations.';
                }
                field("Add. Conf. (Sep.) Sales"; Rec."Equipment (Separate)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Additional Configuration (Separate)';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(AdditionalConfSeparateLbl, Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price sum of additional configuration lines calculated separately.';
                }
                field("Services (Sep.) Sales"; Rec."Workshop (Separate)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Services (Separate)';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(ServicesSeparateLbl, Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price sum of service lines calculated separately.';
                }
                field("Costs (Sep.) Sales"; Rec."Costs Sales Price (Sep.)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Costs (Separate)';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(CostsSeparateLbl, Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price sum of cost lines calculated separately.';
                }
                field(DirectCosts; DirectCosts)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    Caption = 'Direct Costs';
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Direct Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field(UnitPriceInclDiscounts; UnitPriceInclDiscounts)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    Caption = 'Unit Costs Incl. Discounts';
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Unit Costs Incl. Discounts for Calculation Worksheet.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field(UnitPriceInclWorkshops; UnitPriceInclWorkshops)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    Caption = 'Unit Costs Incl. Services';
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Unit Costs Incl. Services for Calculation Worksheet.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
            }
            group(Summary)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                label(SummaryLabel)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Summary';
                    Style = Strong;
                }
                field(SummaryCalculatedUnitCosts; CalculatedUnitCosts)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(CalculatedUnitCostsLbl, Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Calculated Unit Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Add. Conf. Cost (Sep.)"; Rec."Add. Conf. Cost (Sep.)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Add. Conf. Cost (Sep.)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the direct unit cost sum of additional configuration lines calculated separately.';
                }
                field("Service Amount (Sep.)"; Rec."Service Amount (Sep.)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Service Amount (Sep.)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the total amount sum of service lines calculated separately.';
                }
                field("Cost Amount (Sep.)"; Rec."Cost Amount (Sep.)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Cost Amount (Sep.)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the amount sum of cost lines calculated separately.';
                }
                field(TotalCostsAmountDisplay; TotalCostsAmountDisplay)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Total Costs Amount';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostsAmountLbl, Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies calculated unit costs plus separate cost buckets.';
                }
                field(SalesPriceTotalDisplay; SalesPriceTotalDisplay)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Sales Price Total';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(SalesPriceTotalLbl, Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of sales price without separate components plus all separately calculated sales amounts.';
                }
                field(TotalMarginPctDisplay; TotalMarginPctDisplay)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>%';
                    AutoFormatType = 10;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalMarginPctLbl, Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies total margin percentage based on total costs amount and sales price total.';
                }
                field(TotalMarginAmtDisplay; TotalMarginAmtDisplay)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalMarginAmtLbl, Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies total margin amount based on total costs amount and sales price total.';
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Margin % for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Margin Amount"; Rec."Margin Amount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Margin Amount field';
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Sales Price';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price"), Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Sales Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                group(SalesCurrencySalesPrice)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = not ((Rec."Sales Currency" = '') and (Rec."Calculation Currency" = ''));
                    field("Sales Price (SCC)"; Rec."Sales Price (SCC)")
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithSalesCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price (SCC)"), Rec."No.");
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies Sales Price in sales currency for Calculation Worksheet.';
                    }
                }
                field("Equipment (Separate)"; Rec."Equipment (Separate)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Equipment (Separate)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies total of additional configuration with separate calculation.';
                }
                field("Workshop (Separate)"; Rec."Workshop (Separate)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Workshop (Separate)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies total of Services with separate calculation.';
                }
                group(ShowTradeIns)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::"Trade-In") or (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::Purchase) or ShowOverAllowancePrice;
                    field(TradeIns; PurchaseTradeInAmt)
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        CaptionClass = GetReturnCaption();
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the amt.';

                        trigger OnDrillDown()
                        var
                            OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
                        begin
                            OverAllowanceMgt.DrillDownOnForecastFactbox(Rec."No.");
                        end;
                    }
                }
                field("Payment Amount"; PaymentAmt)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(PaymentAmountLbl, Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Payment amt.';
                }
                group(SalesCurrencyPaymentAmt)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = not ((Rec."Sales Currency" = '') and (Rec."Calculation Currency" = ''));
                    field("Payment Amount (SCC)"; PaymentAmtSCC)
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithSalesCurrencyCode(PaymentAmountLbl, Rec."No.");
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Payment amt. in sales currency.';
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        ShowOverAllowancePrice: Boolean;
        CalculatedUnitCosts: Decimal;
        DirectCosts: Decimal;
        PaymentAmt: Decimal;
        PaymentAmtSCC: Decimal;
        PurchaseTradeInAmt: Decimal;
        SalesPriceWithoutSeparately: Decimal;
        SalesPriceTotalDisplay: Decimal;
        TotalCostsAmountDisplay: Decimal;
        TotalMarginAmtDisplay: Decimal;
        TotalMarginPctDisplay: Decimal;
        UnitPriceInclDiscounts: Decimal;
        UnitPriceInclWorkshops: Decimal;
        AdditionalConfSeparateLbl: Label 'Additional Configuration (Separate)';
        CalculatedUnitCostsLbl: Label 'Calculated Unit Costs';
        CostsSeparateLbl: Label 'Costs (Separate)';
        PaymentAmountLbl: Label 'Payment Amount';
        PurchaseCostsLbl: Label 'Purchase Costs';
        SalesPriceTotalLbl: Label 'Sales Price Total';
        SalesPriceWithoutSeparateLbl: Label 'Sales Price (without Separate)';
        ServicesSeparateLbl: Label 'Services (Separate)';
        TotalCostsAmountLbl: Label 'Total Costs Amount';
        TotalMarginAmtLbl: Label 'Total Margin';
        TotalMarginPctLbl: Label 'Total Margin %';

    trigger OnAfterGetRecord()
    begin
        CalcUnitPrices();
        CurrPage.Update(false);
    end;

    local procedure CalcUnitPrices()
    begin
        CalculatedUnitCosts := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitCost();
        if Rec."Includes Sales Discount" then
            SalesPriceWithoutSeparately := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitPrice()
        else
            SalesPriceWithoutSeparately := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitCost();
        Rec.CalcFields(
            "Equipment (Separate)", "Workshop (Separate)", "Costs Sales Price (Sep.)",
            "Add. Conf. Cost (Sep.)", "Service Amount (Sep.)", "Cost Amount (Sep.)", "Over-Allowance Price");
        TotalCostsAmountDisplay :=
            CalculatedUnitCosts + Rec."Add. Conf. Cost (Sep.)" + Rec."Service Amount (Sep.)" + Rec."Cost Amount (Sep.)";
        SalesPriceTotalDisplay :=
            SalesPriceWithoutSeparately + Rec."Equipment (Separate)" + Rec."Workshop (Separate)" + Rec."Costs Sales Price (Sep.)";
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        TotalMarginPctDisplay :=
            CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage(TotalCostsAmountDisplay, SalesPriceTotalDisplay, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
        TotalMarginAmtDisplay := SalesPriceTotalDisplay - TotalCostsAmountDisplay;
        if Rec."Over-Allowance Price" <> 0 then begin
            ShowOverAllowancePrice := true;
            PurchaseTradeInAmt := CalcForecastMgt.CalculatePurchaseAmount(Rec, true) + Rec."Over-Allowance Price";
        end else begin
            ShowOverAllowancePrice := false;
            PurchaseTradeInAmt := CalcForecastMgt.CalculatePurchaseAmount(Rec, false);
        end;

        PaymentAmt := SalesPriceTotalDisplay - PurchaseTradeInAmt;
        PaymentAmtSCC := CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(Rec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", Rec."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", PaymentAmt);
    end;

    local procedure GetReturnCaption() Caption: Text
    var
        GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
        OveraAllowanceLbl: Label 'Trade-In/Purchases';
        PurchaseLbl: Label 'Purchases';
        TradeInLbl: Label 'Trade-Ins';
        CalculationCurrencySuffix: Text;
    begin
        if (Rec."Calculation Currency" <> '') and (Rec."Calculation Currency" <> GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code") then
            CalculationCurrencySuffix := StrSubstNo(' (%1)', Rec."Calculation Currency");

        case Rec."Return Type" of
            Rec."Return Type"::Purchase:
                Caption := PurchaseLbl;
            Rec."Return Type"::"Trade-In":
                exit(TradeInLbl + CalculationCurrencySuffix);
        end;
        Rec.CalcFields("Over-Allowance Price");
        if Rec."Over-Allowance Price" <> 0 then
            Caption := OveraAllowanceLbl;

        exit(Caption);
    end;
}
codeunit 5446021 "TSRD Calc. Sales For.-To-Doc"
{
    #region Global Procedure

    procedure ChooseOptionForDoc(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type"): Boolean
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesInvHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header";
        ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        IsHandled: Boolean;
        OrderErr: Label 'It is not possible to create a new Sales %1 because an %2 %3 already exists for the Configure Price Quote.', Comment = '%1 = DocTypeToCreate, %2= Existing Type, %3= Existing No';
        PostedSalesInvoiceLbl: Label 'Posted Sales Invoice';
        SalesConfirmQst: Label 'Sales %1 %2 for Configure Price Quote already exists. \Do you want to update?', Comment = '%1= Document Type, %2 Document No.';
    begin
        if CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No." = '' then
            exit;

        if SalesInvHeader.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.") then
            Error(OrderErr, DocTypeToCreate, PostedSalesInvoiceLbl, SalesInvHeader."No.");

        if not SalesHeader.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.") then
            exit;

        OnBeforeCheckForOrderType(CalcSalesForecast, SalesHeader, IsHandled);
        if not IsHandled then
            if SalesHeader."Document Type" in [DocTypeToCreate, SalesHeader."Document Type"::Invoice] then
                if SalesHeader."Document Type" <> SalesHeader."Document Type"::Quote then
                    Error(OrderErr, DocTypeToCreate, SalesHeader."Document Type", SalesHeader."No.");

        if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponseOrDefault(StrSubstNo(SalesConfirmQst, SalesHeader."Document Type", SalesHeader."No."), false) then
            Error('');
        SalesHeader.Delete(true);
        CreateDocFromSalesForecast(CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
        exit(true);
    end;

    internal procedure DeleteSalesDocument(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        DeleteQstErr: Label 'Delete %1 ∙ %2?', comment = '%1 Document No., %2 Vendor Name';
    begin
        if not SalesHeader.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.") then
            exit;
        if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponseOrDefault(StrSubstNo(DeleteQstErr, SalesHeader."No.", SalesHeader."Sell-to Customer Name"), true) then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.Delete(true);
    end;

    procedure CreateDocFromSalesForecast(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        CalcForecastArchiving: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Archiving";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
        ArchiveReason: Enum "TSRD Calc. Archive Reason";
    begin
        CheckConditionsForCreateSalesDoc(CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
        CreateSalesHeader(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
        CreateSalesLines(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
        CalculateSalesFixPrice(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast);
        InflationSurchargeMgt.InsertInflationSurchargeCommentsAfterLinesInserted(SalesHeader);
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateDocumentForOpportunity(CalcSalesForecast."Opportunity No.", SalesHeader);
        OnAfterCreateSalesDoc(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast);
        if DocTypeToCreate = "Sales Document Type"::Order then
            CalcForecastMgt.SetSalesCalculationStatus(SalesHeader, "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Won);
        OpenSalesDocumentPage(SalesHeader);
        if DocTypeToCreate = DocTypeToCreate::Quote then begin
            ArchiveReason := ArchiveReason::"Sales Quote";
            CalcForecastArchiving.ArchiveCalculation(CalcSalesForecast, ArchiveReason);
        end;
    end;

    local procedure OpenSalesDocumentPage(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
    var
        ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        PageManagement: Codeunit "Page Management";
        NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
        ShouldOpenPage: Boolean;
        DocCreatedMsg: Label 'Sales  %1 %2 has been created/updated! Do you want to open the document?', Comment = '%1= Sales Document Type, %2 is document no.';
    begin
        ShouldOpenPage := not NotificationManagement.ConfirmOpenNewDocumentIsEnabled();
        if not ShouldOpenPage then
            ShouldOpenPage := ConfirmManagement.GetResponseOrDefault(
                StrSubstNo(DocCreatedMsg, SalesHeader."Document Type", SalesHeader."No."),
                false
            );
        if ShouldOpenPage then
            PageManagement.PageRun(SalesHeader);
    end;

    #endregion Global Procedure

    #region Internal Procedure
    internal procedure UpdateSalesForecastBeforeDeleteDoc(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if not RunTrigger then
            exit;

        if SalesHeader.IsTemporary() then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Doc. No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        if CheckIfDocIsPartialPosting(SalesHeader) then begin
            CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type"::Invoice);
            CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. No.", GetPostedInvoiceNo(SalesHeader));
            exit;
        end;

        CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type"::Quote);
        CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. No.", '');
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateForecastAfterConvertQuote(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; NewSalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
        CalcSalesForecast2: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if SalesHeader.IsTemporary() then
            exit;

        CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Doc. No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        CalcSalesForecast.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcSalesForecast2.Get(CalcSalesForecast."No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
            CalcSalesForecast2."Sales Doc. Type" := NewSalesHeader."Document Type";
            CalcSalesForecast2."Sales Doc. No." := NewSalesHeader."No.";
            CalcSalesForecast2.ReleaseSalesForecast();
        until CalcSalesForecast.Next() = 0;
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateForecastAfterPostingRelatedInvoiceCompletely(DocumentType: Enum "Sales Document Type"; DocumentNo: Code[20]; NewDocumentNo: Code[20])
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
        CalcSalesForecast2: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if SalesHeader.Get(DocumentType, DocumentNo) then
            exit;

        CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Doc. No.", DocumentNo);
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        CalcSalesForecast.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcSalesForecast2.Get(CalcSalesForecast."No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
            CalcSalesForecast2."Sales Doc. No." := NewDocumentNo;
            CalcSalesForecast2.Modify();
        until CalcSalesForecast.Next() = 0;
    end;

    internal procedure SkipStatusForReturnLine(ReservationEntry: Record "Reservation Entry"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        if ReservationEntry."Source Subtype" <> ReservationEntry."Source Subtype"::"0" then
            exit;
        if not SalesLine.Get("Sales Document Type"::Quote, ReservationEntry."Source ID", ReservationEntry."Source Ref. No.") then
            exit;
        if SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast Return" then
            IsHandled := true;
    end;

    internal procedure SkipPriceCalcForForecast(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var Handled: Boolean)
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
    begin
        SalesHeader.SetAutoCalcFields("TSRD Sales Forecast Exists");
        if not SalesHeader.Get(SalesLine."Document Type", SalesLine."Document No.") then
            exit;
        if SalesHeader."TSRD Sales Forecast Exists" then
            Handled := true;
    end;

    #endregion Internal Procedure

    #region Local Procedures

    local procedure CheckConditionsForCreateSalesDoc(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        EmptyForecastLinesErr: Label 'You cannot create Sales %1 without valid %2.', Comment = '%1 = DocTypeToCreate, %2 is Configure Price Quote lines';
        NoCustomerOrContactWithTemplErr: Label 'Either Customer No. or Contact No. need to be filled in order to create Sales Quote.';
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", CalcSalesForecast."No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
        CalcForecast.SetFilter(Status, '<>%1', CalcSalesForecast.Status::Alternative);
        if (CalcSalesForecast."Customer No." = '') then
            if (CalcSalesForecast."Contact No." = '') then
                Error(NoCustomerOrContactWithTemplErr);
        if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            Error(EmptyForecastLinesErr, DocTypeToCreate, CalcForecast.TableCaption());

        GetCalcForecast(CalcForecast);
        CheckMandatoryFieldForWorkshops(CalcForecast);
        CheckMandatoryFieldForSeparateCosts(CalcForecast);
    end;

    internal procedure CheckIfDocIsPartialPosting(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"): Boolean
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesLine.SetFilter("Quantity Invoiced", '<>%1', 0);
        exit(not SalesLine.IsEmpty());
    end;

    local procedure GetPostedInvoiceNo(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"): Code[20]
    var
        SalesInvoiceHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header";
    begin
        SalesHeader.SetCurrentKey("Posting Date");
        SalesInvoiceHeader.SetRange("Order No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesInvoiceHeader.FindLast();
        exit(SalesInvoiceHeader."No.");
    end;

    local procedure GetCalcForecast(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    begin
        CalcForecast.FindSet();
        repeat
            CheckPurchDiscounts(CalcForecast."No.");
        until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CheckPurchDiscounts(ForecastNo: Code[20])
    var
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", ForecastNo);
        if CalcPurchaseDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcForecastMgt.SetPurchDiscountStatus(CalcPurchaseDiscounts, WorkDate());
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange(Status, CalcPurchaseDiscounts.Status::Expired);
        if CalcPurchaseDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcForecastMgt.DeleteExpiredPurchaseDiscounts(CalcPurchaseDiscounts, true);
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange(Status);
        CalcForecastMgt.CalculateForecastPrice(ForecastNo);
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesHeader(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
    begin
        Clear(SalesHeader);
        SalesHeader."No." := CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.";
        SalesHeader.Validate("Document Type", DocTypeToCreate);
        SalesHeader.Validate("TSRD Sales Forecast No.", CalcSalesForecast."No.");
        SalesHeader.Validate("TSRD Sales Fore. Version No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
        SalesHeader.Insert(true);
        SalesHeader.SetHideValidationDialog(true);
        if CalcSalesForecast."Sales Order Type" <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("TSR Sales Order Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Order Type");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Customer No." <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Sell-to Customer No.", CalcSalesForecast."Customer No.");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Contact No." <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Sell-to Contact No.", CalcSalesForecast."Contact No.");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Responsibility Center" <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Responsibility Center", CalcSalesForecast."Responsibility Center");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Person in Charge" <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("TSR Person In Charge", CalcSalesForecast."Person in Charge");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Valid Until" <> 0D then
            SalesHeader."Quote Valid Until Date" := CalcSalesForecast."Valid Until";
        TransferBillToDetails(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast);
        if CalcSalesForecast.Salesperson <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Salesperson Code", CalcSalesForecast.Salesperson);
        SalesHeader.SetHideValidationDialog(false);
        SetCurrencyCodeFromCalcForecast(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate");
        if DocTypeToCreate = DocTypeToCreate::Order then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Posting Date", WorkDate());
        SalesHeader.Modify(true);
    end;

    local procedure TransferBillToDetails(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    begin
        if (CalcSalesForecast."Bill-to Customer No." = '') then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.Validate("Bill-to Customer No.", CalcSalesForecast."Bill-to Customer No.");
        SalesHeader."Bill-to Name" := CalcSalesForecast."Bill-to Name";
    end;

    local procedure CalculateSalesFixPrice(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        FixPrice: Record "TSRD Fix Price";
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
        FAAmount: Decimal;
        PartsAmount: Decimal;
    begin
        if not CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.SetStatus(SalesHeader.Status::Released);
        SalesHeader.Modify(true);
        FixPrice.InitRecord("TSRD Fix Price Provider"::"Sales Line",
                            FixPriceMgt.GetFixPriceDocumentType(SalesHeader."Document Type"), SalesHeader."No.",
                            0, SalesHeader."No.");
        PartsAmount := GetLineAmount(SalesLine, SalesHeader, SalesLine.Type::Item);
        FAAmount := GetLineAmount(SalesLine, SalesHeader, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset");
        FixPrice."Fix Price Parts" := PartsAmount;
        FixPrice."Total Price Parts" := PartsAmount;
        FixPrice."Fix Price Fixed Asset" := FAAmount;
        FixPrice."Total Price Fixed Asset" := FAAmount;
        FixPrice."Total Price Amount" := PartsAmount + FAAmount;
        FixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" := PartsAmount + FAAmount;
        CalcSalesForecast.CalcFields("Total Sales Price (Fix Price)");
        FixPrice."Total Sales Price" := CalcSalesForecast."Total Sales Price (Fix Price)";
        FixPrice.Difference := FixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" - FixPrice."Total Sales Price";
        FixPriceMgt.CalculateFixPrice(FixPrice);
    end;

    local procedure GetLineAmount(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; Type: Enum "Sales Line Type"): Decimal
    begin
        SalesLine.Reset();
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        SalesLine.SetRange(Type, Type);
        SalesLine.CalcSums("Line Amount");
        exit(SalesLine."Line Amount");
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLines(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
    var
        FixedAsset: Record "Fixed Asset";
        Item: Record Item;
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        MainSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        MachineCommSalesMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Comm. Sales Mgt";
        ServiceItemDataMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Item Data mgt";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
        AddEmptyLine: Boolean;
        i: Integer;
        LineNo: Integer;
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", CalcSalesForecast."No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
        CalcForecast.SetFilter(Status, '<>%1', CalcSalesForecast.Status::Alternative);
        CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Sort No.");
        if CalcForecast.FindSet() then
            repeat
                for i := 1 to CalcForecast.Quantity do begin
                    if AddEmptyLine then
                        CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine)
                    else
                        AddEmptyLine := true;
                    CalcForecast.CalcFields("Equipment (Separate)");
                    PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
                    if CalcForecast."Service Item No." <> '' then
                        ServiceMgt.UpdateServiceItem(CalcForecast);
                    GetTypeFromCalcForecast(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
                    case SalesLine.Type of
                        SalesLine.Type::Item:
                            begin
                                GetItemFromCalcForecast(Item, CalcForecast);
                                SalesLine.Validate("No.", Item."No.");
                            end;
                        SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset":
                            begin
                                GetFAFromCalcForecast(FixedAsset, CalcForecast);
                                SalesLine.Validate("No.", FixedAsset."No.");
                            end;
                    end;
                    SalesLine.Insert(true);
                    SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
                    if CalcForecast."Service Item No." <> '' then begin
                        SalesLine.TSRMSetSkipInsertServiceItemEquipment(CheckIfEquipmentExistOnForecast(CalcForecast."No."));
                        SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
                    end;
                    if SalesLine.Type = SalesLine.Type::Item then begin
                        SalesLine.GetUnitCost();
                        SetVATPostingGroups(SalesLine, CalcForecast."No.");
                    end;
                    SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Fore. Serv. Item" := true;
                    SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast No." := CalcForecast."No.";
                    SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
                    CheckOptionOnForecastAndGetMachinePrice(CalcSalesForecast, CalcForecast, SalesLine);
                    SalesLine.Validate("Location Code", CalcForecast."Location Code");
                    CalcForecastMgt.SalesLineAssignBinCode(SalesLine, CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
                    OnBeforeModifySalesLine(SalesLine);
                    SalesLine.Modify(true);
                    MainSalesLine := SalesLine;
                    ServiceItemDataMgt.FillServiceItemData(SalesLine);
                    MachineCommSalesMgt.CreateOrUpdateSalesLink(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
                    CreateSalesLinesFromStandardEquipment(CalcForecast."No.", SalesHeader, SalesLine, MainSalesLine);
                    CreateSalesLinesExtText(SalesLine, SalesHeader, LineNo);
                    CreateSalesLinesFromConfiguration(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine);
                    CreateSalesLinesFromSalesDiscounts(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine);
                    CreateSalesLinesFromEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine);
                    CreateSalesLinesFromWorkshop(CalcForecast, SalesHeader);
                    CreateSalesLinesFromCosts(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine);
                    if DocTypeToCreate = DocTypeToCreate::Quote then
                        CreateSalesLinesFromTradeInPurch(CalcForecast."No.", SalesHeader, CalcForecast);
                end;
            until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
        CalcSalesForecast.Find();
        CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No." := SalesHeader."No.";
        CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type" := SalesHeader."Document Type";
        CalcSalesForecast.Modify();
    end;

    local procedure CheckIfEquipmentExistOnForecast(CalcForecastNo: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecastNo);
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Linked to Service Item", true);
        if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit(true);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecastNo);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Linked to Service Item", true);
        exit(not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty());
    end;

    local procedure SetFixedPriceOnLine(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        if not CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then
            exit;
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesLine.SetFilter(Type, '<>%1', SalesLine.Type::" ");
        SalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        SalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);

        if not SalesLine.IsEmpty() then
            SalesLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fixed Price", true);
    end;

    local procedure CheckOptionOnForecastAndGetMachinePrice(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
                                                            CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
                                                            var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
    var
        Currency: Record Currency;
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcForecast.CalcFields("Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount", "Total Costs", "Configuration Sales Price");
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        Currency.Initialize(CalcForecast."Sales Currency");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then begin
            if SetFixPriceFields(SalesLine, CalcForecast) then begin
                SalesLine."Line Discount %" := 0;
                if CalcForecast."Service Item In Stock As" = CalcForecast."Service Item In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset" then
                    CalculateFixPriceUnitPrice(CalcForecast, SalesLine, CalcForecast."FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)")
                else
                    CalculateFixPriceUnitPrice(CalcForecast, SalesLine, CalcForecast."Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)");
            end else begin
                SalesLine.Validate(
                    "Unit Price",
                    CalcForecast."Sales Price" - CalcForecast."Equipment (Separate)" - CalcForecast."Workshop (Separate)" - CalcForecast."Costs Sales Price (Sep.)");
                ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
            end;
            exit;
        end;
        case true of
            CalcForecast."Show List Prices":
                begin
                    FilterCalcConfigurationOptions(CalcForecast, CalcConfiguration);
                    CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Line Amount (List Price)");
                    SalesLine.Validate(
                        "Unit Price",
                        CalcForecast.GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() +
                        CalcForecast."Workshop Amount" +
                        CalcForecast."Equipment Price" +
                        CalcForecast."Total Costs" +
                        CalcConfiguration.GetLineAmountForSalesPriceCalc()
                    );
                end;
            CalcForecast."Show calculated Sales Prices":
                begin
                    FilterCalcConfigurationOptions(CalcForecast, CalcConfiguration);
                    CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Calculated Sales Amount");
                    SalesLine.Validate(
                        "Unit Price",
                        CalcForecast."Calculated Machine Sales Price" +
                        CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" +
                        Round(
                            CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(
                                CalcForecast."Equipment Price" +
                                CalcForecast."Workshop Amount" +
                                CalcForecast."Total Costs",
                                CalcForecast."Margin %",
                                SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"
                            ),
                            Currency."Amount Rounding Precision"
                        )
                    );
                end;
            else
                SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CheckIfSalesDiscountsAreDefinedAndCalculateUnitPrice(CalcForecast));
        end;
        ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
    end;

    local procedure FilterCalcConfigurationOptions(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
                                                   var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration")
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment);
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Item Charge", '');
    end;

    local procedure CalculateFixPriceUnitPrice(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; FixPriceAmount: Decimal)
    var
        Currency: Record Currency;
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice: Decimal;
        SalesLineUnitPrice: Decimal;
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        Currency.Initialize(CalcForecast."Sales Currency");
        case true of
            CalcForecast."Show List Prices":
                begin
                    SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice := CalcForecast.GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() +
                                                  CalcForecast."Equipment Price" +
                                                  CalcForecast."Total Costs" +
                                                  CalcForecast."Workshop Amount";
                    SalesLineUnitPrice := Round(FixPriceAmount - CalculateItemConfigurationDirectUnitCost(CalcForecast), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
                    SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice);
                    CalculateFixPriceLineDiscounts(SalesLine,
                                                   SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice,
                                                   SalesLineUnitPrice);
                end;
            CalcForecast."Show calculated Sales Prices":
                begin
                    SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice := CalcForecast."Calculated Machine Sales Price" +
                                                  Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcForecast."Equipment Price" + CalcForecast."Total Costs" + CalcForecast."Workshop Amount",
                                                                                                CalcForecast."Margin %",
                                                                                                SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"),
                                                                                                Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
                    SalesLineUnitPrice := Round(FixPriceAmount - CalculateItemConfigurationCalculatedSalesPrice(CalcForecast), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
                    SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice);
                    CalculateFixPriceLineDiscounts(SalesLine,
                                                   SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice,
                                                   SalesLineUnitPrice);
                end;
            else begin
                SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice := CheckIfSalesDiscountsAreDefinedAndCalculateUnitPrice(CalcForecast);
                SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice);
                CalculateFixPriceLineDiscounts(SalesLine, SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice, FixPriceAmount);
            end;
        end;
    end;

    local procedure CalculateFixPriceLineDiscounts(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice: Decimal; SalesLineUnitPrice: Decimal)
    begin
        SalesLine."TSRD Fixed Price" := true;
        SalesLine."Line Discount Calculation" := SalesLine."Line Discount Calculation"::Amount;
        SalesLine.Validate("Line Discount Amount", SalesLineOriginalUnitPrice - SalesLineUnitPrice);
        Clear(SalesLine."TSRD Fixed Price");
    end;

    local procedure CalculateItemConfigurationDirectUnitCost(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"): Decimal
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        FilterCalcConfiguration(CalcConfiguration, CalcForecast);
        CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)");
        exit(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(CalcForecast."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", CalcForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)"));
    end;

    local procedure CalculateItemConfigurationCalculatedSalesPrice(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"): Decimal
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        FilterCalcConfiguration(CalcConfiguration, CalcForecast);
        CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Calculated Sales Price");
        exit(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(CalcForecast."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", CalcForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price"));
    end;

    local procedure FilterCalcConfiguration(var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"; CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    var
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        if CheckIfItemChargeDefined(CalcConfiguration) then
            CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Type, '%1|%2', CalcConfiguration.Type::Item, CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment)
        else
            CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, CalcConfiguration.Type::Item);
    end;

    local procedure CheckIfItemChargeDefined(var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"): Boolean
    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.GetRecordOnce();
        if SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Charge for Equipment" <> '' then
            exit(true);
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Item Charge", '=%1', '');
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment);
        if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Item Charge");
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type);
        exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CheckIfSalesDiscountsAreDefinedAndCalculateUnitPrice(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"): Decimal
    var
        SalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
    begin
        SalesDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        if not SalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            exit(CalcForecast.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() + CalcForecast."Equipment Price" + CalcForecast."Workshop Amount" + CalcForecast."Total Costs");
        exit(CalcForecast."Sales Price");
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromStandardEquipment(
        CalcForecastNo: Code[20];
        var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        MainSalesLine: Record "Sales Line"
    )
    var
        StandardEquipment: Record "TSRD Standard Equipment";
    begin
        StandardEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecastNo);
        StandardEquipment.SetRange("Print In Sales Doc.", true);
        if StandardEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        StandardEquipment.FindSet();
        repeat
            PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
            SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
            SalesLine.Description := StandardEquipment.Description;
            SalesLine."TSRM Equipment Line" := true;
            SalesLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := StandardEquipment.Code;
            SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := MainSalesLine."Line No.";
            SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier" := MainSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier";
            SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set" := MainSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set";
            SalesLine.Insert();
        until StandardEquipment.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesExtText(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var LineNo: Integer)
    var
        LastInsertedSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        TransferExtendedText: Codeunit "Transfer Extended Text";
    begin
        if not TransferExtendedText.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(SalesLine, false, SalesHeader) then
            exit;
        TransferExtendedText.InsertSalesExtTextRetLast(SalesLine, LastInsertedSalesLine);
        LineNo := LastInsertedSalesLine."Line No.";
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromConfiguration(
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line"
    )
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        CreateEmptyLine: Boolean;
        LinesSort: Enum "TSRD Configuration Sort Order";
        OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
        CurrentCategoryDescription: Text;
    begin
        LinesSort := CalcForecastMgt.GetCalcConfigSortOrderSales(CalcConfiguration);
        CreateEmptyLine := LinesSort = "TSRD Configuration Sort Order"::"Category Description";
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Show In Sales Documents", true);
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
        CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcConfiguration.TableCaption(), true, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration);
        if LinesSort = "TSRD Configuration Sort Order"::"Line No." then
            CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
        ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
        CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
        repeat
            if CurrentCategoryDescription <> CalcConfiguration."Category Description" then begin
                CurrentCategoryDescription := CalcConfiguration."Category Description";
                CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcConfiguration."Category Description", CreateEmptyLine, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration);
            end;

            CreateConfigSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcConfiguration, CalcForecast, SalesLineOriginal, 0);

            CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(CalcConfiguration, SalesLine);

            if CalcConfiguration."Show Comment Lines Sales Docs" then
                CreateSalesLinesFromSalesComments(SalesLine);

            if CalcConfiguration."Show List Price" then begin
                PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
                CreateConfigListPriceSalesLine(SalesLine, CalcConfiguration."List Price");
            end;
        until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateConfigListPriceSalesLine(SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; CalcConfListPrice: Decimal)
    var
        ListPriceLbl: Label 'List Price:';
    begin
        SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
        SalesLine.Description := ListPriceLbl;
        SalesLine."Description 2" := Format(CalcConfListPrice, 0, 0);
        SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration;
        SalesLine.Insert(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateConfigSalesLine(
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
        LineNo: Integer
    )
    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        ItemChargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Item Charge Mgt";
    begin
        PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo);
        SalesHeader.Get(SalesLine."Document Type", SalesLine."Document No.");
        ItemChargeMgt.CheckNotAutomaticAllocation(CalcConfiguration."Item Charge");
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration;
        if (not CalcForecast."Show List Prices" or (CalcConfiguration."List Price" = 0)) and (not CalcForecast."Show calculated Sales Prices") then begin
            CalcForecastMgt.GetTranslatedEquipmentDescription(CalcConfiguration, SalesHeader."Language Code");
            InsertConfigurationAsCommentLine(SalesLine, CalcConfiguration);
            LinkToSourceRec(
                SalesLine,
                SalesLineOriginal."Line No.",
                CalcForecast."No.",
                Database::"TSRD Calc. Configuration",
                CalcConfiguration."Line No."
            );
            SalesLine.Modify();
            exit;
        end;
        SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Vendor Item No.", CalcConfiguration."No.");

        if CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Item then begin
            SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
            SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcConfiguration."No.");
            SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration;
            SetVATPostingGroups(SalesLine, CalcForecast."No.");
        end;

        if (CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment) and
           (CalcConfiguration."Item Charge" <> '') then begin
            SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::"Charge (Item)");
            SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcConfiguration."Item Charge");
            SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration;
            SalesLine.Validate(Description, CalcConfiguration.Description);
            SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Vendor Item No.", CalcConfiguration."No.");
        end;
        CalcForecastMgt.GetTranslatedEquipmentDescription(CalcConfiguration, SalesHeader."Language Code");
        SalesLine.Description := CalcConfiguration.GetCommentLineForm();

        SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;

        if SalesLine.Type <> SalesLine.Type::" " then begin
            SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, CalcConfiguration.Quantity);
            case
                true of
                CalcForecast."Show calculated Sales Prices":
                    SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price");
                CalcForecast."Show List Prices":
                    begin
                        SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcConfiguration."List Price");
                        SalesLine.Validate("Line Discount %", CalcConfiguration."Discount % (List Price)");
                    end;
            end;
        end;
        LinkToSourceRec(
            SalesLine,
            SalesLineOriginal."Line No.",
            CalcForecast."No.",
            Database::"TSRD Calc. Configuration",
            CalcConfiguration."Line No."
        );
        SalesLine.Insert(true);

        if (CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment) and
           (CalcConfiguration."Item Charge" <> '') then begin
            ItemChargeMgt.CheckAndAssignItemChargeLines(SalesLine);
            ItemChargeMgt.AssignItemCharge(SalesLineOriginal, SalesLine);
        end;
        if SalesLine.Type in [SalesLine.Type::Item, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset"] then
            SetFixPriceFields(SalesLine, CalcForecast)
        else
            SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
        OnBeforeExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(CalcForecast, CalcConfiguration, SalesHeader, SalesLine);
        ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
        SalesLine.Modify(true);
    end;

    local procedure LinkToSourceRec(
        var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        AttachedEquipmentToLineNo: Integer;
        SourceRecNo: Code[20];
        SourceTable: Integer;
        SourceLineNo: Integer
    )
    begin
        SalesLine."TSRM Attached Equ. to Line No." := AttachedEquipmentToLineNo;
        SalesLine."TSRM Source Record No." := SourceRecNo;
        SalesLine."TSRM Source Table" := SourceTable;
        SalesLine."TSRM Source Line No." := SourceLineNo;
    end;

    local procedure InsertConfigurationAsCommentLine(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration")
    begin
        SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
        SalesLine.Description := CalcConfiguration.GetCommentLineForm();
        if CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment then
            SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Vendor Item No.", CalcConfiguration."No.");
        SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
        SalesLine.Insert(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromEquipment(
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line"
    )
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
        OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", 0);
        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
        CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment.TableCaption(), true, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment");
        ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);

        CalcExternalEquipment.FindSet();
        repeat
            CreateSalesLineFromEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment, SalesLineOriginal, 0);
            CreateSalesLinesFromAttachedExtEquipmentComments(SalesHeader, CalcForecast."No.", CalcExternalEquipment."Line No.", SalesLine);
        until CalcExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLineFromEquipment(
        var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        var CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
        SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
        LineNo: Integer
    )
    begin
        PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo);
        SalesLine.Insert(true);
        SalesLine.SetSkipInflationSurcharge(true);
        SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
        SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.GetCommentLineForm();
        if ShouldPostExternalEquipmentAsOwnSalesLine(CalcExternalEquipment) then
            CreateSalesLineFromSeparateEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment);
        LinkToSourceRec(
            SalesLine,
            SalesLineOriginal."Line No.",
            CalcForecast."No.",
            Database::"TSRD Calc. External Equipment",
            CalcExternalEquipment."Line No."
        );
        SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment";
        SetFixPriceAllowed(CalcForecast, SalesLine);
        ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
        SalesLine.Modify(true);
        CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(
            CalcExternalEquipment."Forecast No.",
            CalcExternalEquipment."Line No.",
            "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type"::"External Equipment",
            SalesLine
        );
        OnAfterCreateSalesLineFromEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment);
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLineFromSeparateEquipment(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment")
    var
        Item: Record Item;
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
        UnitPrice: Decimal;
    begin
        case CalcExternalEquipment.Type of
            CalcExternalEquipment.Type::Item:
                begin
                    if CalcExternalEquipment."No." = '' then
                        exit;
                    SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
                    SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcExternalEquipment."No.");
                    SetServiceItemNoFromPurchLine(SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment);
                    SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
                    SetVATPostingGroups(SalesLine, CalcForecast."No.");
                    SalesLine.Validate("Unit of Measure Code", CalcExternalEquipment."Unit of Measure");
                    SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, CalcExternalEquipment.Quantity);
                    UnitPrice := CalcExternalEquipment."Line Amount" / CalcExternalEquipment.Quantity;
                    if CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" = CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                        UnitPrice := CalcExternalEquipment."Sales Price" / CalcExternalEquipment.Quantity;
                    SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", UnitPrice);
                    InflationSurchargeMgt.IncludeInflationSurchargeInUnitPrice(SalesLine);
                    Item.Get(CalcExternalEquipment."No.");
                    if Item.Description <> CalcExternalEquipment.Description then
                        SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.Description;
                end;
            CalcExternalEquipment.Type::"Service Item":
                begin
                    if CalcExternalEquipment."No." = '' then
                        exit;
                    SalesLine.SetSkipServiceItemDocData(true);
                    ServiceItem.Get(CalcExternalEquipment."No.");
                    case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
                        ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Current Asset":
                            begin
                                SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
                                SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", ServiceItem."No.");
                            end;
                        ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
                            begin
                                SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset");
                                SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", ServiceItem."No.");
                            end;
                    end;
                    SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
                    UnitPrice := CalcExternalEquipment."Line Amount";
                    if CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" = CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                        UnitPrice := CalcExternalEquipment."Sales Price";
                    SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", UnitPrice);
                    if ServiceItem.Description <> CalcExternalEquipment.Description then
                        SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.Description;
                end;
        end;
    end;

    local procedure SetServiceItemNoFromPurchLine(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment")
    var
        PurchaseLine: Record "Purchase Line";
    begin
        if not PurchaseLine.Get(
            CalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Document Type",
            CalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Document No.",
            CalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Document Line No."
        )
        then
            exit;
        if PurchaseLine.Type <> PurchaseLine.Type::Item then
            exit;
        if SalesLine."TSRM Service Item No." <> '' then
            exit;
        if SalesLine."No." <> PurchaseLine."No." then
            exit;
        if PurchaseLine."TSRM Service Item No." <> '' then
            SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", PurchaseLine."TSRM Service Item No.");
    end;

    local procedure SetFixPriceAllowed(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
    begin
        if SalesLine.Type in [SalesLine.Type::Item, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset"] then
            SetFixPriceFields(SalesLine, CalcForecast)
        else
            SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
