    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromForecastComments(
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        ForecastNo: Code[20];
        LineNo: Integer;
        CommentType: Enum "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type";
        SalesLineNo: Integer
    )
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        SaleForecastComment: Record "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment";
    begin
        if not FilterSaleForecastComment(SaleForecastComment,
                                         ForecastNo,
                                         LineNo,
                                         CommentType)
        then
            exit;

        SaleForecastComment.FindSet();
        repeat
            PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
            SalesLine.Description := SaleForecastComment.Comment;
            SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := SalesLineNo;
            SalesLine.Insert(true);
        until SaleForecastComment.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromAttachedExtEquipmentComments(
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        ForecastNo: Code[20];
        ExtEquipmentLineNo: Integer;
        var RecSalesLine: Record "Sales Line"
    )
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", ForecastNo);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", ExtEquipmentLineNo);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
        if RecSalesLine.TSRMGetSkipInsertServiceItemEquipment() then
            CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached Equipment", false);
        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcExternalEquipment.FindSet();
        repeat
            PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
            SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.Description;
            SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := RecSalesLine."Line No.";
            SalesLine."TSRD Service Item Data" := CalcExternalEquipment."Service Item Doc. Data Comment";
            SalesLine.Insert(true);
        until CalcExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromAttachedExtEquipmentComments(
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        ForecastNo: Code[20];
        ExtEquipmentLineNo: Integer;
        var RecSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        var LineNo: Integer;
        LineSpacing: Integer
    )
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", ForecastNo);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", ExtEquipmentLineNo);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
        if RecSalesLine.TSRMGetSkipInsertServiceItemEquipment() then
            CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached Equipment", false);
        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcExternalEquipment.FindSet();
        repeat
            PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo);
            SalesLine.Description := CalcExternalEquipment.Description;
            SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := RecSalesLine."Line No.";
            SalesLine."TSRD Service Item Data" := CalcExternalEquipment."Service Item Doc. Data Comment";
            SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment";
            SalesLine.Insert(true);
            LineNo += LineSpacing;
        until CalcExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure ShouldPostExternalEquipmentAsOwnSalesLine(CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment"): Boolean
    begin
        if CalcExternalEquipment.Type = CalcExternalEquipment.Type::Comment then
            exit(false);
        exit(
            (CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" = CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) or
            (CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" = CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::Attach) or
            (CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" = CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::CapService) or
            (CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" = CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::" "));
    end;

    local procedure CheckMandatoryFieldForSeparateCosts(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    var
        CalcCost: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost";
        CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
    begin
        CalcCost.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        CalcCost.SetRange("Charging Method", CalcCost."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately);
        if CalcCost.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcCost.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcCostType.Get(CalcCost."Cost Type");
            CalcCostType.TestField("Sales Item Charge");
        until CalcCost.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromCosts(
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line")
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcCost: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost";
        CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
        ItemChargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Item Charge Mgt";
        OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
        CostsHeaderLineTxt: Label 'Costs';
    begin
        CalcCost.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        CalcCost.SetRange("Charging Method", CalcCost."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately);
        if CalcCost.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
        CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CostsHeaderLineTxt, true);
        ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);

        CalcCost.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcCostType.Get(CalcCost."Cost Type");
            CalcCostType.TestField("Sales Item Charge");
            PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
            SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::"Charge (Item)");
            SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcCostType."Sales Item Charge");
            SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
            SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcCost."Sales Price");
            ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
            SalesLine.Validate("Location Code", CalcForecast."Location Code");
            if CalcCost.Description <> '' then
                SalesLine.Description := CalcCost.Description;
            SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
            LinkToSourceRec(
                SalesLine,
                SalesLineOriginal."Line No.",
                CalcForecast."No.",
                Database::"TSRD Calc. Cost",
                CalcCost."Line No.");
            SalesLine.Insert(true);
            if SalesLineOriginal.Type = SalesLineOriginal.Type::Item then begin
                ItemChargeMgt.CheckAndAssignItemChargeLines(SalesLine);
                ItemChargeMgt.AssignItemCharge(SalesLineOriginal, SalesLine);
            end;
        until CalcCost.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromWorkshop(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
                                                 SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
        OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
    begin
        CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
        if CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
        CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcWorkshop.TableCaption(), true);
        ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);

        CalcWorkshop.FindSet();
        repeat
            PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
            SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
            SalesLine.Description := CalcWorkshop.Description;
            if (CalcWorkshop."Charging Method" = CalcWorkshop."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and CalcWorkshop."Show in Sales Document" and (CalcWorkshop."Standard Service Code" <> '') then begin
                SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::Resource;
                SalesLine.Validate("No.", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Resource No. Workshop");
                SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
                SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", CalcWorkshop."Sales Price");
                if CalcWorkshop.Description <> '' then
                    SalesLine.Description := CalcWorkshop.Description;
                ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
            end;
            SalesLine.Insert(true);
            CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(CalcWorkshop."Forecast No.", CalcWorkshop."Line No.", "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type"::Workshops, SalesLine);
        until CalcWorkshop.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromTradeInPurch(CalcForecastNo: Code[20];
                                                     SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
                                                     CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
        InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
        OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
        ConfigurationHeaderLineTxt: Label 'Return';
    begin
        CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecastNo);
        if CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
        CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, ConfigurationHeaderLineTxt, true);
        ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);

        SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast Return" := true;
        SalesLine.Modify();
        CalcTradeInPurch.FindSet();
        repeat
            PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
            SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast Return" := true;
            case CalcTradeInPurch.Type of
                "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch Type"::" ":
                    SalesLine.Validate(Type, "Sales Line Type"::" ");
                "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch Type"::Item:
                    begin
                        SalesLine.Validate(Type, "Sales Line Type"::Item);
                        SalesLine.Validate("No.", CalcTradeInPurch."No.");
                        SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
                        SetVATPostingGroups(SalesLine, CalcForecastNo);
                        SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, CalcTradeInPurch.Quantity);
                        SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", -Abs(CalcTradeInPurch."Unit Price"));
                        ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
                        InflationSurchargeMgt.IncludeInflationSurchargeInUnitPrice(SalesLine);
                        SalesLine.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", CalcTradeInPurch."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
                    end;
                "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch Type"::"Service Item":
                    begin
                        ServiceItem.Get(CalcTradeInPurch."No.");
                        case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
                            "TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
                                SalesLine.Validate(Type, "Sales Line Type"::"Fixed Asset");
                            else
                                SalesLine.Validate(Type, "Sales Line Type"::Item);
                        end;
                        SalesLine.Validate("TSRM Service Item No.", CalcTradeInPurch."No.");
                        SalesLine."TSR Skip Automatic Item Charge" := true;
                        SalesLine.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", CalcTradeInPurch."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
                        SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", -Abs(CalcTradeInPurch."Unit Price"));
                        ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
                    end;
            end;
            SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast Return" := true;
            SalesLine.Description := CalcTradeInPurch.Description;
            if not SalesLine.Insert(true) then
                SalesLine.Modify(true);
            SetCalcForecastReturnToAttachedLines(SalesLine);
        until CalcTradeInPurch.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure SetCalcForecastReturnToAttachedLines(ReturnSalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
    var
        AttachedSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        AttachedSalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", ReturnSalesLine."Document Type");
        AttachedSalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", ReturnSalesLine."Document No.");
        AttachedSalesLine.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", ReturnSalesLine."Line No.");
        AttachedSalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Calc. Forecast Return", false);
        if not AttachedSalesLine.IsEmpty() then
            AttachedSalesLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Calc. Forecast Return", true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromSalesDiscounts(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line")
    var
        ItemCharge: Record "Item Charge";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcDiscount: Record "TSRD Calc. Discount";
        CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
        ItemChargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Item Charge Mgt";
        MasterTranslMgt: Codeunit "TSR Master Transl. Mgt";
        OriginalLanguageId: Integer;
        SalesDiscountsHeaderLineTxt: Label 'Sales Discounts';
    begin
        CalcSalesDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        if CalcSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader, OriginalLanguageId);
        CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, SalesDiscountsHeaderLineTxt, true);
        ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
        CalcSalesDiscounts.FindSet();
        repeat
            GetItemChargeFromSalesDiscountLine(ItemCharge, CalcSalesDiscounts);
            ItemChargeMgt.CheckNotAutomaticAllocation(ItemCharge."No.");
            PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
            SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::"Charge (Item)");
            SalesLine.Validate("No.", ItemCharge."No.");
            SalesLine.Validate(Quantity, 1);
            SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", -CalcSalesDiscounts."Discount Amount");
            ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(SalesLine, CalcForecast);
            SalesLine.Validate("Location Code", CalcForecast."Location Code");
            CalcDiscount.Get(CalcSalesDiscounts."Discount Type");
            if CalcSalesDiscounts.DescriptionText <> CalcDiscount.Description then
                SalesLine.Description := CalcSalesDiscounts.DescriptionText;
            if SalesLine.Description = CalcDiscount.Description then
                MasterTranslMgt.GetMasterDataTranslation(
                    Database::"Item Charge",
                    ItemCharge.SystemId,
                    ItemCharge.FieldNo(Description),
                    SalesHeader."Language Code",
                    SalesLine.Description);
            SalesLine.Insert(true);
            if SalesLineOriginal.Type = SalesLineOriginal.Type::Item then begin
                ItemChargeMgt.CheckAndAssignItemChargeLines(SalesLine);
                ItemChargeMgt.AssignItemCharge(SalesLineOriginal, SalesLine);
            end;
        until CalcSalesDiscounts.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        HeaderText: Text;
        CreateEmptyLine: Boolean;
        CommentType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"
    )
    begin
        if not CreateEmptyLine then
            exit;

        CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
        SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := CommentType;
        SalesLine.Modify();

        CreateHeadLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, HeaderText, false);
        SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := CommentType;
        SalesLine.Modify();
    end;

    local procedure CreateHeadLine(
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        HeaderText: Text;
        CreateEmptyLine: Boolean
    )
    begin
        if CreateEmptyLine then
            CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);

        PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
        SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
        SalesLine.Description := CopyStr(HeaderText, 1, MaxStrLen(SalesLine.Description));
        SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
        SalesLine."TSR Bold" := true;
        SalesLine.Insert();
    end;

    local procedure CreateEmptyHeaderLine(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
    begin
        PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine);
        SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
        SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
        SalesLine.Insert();
    end;

    local procedure PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
    begin
        Clear(SalesLine);
        SalesLine.Init();
        SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesLine."Line No." := GetNewSalesLineNo(SalesHeader);
    end;

    local procedure PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; LineNo: Integer)
    begin
        Clear(SalesLine);
        SalesLine.Init();
        SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        if LineNo = 0 then
            SalesLine."Line No." := GetNewSalesLineNo(SalesHeader)
        else
            SalesLine."Line No." := LineNo;
    end;

    local procedure GetNewSalesLineNo(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"): Integer
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        if SalesLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(10000);
        SalesLine.FindLast();
        exit(SalesLine."Line No." + 10000);
    end;

    local procedure GetItemFromCalcForecast(var Item: Record Item; var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
    begin
        if CalcForecast."Service Item No." <> '' then begin
            ServiceItem.Get(CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
            if Item.Get(ServiceItem."Item No.") then
                exit;
        end;
        Clear(Item);
        Item.SetRange("Manufacturer Code", CalcForecast."Manufacturer Code");
        Item.SetRange("TSRM Category Code", CalcForecast."Category Code");
        Item.SetRange("TSRM Subcategory Code", CalcForecast."Subcategory Code");
        Item.SetRange("TSRM Series Code", CalcForecast."Series Code");
        Item.SetRange("TSRM Model Code", CalcForecast."Model Code");
        if Item.IsEmpty() then
            Item.Get(CreateNewItem(CalcForecast))
        else
            Item.FindFirst();
    end;

    local procedure GetFAFromCalcForecast(var FixedAsset: Record "Fixed Asset"; CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
    begin
        if CalcForecast."Service Item No." = '' then
            exit;
        ServiceItem.Get(CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
        if ServiceItem."TSRM Fixed Asset No." <> '' then
            FixedAsset.Get(ServiceItem."TSRM Fixed Asset No.");
    end;

    local procedure GetTypeFromCalcForecast(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
    begin
        if CalcForecast."Service Item No." = '' then begin
            SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
            exit;
        end;
        ServiceItem.Get(CalcForecast."Service Item No.");
        case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
            ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
                SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset");
            ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Current Asset":
                SalesLine.Validate(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
        end;
    end;

    local procedure CreateNewItem(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"): Code[20]
    var
        Item: Record Item;
        ItemTemplMgt: Codeunit "Item Templ. Mgt.";
    begin
        Commit();
        ItemTemplMgt.InsertItemFromTemplate(Item);
        AddItemAttributes(Item, CalcForecast);
        Item.TSRMUpdateDescription();
        Item.Modify(true);
        exit(Item."No.");
    end;

    local procedure AddItemAttributes(var Item: Record Item; var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    begin
        Item.Validate("Manufacturer Code", CalcForecast."Manufacturer Code");
        Item.Validate("TSRM Category Code", CalcForecast."Category Code");
        Item.Validate("TSRM Subcategory Code", CalcForecast."Subcategory Code");
        Item.Validate("TSRM Series Code", CalcForecast."Series Code");
        Item.Validate("TSRM Model Code", CalcForecast."Model Code");
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromSalesComments(OriginalSalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
    var
        SalesCommentLine: Record "Sales Comment Line";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Type", OriginalSalesLine."Document Type");
        SalesCommentLine.SetRange("No.", OriginalSalesLine."Document No.");
        SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Line No.", OriginalSalesLine."Line No.");
        if SalesCommentLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        SalesCommentLine.FindSet();
        repeat
            SalesLine.Init();
            SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", OriginalSalesLine."Document Type");
            SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", OriginalSalesLine."Document No.");
            SalesLine.Validate("Line No.", SalesLine.TSRDGetNextNo());
            SalesLine.Description := SalesCommentLine.Comment;
            SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := SalesLine."Line No.";
            SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier" := OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier";
            SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set" := OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set";
            SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type", OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type");
            SalesLine.Insert(true);
        until SalesCommentLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesLinesFromSalesComments(
        OriginalSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        var LineNo: Integer;
        LineSpacing: Integer
    )
    var
        SalesCommentLine: Record "Sales Comment Line";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Type", OriginalSalesLine."Document Type");
        SalesCommentLine.SetRange("No.", OriginalSalesLine."Document No.");
        SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Line No.", OriginalSalesLine."Line No.");
        if SalesCommentLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        SalesCommentLine.FindSet();
        repeat
            SalesLine.Init();
            SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", OriginalSalesLine."Document Type");
            SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", OriginalSalesLine."Document No.");
            SalesLine.Validate("Line No.", LineNo);
            SalesLine.Description := SalesCommentLine.Comment;
            SalesLine."Attached to Line No." := SalesLine."Line No.";
            SalesLine.Validate("TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type", OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type");
            SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier" := OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier";
            SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set" := OriginalSalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set";
            SalesLine.Insert(true);
            LineNo += LineSpacing;
        until SalesCommentLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"
    )
    var
        CommentType: Enum "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type";
    begin
        if CalcConfiguration.Type = CalcConfiguration.Type::Equipment then
            CommentType := CommentType::Equipment
        else
            CommentType := CommentType::Configuration;
        CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(CalcConfiguration."Forecast No.", CalcConfiguration."Line No.", CommentType, SalesLine);
    end;

    local procedure CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(
        ForecastNo: Code[20];
        LineNo: Integer;
        CommentType: Enum "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"
    )
    var
        SalesCommentLine: Record "Sales Comment Line";
        SaleForecastComment: Record "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment";
    begin
        if not FilterSaleForecastComment(SaleForecastComment, ForecastNo, LineNo, CommentType) then
            exit;

        SaleForecastComment.FindSet();
        repeat
            Clear(SalesCommentLine);
            SalesCommentLine.Init();
            SalesCommentLine.Validate("No.", SalesLine."Document No.");
            SalesCommentLine.Validate("Document Type", SalesLine."Document Type");
            SalesCommentLine.Validate("Document Line No.", SalesLine."Line No.");
            SalesCommentLine.Validate("Line No.", GetNextSalesCommentLineNo(SalesLine));
            SalesCommentLine.Validate(Comment, SaleForecastComment.Comment);
            SalesCommentLine.Validate(Date, SaleForecastComment.Date);
            SalesCommentLine.Insert(true);
        until SaleForecastComment.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure FilterSaleForecastComment(var SaleForecastComment: Record "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment";
                                              ForecastNo: Code[20];
                                              ConfigLineNo: Integer;
                                              CommentType: Enum "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type"): Boolean
    begin
        SaleForecastComment.SetRange("Comment Type", CommentType);
        SaleForecastComment.SetRange("No.", ForecastNo);
        SaleForecastComment.SetRange("Document Line No.", ConfigLineNo);
        exit(not SaleForecastComment.IsEmpty());
    end;

    local procedure GetNextSalesCommentLineNo(SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"): Integer
    var
        SalesCommentLine: Record "Sales Comment Line";
    begin
        SalesCommentLine.SetRange("No.", SalesLine."Document No.");
        SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesLine."Document Type");
        SalesCommentLine.SetRange("Document Line No.", SalesLine."Line No.");
        if SalesCommentLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(10000);
        SalesCommentLine.FindLast();
        exit(SalesCommentLine."Line No." + 10000)
    end;

    local procedure CheckMandatoryFieldForWorkshops(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
    begin
        CalcForecast.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
            CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Charging Method", CalcWorkshop."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately);
            CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Show in Sales Document", true);
            CalcWorkshop.SetFilter("Standard Service Code", '<>%1', '');
            if not CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then begin
                SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField("TSRD Resource No. Workshop");
                exit;
            end;
        until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure GetItemChargeFromSalesDiscountLine(var ItemCharge: Record "Item Charge"; var CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts")
    var
        CalcDiscount: Record "TSRD Calc. Discount";
    begin
        CalcDiscount.Get(CalcSalesDiscounts."Discount Type");
        ItemCharge.Get(CalcDiscount."Item Charge");
    end;

    local procedure SetVATPostingGroups(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; CalcForecastNo: Code[20])
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        CalcForecast.Get(CalcForecastNo);
        CalcSalesForecast.Get(CalcForecast."Calc. Sales Forecast No.", CalcForecast."Version No.");
        if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
            exit;
        SalesLine.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", CalcForecast."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
    end;

    local procedure SetCurrencyCodeFromCalcForecast(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; SalesCurr: Code[10]; SalesExchangeRate: Decimal)
    begin
        if SalesCurr = '' then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.Validate("Currency Code", SalesCurr);
        if SalesExchangeRate = 0 then
            exit;
        SalesHeader."Currency Factor" := 1 / SalesExchangeRate;
    end;

    local procedure ExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    var
        CalcCurrency: Record Currency;
        GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
        if (CalcForecast."Calculation Currency" = '') and (CalcForecast."Sales Currency" = '') then
            exit;
        if CalcForecast."Calculation Currency" = '' then begin
            SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", Round(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtLCYtoFCY(CalcForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", SalesLine."Unit Price"), GeneralLedgerSetup."Amount Rounding Precision"));
            exit;
        end;
        if CalcForecast."Sales Currency" = '' then begin
            SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", Round(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoLCY(CalcForecast."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", SalesLine."Unit Price"), GeneralLedgerSetup."Amount Rounding Precision"));
            exit;
        end;
        CalcCurrency.Get(CalcForecast."Calculation Currency");
        SalesLine.Validate("Unit Price", Round(CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(CalcForecast."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", CalcForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", SalesLine."Unit Price"), CalcCurrency."Amount Rounding Precision"));
    end;

    local procedure SetLanguageToSalesHeaderLanguage(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var OriginalLanguageId: Integer)
    var
        Language: Record Language;
    begin
        if SalesHeader."Language Code" = '' then
            exit;

        OriginalLanguageId := GlobalLanguage();

        Language.Get(SalesHeader."Language Code");
        if Language."Windows Language ID" = OriginalLanguageId then
            exit;

        GlobalLanguage(Language."Windows Language ID");
    end;

    local procedure ResetGlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId: Integer)
    begin
        if OriginalLanguageId = 0 then
            exit;
        GlobalLanguage(OriginalLanguageId);
    end;

    local procedure SetFixPriceFields(
        var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"
    ): Boolean
    begin
        SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := CalcForecast."Fix Price allowed";
        if not SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" then
            exit(false);

        SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier" := SalesLine."Document No.";
        SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set" := true;
        exit(true);
    end;

    #endregion Local Procedures

    #region Update Sales Lines Equipment

    internal procedure InsertPrintConfigurationLines(
        SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
        var TempConfiguration: Record "TSRD Configuration Selection" temporary
    )
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        LineNo: Integer;
        LineSpacing: Integer;
        StartLineNo: Integer;
    begin
        StartLineNo := ClearEquipmentLines(SalesLineOriginal, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration);
        if TempConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.Get(SalesLineOriginal."Document Type", SalesLineOriginal."Document No.");
        CalcForecast.Get(TempConfiguration."Forecast No.");
        CreateCommentLines(
            SalesLineOriginal,
            "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::Configuration,
            CalcConfiguration.TableCaption(),
            GetTotalLines(TempConfiguration, CalcForecast),
            StartLineNo,
            LineSpacing,
            LineNo
        );

        TempConfiguration.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcConfiguration.Get(TempConfiguration."Forecast No.", TempConfiguration."Line No.");
            CreateConfigSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcConfiguration, CalcForecast, SalesLineOriginal, LineNo);

            CopyCalcForecastCommentsToSale(CalcConfiguration, SalesLine);
            if CalcConfiguration."Show Comment Lines Sales Docs" then begin
                LineNo += LineSpacing;
                CreateSalesLinesFromSalesComments(SalesLine, LineNo, LineSpacing);
            end;

            if CalcConfiguration."Show List Price" then begin
                PrepSalesLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo);
                CreateConfigListPriceSalesLine(SalesLine, CalcConfiguration."List Price");
            end;

            LineNo += LineSpacing;
        until TempConfiguration.Next() = 0;
    end;

    internal procedure InsertPrintExternalEquipmentLines(
        SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
        var TempExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Ext Equipment Selection" temporary
    )
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        LineNo: Integer;
        LineSpacing: Integer;
        StartLineNo: Integer;
    begin
        StartLineNo := ClearEquipmentLines(SalesLineOriginal, "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment");
        if TempExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.Get(SalesLineOriginal."Document Type", SalesLineOriginal."Document No.");
        CalcForecast.Get(TempExternalEquipment."Forecast No.");
        CreateCommentLines(
            SalesLineOriginal,
            "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"::"External Equipment",
            CalcExternalEquipment.TableCaption(),
            GetTotalLines(TempExternalEquipment, CalcForecast),
            StartLineNo,
            LineSpacing,
            LineNo
        );

        TempExternalEquipment.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcExternalEquipment.Get(TempExternalEquipment."Forecast No.", TempExternalEquipment."Line No.");
            CreateSalesLineFromEquipment(CalcForecast, SalesHeader, SalesLine, CalcExternalEquipment, SalesLineOriginal, LineNo);
            LineNo += LineSpacing;
            CreateSalesLinesFromAttachedExtEquipmentComments(
                SalesHeader,
                CalcForecast."No.",
                CalcExternalEquipment."Line No.",
                SalesLine,
                LineNo,
                LineSpacing
            );
            LineNo += LineSpacing;
        until TempExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure GetTotalLines(
        TempConfiguration: Record "TSRD Configuration Selection" temporary;
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"
    ) TotalLines: Integer
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        SaleForecastComment: Record "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment";
    begin
        TotalLines := TempConfiguration.Count();
        SaleForecastComment.SetRange("Comment Type", "TSRD Sale Forecast Comment Type"::Configuration);
        SaleForecastComment.SetRange("No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        TotalLines += SaleForecastComment.Count();
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Show List Price", true);
        TotalLines += CalcConfiguration.Count();
    end;

    local procedure GetTotalLines(
        TempExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Ext Equipment Selection" temporary;
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"
    ) TotalLines: Integer
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        TotalLines := TempExternalEquipment.Count();
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange(Type, "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type"::Comment);
        TotalLines += CalcExternalEquipment.Count();
    end;

    local procedure ClearEquipmentLines(
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        LineType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"
    ) StartLineNo: Integer
    var
        FilteredSalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        FilteredSalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesLine."Document Type");
        FilteredSalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesLine."Document No.");
        FilteredSalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type", LineType);
        if FilteredSalesLine.IsEmpty() then begin
            StartLineNo := SalesLine.TSRDGetNextNo();
            exit;
        end;
        FilteredSalesLine.FindSet();
        StartLineNo := FilteredSalesLine."Line No.";
        repeat
            DeleteSalesLineTracking(FilteredSalesLine);
            FilteredSalesLine.Delete(true);
        until FilteredSalesLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CreateCommentLines(
        var SalesLineOriginal: Record "Sales Line";
        LineType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type";
        HeaderLineTxt: Text;
        NoOfLines: Integer;
        StartLineNo: Integer;
        var LineSpacing: Integer;
        var LineNo: Integer
    )
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
        RecRef: RecordRef;
    begin
        SalesHeader.Get(SalesLineOriginal."Document Type", SalesLineOriginal."Document No.");
        CreateEmptyCommentLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, StartLineNo, LineType);
        RecRef.GetTable(SalesLine);
        LineNo := SalesLine."Line No.";
        LineSpacing := HelperTools.AutoSplitLineNo_After(RecRef, SalesLine.FieldNo("Line No."), 2 + NoOfLines);
        LineNo += LineSpacing;
        CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(SalesHeader, SalesLine, HeaderLineTxt, LineType, LineNo);
        LineNo += LineSpacing;
    end;

    local procedure DeleteSalesLineTracking(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
    var
        ReservationManagement: Codeunit "Reservation Management";
    begin
        ReservationManagement.SetReservSource(SalesLine);
        ReservationManagement.SetItemTrackingHandling(1);
        ReservationManagement.DeleteReservEntries(true, 0);
    end;

    local procedure CreateEmptyCommentLine(
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        LineNo: Integer;
        CalcWorksheetLineType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type"
    )
    begin
        SalesLine.Init();
        SalesLine.Validate("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.Validate("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesLine."Line No." := LineNo;
        SalesLine.Type := SalesLine.Type::" ";
        SalesLine."TSRD Fix Price allowed" := false;
        SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type" := CalcWorksheetLineType;
        SalesLine.Insert();
    end;

    local procedure CreateHeadLineWithCommentType(
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        HeaderText: Text;
        CommentType: Enum "TSRD Calc. Worksheet Line Type";
        LineNo: Integer
    )
    begin
        CreateEmptyCommentLine(SalesHeader, SalesLine, LineNo, CommentType);
        SalesLine.Description := CopyStr(HeaderText, 1, MaxStrLen(SalesLine.Description));
        SalesLine."TSR Bold" := true;
        SalesLine.Modify();
    end;

    #endregion Update Sales Lines Equipment

    #region Events

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeCheckForOrderType(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterCreateSalesDoc(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeModifySalesLine(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeExchangeUnitPriceCalcCurrToSalesCurr(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"; SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line")
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterCreateSalesLineFromEquipment(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment")
    begin
    end;

    #endregion Events
}
table 5446009 "TSRD Calc. Workshop"
{
    Caption = 'Services';
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Workshop Lookup";
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Workshop Lookup";

    //Always update archive table as well!

    fields
    {
        field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast"."No.";
        }
        field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(5; "Calculate Separately"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculate Separately';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by field Charging Method.';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2502.260200';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Calculate Separately" then begin
                    Validate("Charging Method", "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately);
                    "Show in Sales Document" := true;
                    CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
                    CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
                end else
                    Validate("Charging Method", "Charging Method"::Included);
            end;
        }
        field(8; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Charging Method")
        {
            Caption = 'Charging Method';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            InitValue = Included;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then begin
                    "Show in Sales Document" := true;
                    CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
                    CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
                    "Calculate Separately" := true;
                end else begin
                    "Calculate Separately" := false;
                    Clear("Sales Price");
                    Clear("Margin %");
                    Clear("Margin Amount");
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(16; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                    FieldError("Charging Method");
                UpdateWorkshopMarginFromSalesPrice();
            end;
        }
        field(17; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>%';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                    FieldError("Charging Method");
                SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                IsMarginPercentageViable(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
                UpdateWorkshopSalesPriceFromMarginPct();
            end;
        }
        field(18; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption();
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" <> "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
                    FieldError("Charging Method");
                UpdateWorkshopSalesPriceFromMarginAmt();
            end;
        }
        field(6; "Show in Sales Document"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show in Sales Document';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(7; "Standard Service Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Standard Service Code';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "Standard Service Code".Code;

            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                StandardServiceCode: Record "Standard Service Code";
                CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
            begin
                CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
                CalcForecast.TestField("Manufacturer Code");
                StandardServiceCode.FilterGroup(2);
                StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Manufacturer Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Manufacturer Code", '');
                StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Category Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Category Code", '');
                StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Subcategory Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Subcategory Code", '');
                StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Series Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Series Code", '');
                StandardServiceCode.SetFilter("TSRD Model Code", '%1|%2', CalcForecast."Model Code", '');
                StandardServiceCode.FilterGroup(0);
                if Page.RunModal(Page::"Standard Service Codes", StandardServiceCode) = Action::LookupOK then
                    Validate("Standard Service Code", StandardServiceCode.Code);
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                StandardServiceCode: Record "Standard Service Code";
                TempCalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop" temporary;
            begin
                TempCalcWorkshop := Rec;
                Init();
                "Forecast No." := TempCalcWorkshop."Forecast No.";
                "Line No." := TempCalcWorkshop."Line No.";
                "Standard Service Code" := TempCalcWorkshop."Standard Service Code";
                "Service Order Type" := TempCalcWorkshop."Service Order Type";
                "Responsibility Center" := TempCalcWorkshop."Responsibility Center";
                "Location Code" := TempCalcWorkshop."Location Code";
                if not StandardServiceCode.Get("Standard Service Code") then
                    exit;
                StandardServiceCode.CalcFields("TSRD Default Worktime Amount");
                "Default Worktime Amount" := StandardServiceCode."TSRD Default Worktime Amount";
                Description := StandardServiceCode.Description;
                if not StandardServiceCode."TSRD Fix Price Active" then
                    exit;
                Validate("Amount (Labor)", StandardServiceCode."TSRD Fix Price Labor");
                Validate("Amount (Parts)", StandardServiceCode."TSRD Fix Price Parts");
            end;
        }
        field(10; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(11; "Default Worktime Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Default Worktime Amount';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(13; "Amount (Labor)"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Amount (Labor)';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateTotalAmount();
            end;
        }
        field(14; "Amount (Parts)"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Amount (Parts)';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateTotalAmount();
            end;
        }
        field(15; "Total Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Total Amount';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Total Amount" <> xRec."Total Amount" then begin
                    "Amount (Labor)" := 0;
                    "Amount (Parts)" := 0;
                    exit;
                end;
                UpdateTotalAmount();
            end;
        }
        field(20; "Service Document Type"; Option)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Document Type';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
            OptionCaption = ' ,Order,Quote,Invoice';
            OptionMembers = " ","Order",Quote,Invoice;
        }
        field(21; "Service Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Service Document';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(22; "External Equipment Line No."; Integer)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'External Equipment Line No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = '#22688 field not needed, 1 worshop line can be linked to multiple Calc Ext Equipment lines';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402';
        }
        field(24; "Linked to External Equipment"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. External Equipment" where("Workshop Line No." = field("Line No."),
                                                                "Forecast No." = field("Forecast No.")));
            Caption = 'Linked to Additional Configuration';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(25; "Comments exist"; Boolean)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Sale Forecast Comment" where("Comment Type" = const(Workshops), "No." = field("Forecast No."),
                                                                    "Document Line No." = field("Line No.")));
            Caption = 'Comments exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(30; "Service Order Type"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Service Order Type';
            TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Service" = const(true));
        }
        field(31; "Capitalized Service"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("Service Order Type"."TSRD Capitalized Service" where("Code" = field("Service Order Type")));
            Caption = 'Capitalized Service';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(35; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
            TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;

            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
                RespCenterCode: Code[10];
            begin
                RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Service);
                if RespCenterCode <> '' then
                    Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
            begin
                RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Service);
                CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
            end;
        }
        field(40; "Location Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Location Code';
            TableRelation = Location;
        }
        field(50; "Service Order Status"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Workshop Status")
        {
            Caption = 'Service Order Status';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
        key(TSRDShowInSales; "Forecast No.", "Show in Sales Document") { }
    }

    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        HasCalcForecast: Boolean;
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";



    trigger OnInsert()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        GetCalcForecast("Forecast No.");
        if not CalcForecast."Fix Price allowed" then
            Rec.Validate("Charging Method", Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately)
        else
            Rec.Validate("Charging Method", Rec."Charging Method"::Included);
        CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateServiceActivitiesInForecast(Rec."Forecast No.");
    end;

    trigger OnModify()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateServiceActivitiesInForecast(Rec."Forecast No.");
    end;

    trigger OnDelete()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        UnlinkExternalEquipmentAfterDelete();
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateServiceActivitiesInForecast(Rec."Forecast No.");
    end;

    internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
    begin
        GetCalcForecast("Forecast No.");
        CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
    end;

    local procedure UnlinkExternalEquipmentAfterDelete()
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Workshop Line No.", "Line No.");
        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Workshop Line No.", 0);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateTotalAmount()
    begin
        "Total Amount" := "Amount (Labor)" + "Amount (Parts)";
        if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::CalcSeparately then
            if "Sales Price" = 0 then
                Validate("Sales Price", "Total Amount")
            else
                UpdateWorkshopMarginFromSalesPrice();
    end;

    local procedure UpdateWorkshopMarginFromSalesPrice()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - "Total Amount";
        "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage("Total Amount", "Sales Price", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
    end;

    local procedure UpdateWorkshopSalesPriceFromMarginPct()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        "Sales Price" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin("Total Amount", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), 0.01);
        "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - "Total Amount";
    end;

    local procedure UpdateWorkshopSalesPriceFromMarginAmt()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        "Sales Price" := "Total Amount" + "Margin Amount";
        "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage("Total Amount", "Sales Price", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
    end;

    internal procedure IsMarginPercentageViable(MarginCalculator: Interface "TSRD MarginCalculator")
    begin
        MarginCalculator.IsMarginPercentageViable("Margin %");
    end;

    internal procedure OpenLinkedServiceDocument()
    var
        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
        ServiceInvoiceHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header";
    begin
        case "Service Document Type" of
            "Service Document Type"::Order:
                if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Order, "Service Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Service Order", ServiceHeader);
            "Service Document Type"::Quote:
                if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Quote, "Service Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Service Quote", ServiceHeader);
            "Service Document Type"::Invoice:
                if ServiceInvoiceHeader.Get("Service Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Posted Service Invoice", ServiceInvoiceHeader);
        end
    end;

    local procedure GetCalcForecast(ForecastNo: Code[20])
    begin
        if not HasCalcForecast then
            HasCalcForecast := CalcForecast.Get(ForecastNo);
    end;

    procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
    var
        CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
    begin
        CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."Forecast No.");
        if CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
            exit(10000);
        CalcWorkshop.FindLast();
        exit(CalcWorkshop."Line No." + 10000);
    end;

    internal procedure InitOrderType()
    var
        ServiceOrderType: Record "Service Order Type";
        UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
    begin
        UserSetup.Get(UserId());
        if UserSetup."TSR Service Order Type" = '' then
            exit;
        if not ServiceOrderType.Get(UserSetup."TSR Service Order Type") then
            exit;
        if not ServiceOrderType."TSR Internal Invoicing" then
            exit;
        Rec.Validate("Service Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Service Order Type");
    end;

    internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
        RespCenterCode: Code[10];
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Service, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Internal Customer");
        if RespCenterCode <> '' then
            Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
    end;
}
page 5446022 "TSRD Calc. Workshops"
{
    ApplicationArea = All;
    AutoSplitKey = true;
    Caption = 'Services';
    ContextSensitiveHelpPage = '/machine-trade/trade-price-management/trade-dms-forecast';
    DelayedInsert = true;
    DeleteAllowed = false;
    PageType = ListPart;
    RefreshOnActivate = true;
    ShowFilter = false;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
    UsageCategory = None;

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            repeater(Group)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field("Standard Service Code"; Rec."Standard Service Code")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Standard Service Code.';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Default Worktime Amount"; Rec."Default Worktime Amount")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Default Worktime Amount.';
                }
                field("Linked to Equipment"; Rec."Linked to External Equipment")
                {
                    AssistEdit = true;
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies connection to additional configuration.';
                }
                field("Responsibility Center"; Rec."Responsibility Center")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Resp. Center for the Service Orders.';
                }
                field(Description; Rec.Description)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Description of Services';
                }
                field("Order Type"; Rec."Service Order Type")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Service Order Type for Service Orders.';

                    trigger OnLookup(var Text: Text): Boolean
                    var
                        ServiceOrderType: Record "Service Order Type";
                    begin
                        ServiceOrderType.FilterGroup(2);
                        ServiceOrderType.SetRange("TSR Service", true);
                        ServiceOrderType.FilterGroup(0);
                        ServiceOrderType.SetRange("TSR Internal Invoicing", true);
                        if Page.RunModal(Page::"Service Order Types", ServiceOrderType) = Action::LookupOK then
                            Rec.Validate("Service Order Type", ServiceOrderType.Code);
                    end;
                }
                field("Location Code"; Rec."Location Code")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Location Code for Service Orders.';
                }
                field("Amount (Labor)"; Rec."Amount (Labor)")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Amount (Labor)"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Amount (Labor)';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Amount (Parts)"; Rec."Amount (Parts)")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Amount (Parts)"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Amount (Parts)';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Total Amount"; Rec."Total Amount")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Amount"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Total Amount';

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Charging Method"; Rec."Charging Method")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies whether the service amount is included in the main unit price or invoiced separately.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price when the service is charged separately.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the margin percentage when the service is charged separately.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Margin Amount"; Rec."Margin Amount")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Margin Amount"), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" = Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the margin amount when the service is charged separately.';
                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Link to Service Document No."; Rec."Service Document No.")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    Enabled = Rec."Service Document No." <> '';
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Linked Service Document';

                    trigger OnDrillDown()
                    begin
                        Rec.OpenLinkedServiceDocument();
                    end;
                }
                field("Service Order Status"; Rec."Service Order Status")
                {
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the status of the linked Service Order';
                }
                field("Calculate Separately"; Rec."Calculate Separately")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies is Services Calculated Separately';
                    Visible = false;

                    trigger OnValidate()
                    begin
                        CurrPage.Update();
                    end;
                }
                field("Show in Sales Document"; Rec."Show in Sales Document")
                {
                    Editable = (Rec."Charging Method" <> Rec."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately) and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should Services be shown in Sales Document';
                }
                field("Comments exist"; Rec."Comments exist")
                {
                    Editable = not SalesCalcWonOrLost;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies does Services have Comments';
                }
            }
            group(Totals)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field("Total Cost Amount (Labour)"; TotalCostsAmountLabour)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostAmountLaborLbl, Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Cost Amounts (Labor) in the Services lines.';
                }
                field("Total Cost Amount (Parts)"; TotalCostsAmountParts)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostAmountPartsLbl, Rec."Forecast No.");
                    DrillDown = false;
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Cost Amounts (Parts) in the Services lines.';
                }
                field("Total Cost Amount"; TotalCostsAmount)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostAmountLbl, Rec."Forecast No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Cost Amounts in the Services lines.';
                }
            }
        }
    }
    actions
    {
        area(Processing)
        {
            action("Delete")
            {
                Caption = 'Delete';
                Enabled = (Rec."Line No." <> 0) and (not SalesCalcWonOrLost);
                Image = DeleteRow;
                ShortcutKey = 'Ctrl+Del';
                ToolTip = 'Delete the selected row (Ctrl+Del)';

                trigger OnAction()
                var
                    CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
                begin
                    CurrPage.SetSelectionFilter(CalcWorkshop);
                    if not CalcForecastMgt.ShouldDeleteLine(CalcWorkshop) then
                        exit;
                    CalcWorkshop.DeleteAll(true);
                end;
            }
            group("TSRD Link")
            {
                Caption = 'Link (Additional Configuration)';
                ToolTip = 'Link Services lines with additional configuration.';
                action("TSRD Link with Equipment")
                {
                    Caption = 'Link with Equipment';
                    Image = Link;
                    ToolTip = 'Links Services lines with Equipment.';
                    trigger OnAction()
                    var
                        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
                        CalcExternalEquipments: Page "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";
                    begin
                        CalcExternalEquipment.FilterGroup(2);
                        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."Forecast No.");
                        CalcExternalEquipment.SetFilter(Type, '%1|%2', CalcExternalEquipment.Type::Item, CalcExternalEquipment.Type::"Service Item");
                        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Workshop Line No.", 0);
                        SetFilterLineAction(CalcExternalEquipment);
                        CalcExternalEquipment.FilterGroup(0);

                        CalcExternalEquipments.SetTableView(CalcExternalEquipment);
                        CalcExternalEquipments.SetRecord(CalcExternalEquipment);
                        CalcExternalEquipments.LookupMode(true);
                        if CalcExternalEquipments.RunModal() <> Action::LookupOK then
                            exit;
                        CalcExternalEquipments.SetSelectionFilter(CalcExternalEquipment);
                        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
                            CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Workshop Line No.", Rec."Line No.");
                    end;
                }
                action("TSRD Unlink from Equipment")
                {
                    Caption = 'Unlink from Equipment';
                    Image = UnLinkAccount;
                    ToolTip = 'Unlinks Services lines from Equipment.';
                    trigger OnAction()
                    var
                        CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
                    begin
                        CurrPage.SetSelectionFilter(CalcWorkshop);
                        if CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
                            exit;
                        case CalcWorkshop.Count() of
                            1:
                                ChooseAndUnlinkExtEquipment(Rec);
                            else begin
                                CalcWorkshop.FindSet();
                                repeat
                                    UnlinkExtEquipment(CalcWorkshop);
                                until CalcWorkshop.Next() = 0;
                            end;
                        end;
                    end;
                }
            }
            group("TSRD Service")
            {
                Caption = 'Service';
                ToolTip = 'Specifies all options and procedures service related';

                action("TSRD Create Service Order")
                {
                    Caption = 'Create Service Order';
                    Image = CreateDocument;
                    ToolTip = 'Create Service Order for marked and linked Services lines!';
                    trigger OnAction()
                    begin
                        CreateServiceOrder();
                    end;
                }
            }
            action("TSRD WorkshopNoteTexts")
            {
                Caption = 'Note Texts';
                Image = CheckList;
                RunObject = page "TSRD Calc. Workshop Note Texts";
                RunPageLink = "Forecast No." = field("Forecast No."), "Workshop Line No." = field("Line No.");
                RunPageView = sorting("Forecast No.", "Workshop Line No.", "Line No.");
                ToolTip = 'View or add Note Texts for the Services.';
            }
            action(TSRAddLineComment)
            {
                ApplicationArea = Basic, Suite;
                Caption = 'Comments';
                Image = ViewComments;
                RunObject = page "TSRD Sale Forecast Comments";
                RunPageLink = "Comment Type" = const(Workshops),
                              "No." = field("Forecast No."),
                              "Document Line No." = field("Line No.");
                ToolTip = 'Add Comment Lines to Services';
            }
        }

    }

    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        SalesCalcWonOrLost: Boolean;
        TotalCostsAmount: Decimal;
        TotalCostsAmountLabour: Decimal;
        TotalCostsAmountParts: Decimal;
        TotalCostAmountLaborLbl: Label 'Total Cost Amount (Labor)';
        TotalCostAmountLbl: Label 'Total Cost Amount';
        TotalCostAmountPartsLbl: Label 'Total Cost Amount (Parts)';

    trigger OnNewRecord(BelowxRec: Boolean)
    begin
        Rec.InitOrderType();
        Rec.InitResponsibilityCenter();
    end;

    trigger OnAfterGetCurrRecord()
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.CalculateWorkshopsSubPageTotals(Rec, TotalCostsAmountLabour, TotalCostsAmountParts, TotalCostsAmount);
    end;

    trigger OnAfterGetRecord()
    begin
        Rec."Service Order Status" := CalcForecastMgt.CalculateServiceOrderStatus(Rec);
    end;

    trigger OnOpenPage()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        if not CalcForecast.Get(Rec."Forecast No.") then
            exit;
        SalesCalcWonOrLost := CalcForecast.GetSalesCalculationStatus() in [
            "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Won,
            "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Lost
        ];
    end;

    local procedure CreateServiceOrder()
    var
        CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        Rec.TestField("Line No.");
        CalcWorkshop.Copy(Rec);
        CurrPage.SetSelectionFilter(CalcWorkshop);
        case CalcWorkshop.Count() of
            0:
                exit;
            1:
                begin
                    if ServiceMgt.ExtendedWarrantyHandlingInCalcForecast(CalcWorkshop) then
                        exit;
                    if not CalcForecastMgt.ChooseOptionForServiceOrder(CalcWorkshop) then
                        CalcForecastMgt.CreateServiceOrder(CalcWorkshop);
                end;
            else
                CalcForecastMgt.CreateServiceOrder(CalcWorkshop);
        end;
    end;

    local procedure UnlinkExtEquipment(CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop")
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.FilterGroup(2);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcWorkshop."Forecast No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Workshop Line No.", CalcWorkshop."Line No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.FilterGroup(0);
        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Workshop Line No.", 0);
    end;

    local procedure ChooseAndUnlinkExtEquipment(CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop")
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
        CalcExternalEquipments: Page "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.FilterGroup(2);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcWorkshop."Forecast No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Workshop Line No.", CalcWorkshop."Line No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.FilterGroup(0);
        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcExternalEquipments.SetTableView(CalcExternalEquipment);
        CalcExternalEquipments.SetRecord(CalcExternalEquipment);
        CalcExternalEquipments.LookupMode(true);
        if CalcExternalEquipments.RunModal() <> Action::LookupOK then
            exit;
        CalcExternalEquipments.SetSelectionFilter(CalcExternalEquipment);
        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Workshop Line No.", 0);
    end;

    local procedure SetFilterLineAction(var CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment")
    var
        ServiceOrderType: Record "Service Order Type";
    begin
        if Rec."Service Order Type" = '' then
            exit;
        if not ServiceOrderType.Get(Rec."Service Order Type") then
            exit;
        if ServiceOrderType."TSRD Capitalized Service" then
            exit;
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Line Action", "TSRD Service Line Action"::" ")
    end;
}
codeunit 5446115 "TSRD Service Subs"
{
    Access = Internal;
    SingleInstance = true;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Page, Page::"Service Order", 'OnOpenPageEvent', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceOrder_OnOpenPageEvent(var Rec: Record "Service Header")
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.SendNotificationIfForecast(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnAfterDeleteEvent', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceHeader_OnAfterDeleteEvent(var Rec: Record "Service Header"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
