    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        if Rec.IsTemporary() then
            exit;
        MachineCommunityMgt.DeleteSharedDocuments(Rec);
        if not RunTrigger then
            exit;
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateWorkshopLinesAfterServiceHeaderDelete(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnBeforeInsertEvent', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnBeforeInsertEvent(var Rec: Record "Service Line"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        if not RunTrigger then
            exit;
        FixPriceMgt.SetFixPriceAllowed(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnBeforeModifyEvent', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnBeforeModifyEvent(var Rec: Record "Service Line"; var xRec: Record "Service Line"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
        MultiLevelDiscMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Multi Level Disc. Mgt.";
    begin
        if not RunTrigger then
            exit;
        FixPriceMgt.SetFixPriceAllowed(Rec, xRec);
        MultiLevelDiscMgt.BlockMultiLevelCommentModify(Rec, xRec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Quote to Order (Yes/No)", 'OnBeforeShowMessage', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServQuoteToOrderYesNoOnBeforeShowMessage(var Rec: Record "Service Header"; OrderNo: Code[20]; var HideMessage: Boolean);
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.ShowQuoteToOrderConfirmMessage(OrderNo, HideMessage);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnAfterDeleteEvent', '', true, true)]
    local procedure "Service Item Line_OnAfterDeleteEvent"(var Rec: Record "Service Item Line"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
    var
        WorkshopBinMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Workshop Bin Mgt.";
        MediaMgt: Codeunit "TSR Media Mgt.";
    begin
        if not Rec.IsTemporary() then begin
            MediaMgt.DeleteMedia(Rec.SystemId, "TSRST Media Storage Source"::"TSR Service Item Line");
            WorkshopBinMgt.DeleteWorkshopBin(Rec);
        end;
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnAfterValidateEvent', 'Service Item No.', true, true)]
    local procedure ServiceItemLine_OnAfterValidateEvent_ServiceItemNo(var Rec: Record "Service Item Line"; var xRec: Record "Service Item Line"; CurrFieldNo: Integer)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        if Rec.IsTemporary() then
            exit;

        ServiceMgt.InsertServiceHeaderFromServiceItemDescription(Rec, xRec, CurrFieldNo);
        ServiceMgt.CopyLicensePlateNoToServiceItemLine(Rec);
        ServiceMgt.CopyWarrantyInfoToServiceItemLine(Rec);
        ServiceMgt.UpdateServiceHeaderDescriptionOnServiceItemChange(Rec);
        ServiceMgt.UpdateBillToCustomerNoOnServiceHeader(Rec);
        ServiceMgt.FillManufacturer(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnBeforeValidateEvent', 'Service Item No.', true, true)]
    local procedure ServiceItemLine_OnBeforeValidateEvent_ServiceItemNo(var Rec: Record "Service Item Line"; var xRec: Record "Service Item Line"; CurrFieldNo: Integer)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
        WarrantMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Mgt.";
    begin
        WarrantMgt.CheckIfServiceItemCanBeModified(Rec);
        ServiceMgt.ExtendedWarrantyHandlingInServiceItemLine(Rec, CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Service Item No."));
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnAfterCopyBillToCustomerFields', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceHeader_OnAfterCopyBillToCustomerFields(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; Customer: Record Customer; SkipBillToContact: Boolean)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        if ServiceHeader.IsTemporary() then
            exit;
        ServiceMgt.SetReserveMethod(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnAfterInitRecord', '', true, true)]
    local procedure T5900_OnAfterInitRecord(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        ServiceArchiveMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Archive Mgt.";
    begin
        if ServiceHeader.IsTemporary() then
            exit;
        ServiceHeader."TSRD Doc. No. Occurrence" := ServiceArchiveMgt.GetNextOccurrenceNo(Database::"Service Header", ServiceHeader."Document Type", ServiceHeader."No.");
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnBeforeFinalize', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeFinalize(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var CloseCondition: Boolean);
    var
        ServiceArchiveMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Archive Mgt.";
    begin
        if ServiceHeader.IsTemporary() then
            exit;
        ServiceArchiveMgt.AutoArchiveServiceDocument(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnBeforeInsertServHeader', '', true, true)]
    local procedure OnBeforeInsertServHeader(var ServiceHeaderOrder: Record "Service Header"; ServiceHeaderQuote: Record "Service Header")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.ServiceQuoteToOrderTransferForecastAmounts(ServiceHeaderOrder, ServiceHeaderQuote);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service Transfer Ext. Text", OnInsertServExtTextOnBeforeToServiceLineInsert, '', true, true)]
    local procedure OnInsertServExtTextOnBeforeToServiceLineInsert(var ServLine: Record "Service Line"; var ToServLine: Record "Service Line"; TempExtTextLine: Record "Extended Text Line" temporary; var NextLineNo: Integer; LineSpacing: Integer; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        FixPriceMgt.ExtTextInsertServiceLine(ToServLine, ServLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Post", 'OnBeforePostWithLines', '', false, false)]
    local procedure "Service-Post_OnBeforePostWithLines"(var PassedServHeader: Record "Service Header"; var PassedServLine: Record "Service Line";
                                                         var PassedShip: Boolean; var PassedConsume: Boolean; var PassedInvoice: Boolean;
                                                         var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
        DebitedCostCenterMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Debited Cost Center Mgt";
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
        ServiceDropShipBuffer: Codeunit "TSRD Service Drop Ship Buffer";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
        WorkshopBinMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Workshop Bin Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.CheckIfAllowedToExecuteAction(PassedServHeader);
        FixPriceMgt.IsFixedPriceCalculated(PassedServHeader, PassedInvoice, PassedShip, false, false, true);
        ServiceMgt.InsertLastServiceLocationFromServicePost(PassedServHeader);
        ServiceDropShipBuffer.ClearBuffer(); // Clear global singleinstance before posting
        WorkshopBinMgt.CheckQtyOfWorkshopBin(PassedServHeader);
        DebitedCostCenterMgt.CheckDebitCostCenterFilledForServiceOrderType(PassedServHeader);
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.CheckEmptyDetachLines(PassedServHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnBeforeCheckServItemCustomer', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeCheckServItemCustomer(ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; ServiceItem: Record "Service Item"; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    begin
        IsHandled := true;
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnBeforeServLineDeleteAll', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeServLineDeleteAll(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var NewServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var SkipDelete: Boolean);
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
        ServiceArchiveMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Archive Mgt.";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        if ServiceHeader.IsTemporary() then
            exit;
        ServiceMgt.DeleteLaborResources(NewServiceHeader);
        MachineCommunityMgt.DeleteSharedQuotesOnAfterMakingOrder(ServiceHeader);
        MachineCommunityMgt.InsertMachineCommElement(NewServiceHeader);
        ServiceArchiveMgt.AutoArchiveServiceDocument(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterValidateEvent', 'Quantity', true, true)]
    local procedure "Service Line_OnAfterValidateEvent_Quantity"(var Rec: Record "Service Line"; var xRec: Record "Service Line"; CurrFieldNo: Integer)
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        if Rec.IsTemporary() then
            exit;
        FixPriceMgt.UpdateServiceLineOnAfterValidateQuantity(Rec, xRec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterClearFields', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterClearFields(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; xServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; TempServiceLine: Record "Service Line" temporary; CallingFieldNo: Integer)
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.ServiceLineOnValidate(ServiceLine);
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.SetCapServiceFields(ServiceLine, TempServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnBeforeUpdateLineDiscPct', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeUpdateLineDiscPct(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; Currency: Record Currency; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.UpdateLineDiscPct(ServiceLine, Currency, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterGetUnitCost', '', false, false)]
    local procedure SalesLine_OnAfterGetUnitCost(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; Item: Record Item)
    var
        MarginManagement: Codeunit "TSRD Margin Management";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        MarginManagement.SetUnitCostMargin(ServiceLine, Item);
        ServiceMgt.SetRemanValue(ServiceLine, Item);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Comment Line", 'OnAfterValidateEvent', 'Comment', true, true)]
    local procedure "Service Comment Line_OnAfterValidateComment"(var Rec: Record "Service Comment Line"; var xRec: Record "Service Comment Line"; CurrFieldNo: Integer)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        if Rec.IsTemporary() then
            exit;
        ServiceMgt.IncreaseCRLFOnAfterValidateServiceComment(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Standard Service Line", 'OnAfterValidateEvent', 'No.', true, true)]
    local procedure "Standard Service Line_OnAfterValidateEventNo"(var Rec: Record "Standard Service Line"; var xRec: Record "Standard Service Line")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.PopulateUnitOfMeasure(Rec);
        ServiceMgt.PopulateLaborInStandardServiceLine(Rec);

        ServiceMgt.StandardServiceLineOnValidateNo(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Standard Service Line", 'OnAfterValidateEvent', 'TSRD Vendor Item No.', true, true)]
    local procedure "Standard Service Line_OnAfterValidateEventVendorItemNo"(var Rec: Record "Standard Service Line"; var xRec: Record "Standard Service Line")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.StandardServiceLineOnValidateVendorItemNo(Rec, xRec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Post (Yes/No)", 'OnAfterConfirmPost', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterConfirmPost(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; Invoice: Boolean; Ship: Boolean);
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        FixPriceMgt.IsFixedPriceCalculated(ServiceHeader, Invoice, Ship, false, false, false);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Post (Yes/No)", 'OnBeforeConfirmServPost', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeConfirmServPost(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; Invoice: Boolean; Ship: Boolean; PreviewMode: Boolean);
    var
        FinanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Finance Mgt.";
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        FixPriceMgt.IsFixedPriceCalculated(ServiceHeader, Invoice, Ship, PreviewMode, true, false);
        FinanceMgt.CheckZeroUnitPriceService(ServiceHeader, Ship, Invoice);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnAfterSetUpNewLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterSetUpNewLine(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line");
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.SetWorkTypeCodeFromServOrdType(ServiceItemLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterValidateEvent', 'Unit of Measure Code', true, true)]
    local procedure "Service Line_OnAfterValidateEvent_Unit of Measure Code"(var Rec: Record "Service Line")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.CheckHoursPerUnitOfMeasureOnValidateUoM(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnBeforeRun', '', false, false)]
    local procedure "Service-Quote to Order_OnBeforeRun"(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";

        ServiceMgt.CheckServiceLineUnitOfMeasure(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnBeforeServiceItemLineInsert', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceQuoteToOrder_OnBeforeServiceItemLineInsert(var ServiceItemLine2: Record "Service Item Line"; ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; ServOrderHeader: Record "Service Header");
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.ValidateExpectedHours(ServiceItemLine2);
        FixPriceMgt.CopyDocFixPrice(ServiceItemLine, ServiceItemLine2, false);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnAfterInsertServiceLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceQuoteToOrder_OnAfterInsertServiceLine(var ServiceItemLine2: Record "Service Item Line");
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        FixPriceMgt.ResetFixPriceCalculated(ServiceItemLine2);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnBeforeServOrderLineInsert', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceQuoteToOrder_OnBeforeServOrderLineInsert(var ServiceOrderLine2: Record "Service Line")
    begin
        ServiceOrderLine2."TSRD Fixed Price" := false;
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Unit of Measure", 'OnAfterDeleteEvent', '', true, true)]
    local procedure Resource_OnAfterDeleteEvent(var Rec: Record "Unit of Measure"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.DeleteHoursPerUoM(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSR Service Mgt.", 'OnAfterSetPostingDocDate', '', true, true)]
    local procedure ServiceMgt_OnAfterSetPostingDocumentDate(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; PostOrderDates: Page "TSR Post Order Dates")
    begin
        PostOrderDates.GetStartingFinishingDates(ServiceHeader);
        PostOrderDates.SetStartingFinishingDatesOnServItemLine(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSR Service Mgt.", 'OnBeforePostOrderDatesRunModal', '', true, true)]
    local procedure ServiceMgt_OnBeforePostOrderDatesRunModal(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; PostOrderDates: Page "TSR Post Order Dates")
    begin
        PostOrderDates.SetComingFromServiceDoc(true);
        PostOrderDates.SetStartingFinishingDates(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Work Type", 'OnAfterDeleteEvent', '', true, true)]
    local procedure "Work Type_OnAfterDeleteEvent"(var Rec: Record "Work Type"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        if not RunTrigger then
            exit;
        ServiceMgt.ClearWorkTypeFromLinkedTables(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnValidateServiceItemNoOnBeforeCheckXRecServiceItemNo', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnValidateServiceItemNoOnBeforeCheckXRecServiceItemNo(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; xServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; var ServLine: Record "Service Line"; var ServItem: Record "Service Item"; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.CheckServiceItemNoChange(ServiceItemLine, xServiceItemLine, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnBeforeOnModify', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeOnModify(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; xServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line");
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.EnsureServiceItemInfoIsUpdatedOnServiceLines(ServiceItemLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnBeforeTempServLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeTempServLine(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; xServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; var ServLine2: Record "Service Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    var

    begin
        ServiceMgt.CheckEmptyOldContractNo(xServiceItemLine, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnCheckWarrantyOnAfterSetWarranty', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnCheckWarrantyOnAfterSetWarranty(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    var

    begin
        ServiceMgt.SkipWarranty(ServiceItemLine, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", OnValidateNoOnAfterCopyFields, '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnValidateNoOnAfterCopyFields(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.SetWorkTypeCodeFromServiceItemLine(ServiceLine);
        ServiceMgt.AutoFillNeededByDate(ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Machine Mgt.", 'OnCheckIfResourceGroupIsLabour', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnCheckIfResourceGroupIsLabour(ResourceGroup: Record "Resource Group"; var IsLabour: Boolean);
    begin
        IsLabour := ResourceGroup."TSRD Labor";
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item", 'OnBeforeServItemLinesExistErr', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeServItemLinesExistErr(var ServiceItem: Record "Service Item"; ChangedFieldName: Text[100]; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    begin
        IsHandled := true;
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Calculation Review Mgt", 'OnAfterCalcReviewValues', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterCalcReviewValues(var TempMCalculationReview: Record "TSRM Calculation Review");
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.CalculateForecastedUnitCost(TempMCalculationReview);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnBeforeServInvLineInsert', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeServInvLineInsert(var ServiceInvoiceLine: Record "Service Invoice Line"; ServiceLine: Record "Service Line");
    begin
        ServiceInvoiceLine."TSRD Order Line No." := ServiceLine."Line No.";
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Service Interval Mgt", 'OnBeforeInsertServiceLines', '', true, true)]
    local procedure OnBeforeInsertServiceLines(var StdCode: Code[10]; var ServLine: Record "Service Line")
    begin
        ServLine."TSRD Std. Service Code" := StdCode;
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Service Interval Mgt", 'OnAfterInsertServiceLines', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceIntervalMgt_OnAfterInsertServiceLines(var ServItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; StdCode: Code[10]; var InsertedServiceLines: Record "Service Line");
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.AddChecklistFromStandardServiceCode(ServItemLine, StdCode, false);
        ServiceMgt.TransferStandardCodeComments(ServItemLine, StdCode);
        ServiceMgt.TransferStandardCodeFixPrice(ServItemLine, StdCode, InsertedServiceLines);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv. Get Source Doc. Outbound", 'OnFindWarehouseRequestForServiceOrderOnAfterSetWhseRqstFilters', '', false, false)]
    local procedure GetSourceDocOutbound_OnFindWarehouseRequestForServiceOrderOnAfterSetWhseRqstFilters(var WarehouseRequest: Record "Warehouse Request"; var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header");
    var
        WarehouseMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warehouse Mgt.";
    begin
        WarehouseMgt.MarkAutomationWhseRequest(WarehouseRequest, ServiceHeader."TSRD Whse. Automation");
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv. Get Source Doc. Outbound", 'OnAfterFindWarehouseRequestForServiceOrder', '', false, false)]
    local procedure GetSourceDocOutbound_OnAfterFindWarehouseRequestForServiceOrder(var WarehouseRequest: Record "Warehouse Request"; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header");
    var
        WarehouseMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warehouse Mgt.";
    begin
        WarehouseMgt.RemoveMarkAutomationWhseRequest(WarehouseRequest, ServiceHeader."TSRD Whse. Automation");
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Release Service Document", 'OnBeforePerformManualRelease', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ReleaseServiceDocumentOnBeforePerformManualRelease(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        FixPriceMgt.CheckShouldReleaseWithoutPriceCalculation(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Release Service Document", 'OnAfterReleaseServiceDoc', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ReleaseServiceDocumentOnAfterReleaseServiceDoc(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header");
    var
        WarehouseMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warehouse Mgt.";
    begin
        WarehouseMgt.CreateWarehouseShipmentOnReleaseServiceDocument(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Post", 'OnAfterPostServiceDoc', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServicePost_OnAfterPostServiceDoc(
        var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
        ServInvoiceNo: Code[20];
        ServCrMemoNo: Code[20];
        PassedInvoice: Boolean;
        PassedShip: Boolean
    )
    var
        AgencyBusinessMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Agency Business Mgt.";
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
        FulfillmentStatusMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fulfillment Status Mgt";
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
        ServiceCorrectionMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Correction Mgt.";
        WarrantyMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Mgt.";
        WorkshopBinMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Workshop Bin Mgt.";
    begin
        WarrantyMgt.UpdateWarrantyClaims(ServiceHeader, ServInvoiceNo);
        MachineCommunityMgt.ProcessMachineCommunityElements(ServiceHeader);
        AgencyBusinessMgt.UpdateAgencyCommissionValue(ServInvoiceNo);
        WorkshopBinMgt.DeleteEmptyWorkshopBins(ServiceHeader, PassedInvoice);
        FulfillmentStatusMgt.SetFulfillmentStatusAfterPost(ServiceHeader, PassedShip);
        FixPriceMgt.CopyDocFixPriceToPostFixPrice(ServiceHeader, ServInvoiceNo, ServCrMemoNo);
        ServiceCorrectionMgt.SetTrackInfoForCancellation(ServiceHeader, ServCrMemoNo);
        ServiceCorrectionMgt.UpdateServiceHeader(ServiceHeader, ServInvoiceNo, ServCrMemoNo);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnAfterPostDocumentLines', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnAfterPostDocumentLines(
        var ServHeader: Record "Service Header";
        var ServInvHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header";
        var ServInvLine: Record "Service Invoice Line"
    );
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
        ServiceRequisitionMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Requisition Mgt.";
    begin
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.PostCapitalizedService(ServHeader, ServInvLine, ServInvHeader."No." <> '');
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.AttachServiceLineToEquipment(ServHeader, ServInvHeader, ServInvLine);
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.DetachServiceLineToEquipment(ServHeader, ServInvHeader, ServInvLine);
        ServiceRequisitionMgt.PostDropOrderShipment(ServHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnBeforeUpdateResponseTimeHours', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeUpdateResponseTimeHours(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; xServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; SkipResponseTimeHrsUpdate: Boolean; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.SkipResponseTimeUpdateForCrMemo(ServiceItemLine, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnAfterInsertServiceLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterInsertServiceLine(var ServiceItemLine2: Record "Service Item Line"; ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line");
    var
        MediaMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Media Mgt.";
    begin
        MediaMgt.CopyMedia(ServiceItemLine.SystemId,
                           ServiceItemLine2.SystemId,
                           "TSRST Media Storage Source"::"TSR Service Item Line",
                           "TSRST Media Storage Source"::"TSR Service Item Line");
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Service Mgt.", 'OnAfterCreateServiceInvoiceLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterCreateServiceInvoiceLine(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; var ServiceInvoiceItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Invoice Item Line");
    var
        MediaMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Media Mgt.";
        ServiceHistoryMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service History Mgt.";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.TransferCustomerNameToServiceInvoice(ServiceItemLine, ServiceInvoiceItemLine);
        MediaMgt.CopyMedia(ServiceItemLine.SystemId,
                           ServiceInvoiceItemLine.SystemId,
                           "TSRST Media Storage Source"::"TSR Service Item Line",
                           "TSRST Media Storage Source"::"TSR Service Item Line");
        ServiceHistoryMgt.UpdateCheckListLinkAfterPosting(ServiceItemLine.RecordId, ServiceInvoiceItemLine.RecordId);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Service Mgt.", 'OnAfterCreateServiceCrMemoLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterCreateServiceCrMemoLine(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; var ServiceCrMemoItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Cr.Memo Item Line");
    var
        MediaMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Media Mgt.";
        ServiceHistoryMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service History Mgt.";
    begin
        MediaMgt.CopyMedia(ServiceItemLine.SystemId,
                           ServiceCrMemoItemLine.SystemId,
                           "TSRST Media Storage Source"::"TSR Service Item Line",
                           "TSRST Media Storage Source"::"TSR Service Item Line");
        ServiceHistoryMgt.UpdateCheckListLinkAfterPosting(ServiceItemLine.RecordId, ServiceCrMemoItemLine.RecordId);
    end;

    var

    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Req. Wksh.-Make Order", 'OnBeforeCheckRequisitionLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure RegWkshMakeOrder_OnBeforeCheckRequisitionLine(var ReqLine2: Record "Requisition Line"; SuppressCommit: Boolean; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    var
        ServiceRequisitionMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Requisition Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceRequisitionMgt.CheckRequisitionLine(ReqLine2, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Req. Wksh.-Make Order", 'OnBeforeInsertPurchOrderLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure RegWkshMakeOrder_OnBeforeInsertPurchOrderLine(var RequisitionLine: Record "Requisition Line"; var PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header"; var NextLineNo: Integer; var IsHandled: Boolean; var PrevPurchCode: Code[10]; var PrevShipToCode: Code[10]; var PlanningResiliency: Boolean; TempDocumentEntry: Record "Document Entry"; var SuppressCommit: Boolean; var PostingDateReq: Date; var ReferenceReq: Text[35]; var OrderDateReq: Date; var ReceiveDateReq: Date; var OrderCounter: Integer; var HideProgressWindow: Boolean; var PrevLocationCode: Code[10]; var LineCount: Integer; var PurchOrderHeader: Record "Purchase Header"; PurchasingCode: Record Purchasing; var PurchOrderLine: Record "Purchase Line");
    var
        ServiceRequisitionMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Requisition Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceRequisitionMgt.InsertPurchOrderLine(RequisitionLine,
                                                   PurchOrderHeader,
                                                   IsHandled,
                                                   PrevPurchCode,
                                                   PrevShipToCode,
                                                   TempDocumentEntry,
                                                   PostingDateReq,
                                                   ReferenceReq,
                                                   OrderDateReq,
                                                   ReceiveDateReq,
                                                   OrderCounter,
                                                   PrevLocationCode,
                                                   PurchOrderHeader,
                                                   PurchasingCode,
                                                   PurchOrderLine);
    end;

    local procedure PurchaseHeader_OnBeforeTransferSavedFieldsDropShipment(var DestinationPurchaseLine: Record "Purchase Line"; var SourcePurchaseLine: Record "Purchase Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean);

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Item Jnl.-Post Line", 'OnBeforeVerifyInvoicedQty', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ItemJnlPostLine_OnBeforeVerifyInvoicedQty(ItemLedgerEntry: Record "Item Ledger Entry"; var IsHandled: Boolean; ValueEntry: Record "Value Entry")
    var
        ServiceRequisitionMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Requisition Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceRequisitionMgt.VerifyInvoicedQty(ItemLedgerEntry, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Posting Journals Mgt.", 'OnPostItemJnlLineOnBeforeCreateWhseJnlLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ItemJnlPostLine_OnPostItemJnlLineOnBeforeCreateWhseJnlLine(var ItemJournalLine: Record "Item Journal Line"; var ShouldCreateWhseJnlLine: Boolean)
    begin
        if ItemJournalLine."Drop Shipment" then
            ShouldCreateWhseJnlLine := false;
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnBeforeTestBinCode', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnBeforeTestBinCode(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        ServiceRequisitionMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Requisition Mgt.";
    begin
        if ServiceRequisitionMgt.DropShipmentHandleBinMandatory(ServiceLine) then
            IsHandled := true;
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterCopyToItemJnlLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ItemJnlLine_OnAfterCopyItemJnlLineFromServLine(var ItemJournalLine: Record "Item Journal Line"; ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    begin
        ItemJournalLine."Drop Shipment" := ServiceLine."TSRD Drop Shipment";
        ItemJournalLine."TSRD Price Factor" := ServiceLine."TSRD Price Factor";
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnBeforeInsertServLineOnServLineRecreation', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceHeader_OnBeforeInsertServLineOnServLineRecreation(var TempServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
        WarrantyDocsMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Docs Mgt";
    begin
        FixPriceMgt.CopyServiceLineFields(TempServiceLine, ServiceLine);
        ServiceLine.TSRFillFieldsOnServLineRecreation(TempServiceLine);
        WarrantyDocsMgt.UpdateFieldsOnNewServiceLines(TempServiceLine, ServiceLine);
        MachineCommunityMgt.CopyFieldsOnRecreate(ServiceLine, TempServiceLine);
        ServiceMgt.FillServiceItemSalesFields(TempServiceLine, ServiceLine);
        ServiceMgt.SetWorkTypeOnRecreateServiceLines(ServiceLine, TempServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", OnBeforeUpdateUnitPriceByField, '', false, false)]
    local procedure "Service Line_OnBeforeUpdateUnitPriceByField"(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; CalledByFieldNo: Integer; CalcCost: Boolean; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        WarrantyDocsMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Docs Mgt";
    begin
        WarrantyDocsMgt.SkipUpdateUnitPriceByField(ServiceLine, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnBeforeRecreateServLines', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceHeader_OnBeforeRecreateServLines(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; xServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; ChangedFieldName: Text[100]; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.CheckIfServiceLineTypeItemAndHasPurchCode(ServiceHeader, ChangedFieldName);
        ServiceMgt.CheckIfSkipRecreateLines(ChangedFieldName, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnAfterServInvLineInsert', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnAfterServInvLineInsert(ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var ServiceInvoiceLine: Record "Service Invoice Line")
    var
        FillRatesMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fill Rates Entries Mgt.";
        MaintenanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Maintenance Mgt";
    begin
        MaintenanceMgt.CopyServicePostingInfo(ServiceLine, ServiceInvoiceLine);
        if ServiceLine."Qty. to Invoice" <> 0 then
            FillRatesMgt.SetPostedStatus(
                ServiceLine."Document No.",
                ServiceLine."Line No.",
                ServiceLine."Service Item No.",
                ServiceLine."Service Item Line No.",
                true
            );
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnAfterServCrMemoLineInsert', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnAfterServCrMemoLineInsert(ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var ServiceCrMemoLine: Record "Service Cr.Memo Line")
    var
        MaintenanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Maintenance Mgt";
    begin
        MaintenanceMgt.CopyServicePostingInfo(ServiceLine, ServiceCrMemoLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::ServOrderManagement, 'OnLookupServItemNoOnAfterServItemSetFilters', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnLookupServItemNoOnAfterServItemSetFilters(var ServItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; var ServItem: Record "Service Item"; ServHeader: Record "Service Header");
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.FilterServiceItemsWithCommunity(ServItem, ServHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnBeforeRun', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeRun(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.CheckIfAllowedToMakeOrder(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Mgt. Setup", 'OnAfterValidateEvent', 'Default Warranty Duration', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceMgtSetup_OnBeforeValidateServiceItemNo(var Rec: Record "Service Mgt. Setup"; var xRec: Record "Service Mgt. Setup");
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.SyncBasicWarrantyTypePeriod(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Post (Yes/No)", 'OnBeforeConfirmServPost', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServicePostYesNo_OnBeforeConfirmServPost(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var Ship: Boolean; var Consume: Boolean;
                                                             var Invoice: Boolean; var IsHandled: Boolean; PreviewMode: Boolean);
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        if not (Ship or Consume or Invoice) and IsHandled then
            exit;
        FixPriceMgt.CheckShouldPostWithoutPriceCalculation(ServiceHeader, Invoice, IsHandled, PreviewMode);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnAfterServInvHeaderInsert', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServDocumentMgt_OnAfterServInvHeaderInsert(var ServiceInvoiceHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header"; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header");
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.SetInvoiceNoToCalcWorkshop(ServiceInvoiceHeader, ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnRemoveLinesNotSatisfyPostingOnBeforeInitRemainingServLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnRemoveLinesNotSatisfyPostingOnBeforeInitRemainingServLine(var ServiceLine2: Record "Service Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    begin
        IsHandled := ServiceLine2."Qty. to Ship" = 0;
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnBeforeTestStatusOpen', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnBeforeTestStatusOpen(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header");
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.CheckIfAllowedToModifyField(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::ServAllocationManagement, 'OnBeforeCancelAllocation', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServAllocationManagement_OnBeforeCancelAllocation(var ServOrderAllocation: Record "Service Order Allocation"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.CancelAllocation(ServOrderAllocation, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterAssignItemValues', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterAssignItemValues(
        var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
        Item: Record Item;
        xServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
        CallingFieldNo: Integer;
        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"
    );
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
        InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.SetCapServiceOnServLine(ServiceLine, ServiceHeader, Item."TSRD Non-capitalizable");
        InflationSurchargeMgt.SetInflationSurcharge(ServiceLine, Item);
        ServiceMgt.SetReservationOnServiceLine(ServiceLine, ServiceHeader, Item);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterUpdateUnitPrice', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnAfterUpdateUnitPrice(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; xServiceLine: Record "Service Line");
    var
        InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
    begin
        InflationSurchargeMgt.IncludeInflationSurchargeInUnitPrice(ServiceLine, xServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterGetUnitCost', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnAfterGetUnitCost(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line");
    var
        InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
    begin
        InflationSurchargeMgt.IncludeInflationSurchargeOnGetUnitCost(ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterAssignResourceValues', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterAssignResourceValues(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; Resource: Record Resource);
    var
        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
    begin
        if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceLine."Document Type", ServiceLine."Document No.") then
            CapitalizedServiceMgt.SetCapServiceOnServLine(ServiceLine, ServiceHeader, Resource."TSRD Non-capitalizable");
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Select Service Item Mgt.", 'OnAfterInsertItemAttributesAndItemTrackingCode', '', false, false)]
    local procedure TSRMSelectServiceItemMgt_OnAfterInsertItemAttributesAndItemTrackingCode(var Item: Record Item; var TempSelectServiceItem: Record "TSRM Select Service Item" temporary; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        SelectServiceItemMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Select Service Item Mgt.";
    begin
        SelectServiceItemMgt.ComingFromForecastSetTrue(TempSelectServiceItem."Coming From", IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item", 'OnAfterValidateEvent', 'TSRM Trade No.', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceItem_OnAfterValidateTradeNo(var Rec: Record "Service Item"; var xRec: Record "Service Item"; CurrFieldNo: Integer);
    var
        ServiceItemStateMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Item State Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceItemStateMgt.ChangeServiceItemStateAfterTradeNoChange(Rec, xRec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Service Mgt.", 'OnBeforeModifyItemOnAfterInsertingItemAttributesAndItemTrackingCode', '', false, false)]
    local procedure TSRMServiceMgt_OnBeforeModifyItemOnAfterInsertingItemAttributesAndItemTrackingCode(var ServiceItem: Record "Service Item"; var Item: Record Item);
    var
        InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
    begin
        InflationSurchargeMgt.SetInflationSurchargeOnCreatingItem(Item);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service Post Invoice Events", 'OnAfterPrepareInvoicePostingBuffer', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServicePostInvoiceEvents_OnAfterPrepareInvoicePostingBuffer(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var InvoicePostingBuffer: Record "Invoice Posting Buffer")
    var
        WarrantyMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Mgt.";
    begin
        WarrantyMgt.TransferWarrantyInformation(InvoicePostingBuffer, ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnPrepareDocumentOnServLineInsert', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnPrepareDocumentOnServLineInsert(var ServiceHeader2: Record "Service Header"; var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; ServiceLine2: Record "Service Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var

    end;

    local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnPrepareDocumentOnPServLineLoopOnBeforeServLineInsert(var ServLine: Record "Service Line"; PServLine: Record "Service Line")
    var

    begin
        ServiceMgt.UpdateVATPostingGroups(ServLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", OnAfterCopyToResJournalLine, '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnAfterCopyToResJournalLine(var ResJournalLine: Record "Res. Journal Line"; ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        WarrantyMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Mgt.";
    begin
        WarrantyMgt.TransferWarrantyInformation(ResJournalLine, ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service Post Invoice Events", 'OnPostLinesOnBeforeGenJnlLinePost', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServicePostInvoiceEvents_OnAfterPrepareGenJnlLine(var GenJnlLine: Record "Gen. Journal Line"; TempInvoicePostingBuffer: Record "Invoice Posting Buffer" temporary)
    var
        WarrantyMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Mgt.";
    begin
        WarrantyMgt.TransferWarrantyInformation(GenJnlLine, TempInvoicePostingBuffer);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnAfterServShptItemLineInsert', '', true, true)]
    local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnAfterServShptItemLineInsert(var ServiceShptItemLine: Record "Service Shipment Item Line"; ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.SetLastServiceItemLocation(ServiceShptItemLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service Post Invoice Events", 'OnPostLedgerEntryOnBeforeGenJnlPostLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServicePostInvoiceEvents_OnPostLedgerEntryOnBeforeGenJnlPostLine(var GenJournalLine: Record "Gen. Journal Line"; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        DebitedCostCenterMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Debited Cost Center Mgt";
    begin
        DebitedCostCenterMgt.UpdateGLDimensionFromBalanceAccount(GenJournalLine, ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service Transfer Ext. Text", 'OnDeleteServiceLinesOnAfterSetFilers', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnDeleteServiceLinesOnAfterSetFilers(var ServiceLine2: Record "Service Line"; var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    begin
        ServiceLine2.SetRange("TSRD Inflation Surch Comm Line", false);
        ServiceLine2.SetRange("TSRD Multi-Level Disc. Comm.", false);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnRecreateServLinesOnAfterTempServLineDeleteAll', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeInsertServLineOnServLineRecreation(ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header");
    var
        InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
        ServiceLineRecreateMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Line Recreate Mgt";
    begin
        InflationSurchargeMgt.ReinsertInflationSurchargeCommentLinesAfterRecreate(ServiceHeader);
        ServiceLineRecreateMgt.CopyFixPriceFromTemp(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv. Undo Posting Mgt.", 'OnAfterUpdateServLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure UndoPostingManagement_OnAfterUpdateServLine(var ServLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        FulfillmentStatusMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fulfillment Status Mgt";
    begin
        FulfillmentStatusMgt.SetFulfillmentStatusAndModifyLine(ServLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service Line-Reserve", 'OnVerifyChangeOnBeforeHasError', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnVerifyChangeOnBeforeHasError(NewServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; OldServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var HasError: Boolean; var ShowError: Boolean);
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
    begin
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.SkipHasErrorForLocation(NewServiceLine, OldServiceLine, HasError);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Equipment Mgt.", 'OnBeforeRevaluationItemJournalLineInsert', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeRevaluationItemJournalLineInsert(var RevaluationItemJournalLine: Record "Item Journal Line"; Equipment: Record "TSRM Equipment");
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
    begin
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.TransferGenBusPostingGroup(RevaluationItemJournalLine, Equipment);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Serial No. Mgt.", 'OnBeforeInsertServiceItemStatus', '', false, false)]
    local procedure SerialNoMgt_OnBeforeInsertServiceItemStatus(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; ReservationEntry: Record "Reservation Entry"; var IsHandled: Boolean);
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.SkipServiceItemStatusChangeOnTradeInLineInQuote(SalesLine, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Item Jnl.-Post Line", 'OnBeforeInsertSetupTempSplitItemJnlLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ItemJnlPostLineOnBeforeInsertSetupTempSplitItemJnlLine(var TempTrackingSpecification: Record "Tracking Specification" temporary; var TempItemJournalLine: Record "Item Journal Line" temporary; var PostItemJnlLine: Boolean; var ItemJournalLine2: Record "Item Journal Line"; SignFactor: Integer; FloatingFactor: Decimal);
    var
        ServiceRequisitionMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Requisition Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceRequisitionMgt.SetDropShipmentAppliesToEntry(TempItemJournalLine, ItemJournalLine2);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", OnBeforeServInvHeaderInsert, '', false, false)]
    local procedure "Serv-Documents Mgt._OnBeforeServInvHeaderInsert"(var ServiceInvoiceHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header"; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.TransferOrderNoInformation(ServiceInvoiceHeader, ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterFilterLinesWithItemToPlan', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnAfterFilterLinesWithItemToPlan(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    begin
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Machine Comm. Member Doc.", false);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnRecreateServLinesOnBeforeServLineDeleteAll', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceHeader_OnRecreateServLinesOnBeforeServLineDeleteAll(var ServLine: Record "Service Line"; var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
        ServiceLineRecreateMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Line Recreate Mgt";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.SetMachineCommunityRecreate(ServLine, ServiceHeader);
        ServiceLineRecreateMgt.CopyFixPriceToTemp(ServiceHeader);
        ServLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", false);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSR Doc. Text Management", 'OnBeforeAutomaticInsertDocTextOnDocumentCreation', '', false, false)]
    local procedure TSRDocTextManagement_OnBeforeAutomaticInsertDocTextOnDocumentCreation(IncomingTableVariant: Variant; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.SkipDocumentTextIfMachineCommunity(IncomingTableVariant, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnUpdateServLinesByFieldNoOnAfterServLineSetFilters', '', false, false)]
    local procedure SalesHeader_OnUpdateServLinesByFieldNoOnAfterServLineSetFilters(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    begin
        ServiceLine.SetSkipMachineCommunityMemberCheck(true);
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Multi-Level Disc. Comm.", false);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", 'OnDeleteHeaderOnBeforeDeleteRelatedRecords', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceHeader_OnDeleteHeaderOnBeforeDeleteRelatedRecords(var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.SetMachineCommunityRecreate(ServiceHeader);
        FixPriceMgt.SetServLineFixPriceIdentifierSetToFalse(ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", OnAfterAssignHeaderValues, '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnAfterAssignHeaderValues(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        AbnormalDemandMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Abnormal Demand Mgt.";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.UpdateServiceOrderType(ServiceLine, ServiceHeader);
        AbnormalDemandMgt.AssignAbnormalDemandToServiceLine(ServiceLine, ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", OnAfterValidateServiceItemNoOnBeforeUpdateResponseTimeHours, '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceItemLine_OnAfterValidateServiceItemNoOnBeforeUpdateResponseTimeHours(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; xServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.UpdateServiceOrderType(ServiceItemLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item Line", 'OnInsertOnAfterGetServHeader', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceItemLine_OnInsertOnAfterGetServHeader(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        AbnormalDemandMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Abnormal Demand Mgt.";
    begin
        AbnormalDemandMgt.AssignAbnormalDemandToServiceItemLine(ServiceItemLine, ServiceHeader);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRD Copy Service Doc Mgt.", 'OnAfterFinalizeServiceLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure CopyServiceDocMgt_OnAfterFinalizeServiceLine(
        var FromServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
        var ToServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
        RecalculateLines: Boolean
    )
    var
        MultiLevelDiscMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Multi Level Disc. Mgt.";
    begin
        MultiLevelDiscMgt.CopyMultiLevelDiscountsDocsCopyDocument(FromServiceLine, ToServiceLine, RecalculateLines);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterDeleteEvent', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnAfterDeleteEvent(var Rec: Record "Service Line"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
    var
        MultiLevelDiscMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Multi Level Disc. Mgt.";
    begin
        MultiLevelDiscMgt.ClearAllMultiLevelDiscountsDoc(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Service-Quote to Order", 'OnBeforeServLineDeleteAll', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceQuotetoOrder_OnBeforeServLineDeleteAll(var NewServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
        WorkshopBinMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Workshop Bin Mgt.";
    begin
        WorkshopBinMgt.ValidateWorkshopBin(NewServiceHeader);
        FixPriceMgt.RemoveIdentifierSetFromQuote(ServiceHeader);
        FixPriceMgt.SetDocumentFields(NewServiceHeader);
        NewServiceHeader.Modify();
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Gen. Jnl.-Check Line", OnBeforeCheckAppliesToDocNo, '', false, false)]
    local procedure "Gen. Jnl.-Check Line_OnBeforeCheckAppliesToDocNo"(var Sender: Codeunit "Gen. Jnl.-Check Line"; GenJnlLine: Record "Gen. Journal Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    begin
        IsHandled := true;
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSR Sub Total Mgt.", OnBeforeCreateSubTotalServiceLine, '', false, false)]
    local procedure TSRSubTotalMgt_OnBeforeCreateSubTotalServiceLine(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        FixPriceMgt.CheckIfFixPriceEntered(ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Item", 'OnValidateCustomerNoOnAfterCalcShouldConfirmChange', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceItem_OnValidateCustomerNoOnAfterCalcShouldConfirmChange(var ServiceItem: Record "Service Item"; CurrFieldNo: Integer; var ShouldConfirmChange: Boolean)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.SkipCustomerNoChangedMessage(ServiceItem, CurrFieldNo, ShouldConfirmChange);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::ServLogManagement, 'OnServItemEventDescription', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServLogManagement_OnServItemEventDescription(EventNo: Integer; var Description: Text[50]; var Handled: Boolean)
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.GetServiceEventDescriptionForTradeInCustomerSet(EventNo, Description, Handled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Trade No. Mgt.", OnBeforeConfirmNewTradeNo, '', false, false)]
    local procedure TradeNoMgt_OnBeforeConfirmNewTradeNo(var ServiceItem: Record "Service Item")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.CheckServiceOrdersBeforeCreatingNewTradeNo(ServiceItem);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Serial No. Mgt.", 'OnAfterDeleteServiceLineTracking', '', false, false)]
    local procedure SerialNoMgt_OnAfterDeleteServiceLineTracking(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        ServiceItemDatamgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Item Data mgt";
    begin
        if ServiceLine."TSRM Service Item No. (Sales)" <> '' then
            ServiceItemDatamgt.DeleteServiceItemData(ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Serial No. Mgt.", 'OnAfterUpdateSerialNoOnServiceLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure SerialNoMgt_OnAfterUpdateSerialNoOnServiceLine(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var

    begin
        ServiceItemDatamgt.DeleteServiceItemData(ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv. Undo Posting Mgt.", 'OnAfterUpdateServLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServUndoPostingMgt_OnAfterUpdateServLine(var ServLine: Record "Service Line")
    begin
        ServLine.TestField("TSRD Drop Shipment", false);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", OnAfterTestStatusOpen, '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnAfterTestStatusOpen(ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.CheckStatusOnAdminDoc(ServiceHeader, ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Page, Page::"TSR Doc. Text Mappings", OnCheckSharedDocCreated, '', false, false)]
    local procedure TSRMDocTextMappings_OnCheckSharedDocCreated(TSRDocTextMapping: Record "TSR Doc. Text Mapping"; var SharedDocumentCreated: Boolean)
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.CheckSharedDocumentCreated(TSRDocTextMapping, SharedDocumentCreated);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Page, Page::"TSR Doc. Text Mappings", OnElseGetRecDocTextTypeMapping, '', false, false)]
    local procedure TSRMDocTextMappings_OnElseGetRecDocTextTypeMapping(TSRDocTextMapping: Record "TSR Doc. Text Mapping"; var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var Found: Boolean)
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.GetSalesHeaderForTradeIn(TSRDocTextMapping, SalesHeader, Found);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSR Alternative Positions Mgt.", 'OnSetFiltersBeforeInsertingAlternativePositionServiceLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnSetFiltersBeforeInsertingAlternativePosition(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        FixPriceMgt.OnSetFiltersBeforeInsertingAlternativePosition(ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Cost/Revenue Alloc Mgt", OnCalcSumForCalcReviewFieldElseFieldNoSwitch, '', false, false)]
    local procedure CostRevenueAllocMgt_OnCalcSumForCalcReviewFieldElseFieldNoSwitch(var AllocatedCostRevenue: Record "TSRM Allocated Cost/Revenue"; var CalculationReview: Record "TSRM Calculation Review" temporary; FieldNo: Integer)
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
        DevaluationMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Devaluation Mgt.";
    begin
        DevaluationMgt.FilterForCalcReviewFieldOnDevaluation(AllocatedCostRevenue, CalculationReview, FieldNo);
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.FilterForCalcReviewFieldOnCapService(AllocatedCostRevenue, CalculationReview, FieldNo);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Calculation Review Mgt", OnBeforeCalcTotals, '', false, false)]
    local procedure CalculationReviewMgt_OnBeforeCalcTotals(var TempMCalculationReview: Record "TSRM Calculation Review" temporary)
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
        DevaluationMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Devaluation Mgt.";
    begin
        DevaluationMgt.CalculateReviewValuesForDevaluation(TempMCalculationReview);
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.CalcReviewValuesForCapServ(TempMCalculationReview);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Calculation Review Mgt", OnAfterCalcUnitCostSum, '', false, false)]
    local procedure CalculationReviewMgt_OnAfterCalcUnitCostSum(var TempMCalculationReview: Record "TSRM Calculation Review" temporary)
    begin
        TempMCalculationReview."Unit Cost Sum" += TempMCalculationReview."TSRD Devaluation";
        TempMCalculationReview."Unit Cost Sum" += TempMCalculationReview."TSRD Capitalized Service";
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Header", OnAfterInsertEvent, '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceHeader_OnAfterInsertEvent(var Rec: Record "Service Header")
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        if (Rec."Document Type" = Rec."Document Type"::Invoice) and not Rec.IsTemporary() then
            MachineCommunityMgt.InsertMachineCommElement(Rec);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Used Parts Tax Mgt.", OnBeforeInsertAdditionalServiceLine, '', false, false)]
    local procedure UsedPartsTaxMgt_OnBeforeInsertAdditionalServiceLine(var AdditionalServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        MachineCommunityMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Community Mgt.";
    begin
        MachineCommunityMgt.SkipMachineCommMemberCheckOnAdditionalServiceLine(AdditionalServiceLine, ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Service Interval Mgt", 'OnAfterModifyServiceItemLineNeededByDate', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceIntervalMgt_OnAfterModifyServiceItemLineNeededByDate(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; NeededByDate: Date)
    begin
        ServiceItemLine.Validate("TSRD Items Needed By Date", NeededByDate);
        ServiceItemLine.Modify();
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnAfterCopyToItemJnlLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ItemJnlLine_OnAfterCopyItemJnlLineFromServLine2(var ItemJournalLine: Record "Item Journal Line"; ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        AbnormalDemandMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Abnormal Demand Mgt.";
    begin
        AbnormalDemandMgt.TransferAbnormalDemandFields(ItemJournalLine, ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Whse.-Service Release", OnAfterReleaseSetFilters, '', false, false)]
    local procedure "Whse.-Service Release_OnAfterReleaseSetFilters"(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header")
    begin
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Special Order", false);
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Drop Shipment", false);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", 'OnBeforeShowItemSub', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceLine_OnBeforeShowItemSub(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        ItemSubstitInterchMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Item Substit/Interch Mgt";
    begin
        ItemSubstitInterchMgt.ItemSubstitute(ServiceLine, IsHandled)
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Machine Mgt.", OnBeforeTransferCalcTypeToLines, '', false, false)]
    local procedure "TSRM Machine Mgt._OnBeforeTransferCalcTypeToLines"(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
    begin
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.SetCalcTypeToCapService(ServiceLine, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Appr. Calc Review Sum Mgt", OnAfterAssignCalcReviewValues, '', false, false)]
    local procedure "TSRM Appr. Calc Review Sum Mgt_OnAfterAssignCalcReviewValues"(var TempCalcReview: Record "TSRM Calculation Review" temporary; var ApprCalcRevSum: Record "TSRM Approved Calc Review Sum")
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
        DevaluationMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Devaluation Mgt.";
    begin
        DevaluationMgt.AssignDevaluationToApprCalcRevSum(ApprCalcRevSum, TempCalcReview);
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.AssignCapServToApprCalcRevSum(ApprCalcRevSum, TempCalcReview);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Rebook Wizard Mgt.", OnFillAndCheckItemJournalBeforeValidateBinCode, '', false, false)]
    local procedure OnFillAndCheckItemJournalBeforeValidateBinCode(
        var ItemJournalLine: Record "Item Journal Line";
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        var IsHandled: Boolean
    )
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.AssignBinCodeFromServiceItem(ItemJournalLine, ServiceItem, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Service Interval Mgt", 'OnAfterCreateMultipleServiceOrdersFromIntervals', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceIntervalMgt_OnAfterCreateMultipleServiceOrdersFromIntervals(var ServiceInterval: Record "TSRM Service Interval")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.ShowCombinedChecklistCreatedMessage(ServiceInterval);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSRM Service Interval Mgt", 'OnAfterInsertServiceItemLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServiceIntervalMgt_OnAfterInsertServiceItemLine(var ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line")
    begin
        ServiceItemLine.SetSkipAutomaticChecklist(true);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"TSR SignPad Mgt.", OnBeforeGetMediaStorageSourceType, '', false, false)]
    local procedure TSRSignPadMgt_OnBeforeGetMediaStorageSourceType(
       RecRef: RecordRef;
       var Result: Enum "TSRST Media Storage Source";
       var IsHandled: Boolean
    )
    var
        ServiceArchiveMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Archive Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceArchiveMgt.GetMediaStorageSourceTypeServiceItemLineArchive(RecRef, Result, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", OnBeforeTestQuantityPositive, '', false, false)]
    local procedure "Service Line_OnBeforeTestQuantityPositive"(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; CallingFieldNo: Integer; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
    begin
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.CheckQuantityForDetach(ServiceLine, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Service Line", OnBeforeCheckQtyToShipPositive, '', false, false)]
    local procedure "Service Line_OnBeforeCheckQtyToShipPositive"(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; CurrentFieldNo: Integer; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        CapitalizedServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Capitalized Service Mgt.";
    begin
        CapitalizedServiceMgt.CheckQtyToShipForDetach(ServiceLine, IsHandled);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv-Documents Mgt.", 'OnPostDocumentLinesOnAfterCheckServItemRepairStatus', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServDocumentsMgt_OnPostDocumentLinesOnAfterCheckServItemRepairStatus(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.CheckPurchasingCodeOnPostServCreditMemo(ServiceLine);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Serv. Time Sheet Mgt.", 'OnAddServLinesFromTSDetailOnBeforeInsertServiceLine', '', false, false)]
    local procedure ServTimeSheetMgt_OnAddServLinesFromTSDetailOnBeforeInsertServiceLine(var ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"; var LineNo: Integer; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; TimeSheetDetail: Record "Time Sheet Detail")
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.AddServiceLinesFromTSDetails(ServiceLine, ServiceHeader, TimeSheetDetail);
    end;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Price List Line", 'OnBeforeCopyFilteredLinesToTemporaryBuffer', '', false, false)]
    local procedure PriceListLine_OnBeforeCopyFilteredLinesToTemporaryBuffer(
        var Sender: Record "Price List Line";
        var PriceListLine: Record "Price List Line";
        var TempPriceListLine: Record "Price List Line" temporary;
        var Copied: Boolean;
        var IsHandled: Boolean
    )
    var
        PriceCalcMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Price Calc. Mgt.";
    begin
        PriceCalcMgt.SetPriceListLineWorkTypeFilter(PriceListLine);
    end;
}
table 5446038 "TSRD Calc. Cost Arch."
{
    Caption = 'Cost Archive';
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Costs Archive";

    fields
    {
        #region normal fields
        field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast Arch."."No." where("Document Version No." = field("Document Version No."));
        }
        field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(3; "Cost Type"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Cost Type';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            NotBlank = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Cost Type"."Code";
        }
        field(4; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(5; Amount; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Amount';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(6; "Base Amount Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Base Amount Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Base Amount Type';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(7; Percentage; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>%';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Percentage';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            DecimalPlaces = 0 : 5;
        }
        field(8; "Allocate to Service Item"; Code[20])
        {
            AccessByPermission = tabledata "Service Item" = R;
            Caption = 'Allocate to Service Item';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "Service Item"."No.";
        }
        field(9; "Allocate to Trade No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Allocate to Trade No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = "TSRM Trade No."."No." where("Service Item No." = field("Allocate to Service Item"));
        }
        field(10; "Equipment Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Equipment Line No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch."."Line No." where("Forecast No." = field("Forecast No."),
                                                                         "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No."));
        }
        field(11; "Transfer to Purchase"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Transfer to Purchase';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(20; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(21; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(22; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Charging Method")
        {
            Caption = 'Charging Method';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(23; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(24; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(25; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        #endregion normal fields
        #region Archive fields
        field(900; "Archive Entry No."; Integer)
        {
            AutoIncrement = true;
            Caption = 'Archive Entry No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(901; "Document Version No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Document Version No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(902; "Archived On (Date)"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived On (Date)';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(903; "Archive On (Time)"; Time)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived On (Time)';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(904; "Archived By"; Guid)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived By';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(905; "Archived By (Name)"; Code[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup(User."User Name" where("User Security ID" = field("Archived By")));
            Caption = 'Archived By (Name)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        #endregion Archive fields
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; "Archive Entry No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
        key(SK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.", "Document Version No.")
        {
        }
    }
}
page 5446136 "TSRD Calc. Costs Archive"
{
    ApplicationArea = All;
    Caption = 'Costs';
    ContextSensitiveHelpPage = '/machine-trade/trade-price-management/trade-dms-forecast';
    Editable = false;
    PageType = ListPart;
    ShowFilter = false;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Cost Arch.";
    UsageCategory = None;
    InsertAllowed = false;
    DeleteAllowed = false;

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            repeater(GroupName)
            {
                field("Cost Type"; Rec."Cost Type")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Cost Type.';
                }
                field(Description; Rec.Description)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Cost Description.';
                }
                field("Transfer to Purchase"; Rec."Transfer to Purchase")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Transfer to Purchase field.';
                }
                field("Base Amount Type"; Rec."Base Amount Type")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Base Amount Type.';
                }
                field(Amount; Rec.Amount)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption(Amount), Rec."Forecast No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Cost Amount.';
                }
                field("Charging Method"; Rec."Charging Method")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies whether the cost amount is included in the main unit price or calculated as a separate sales line.';
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price for this cost when it is charged on a separate sales line.';
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the margin percentage for separate charging.';
                }
                field("Margin Amount"; Rec."Margin Amount")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Margin Amount"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the margin amount for separate charging.';
                }
                field(Percentage; Rec.Percentage)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Amount percentage.';
                }
                field("Allocate to Service Item"; Rec."Allocate to Service Item")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Allocation to Service Item.';
                }
                field("Allocate to Trade No."; Rec."Allocate to Trade No.")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Allocation to Trade No.';
                }
