                field("Eqipment Line No."; Rec."Equipment Line No.")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies linked Equipment Line No.';
                }
            }
            group(Totals)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field("Total Costs"; TotalCosts)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostsLbl, Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Cost Amounts from all cost lines.';
                }
            }
        }
    }

    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        TotalCosts: Decimal;
        TotalCostsLbl: Label 'Total Costs';

    trigger OnAfterGetCurrRecord()
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.CalculateCostsSubPageTotals(Rec, TotalCosts);
    end;
}
page 5446138 "TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqp Arch."
{
    ApplicationArea = All;
    Caption = 'Additional Configuration';
    ContextSensitiveHelpPage = '/machine-trade/trade-price-management/trade-dms-forecast';
    DeleteAllowed = false;
    Editable = false;
    InsertAllowed = false;
    PageType = ListPart;
    ShowFilter = false;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch.";
    UsageCategory = None;

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            repeater(Group)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field(Type; Rec.Type)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies type of Configuration';
                }
                field("No."; Rec."No.")
                {
                    ShowMandatory = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Number of Configuration';
                }
                field("Vendor Item No."; Rec."Vendor Item No.")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Vendor Item No. of Additional Configuration';
                }
                field("Status (Purchase)"; GetServiceItemStatus(Rec))
                {
                    Caption = 'Status (Purchase)';
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Status of Purchase Order for Additional Configuration';
                }
                field("Purchase Order Type"; Rec."Purchase Order Type")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Show Purchase Order Types that can be used for Configuration-Purchases.';
                }
                field("Responsibility Center"; Rec."Responsibility Center")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Responsibility Center that will be used in the Purchase Order for Additional Configuration.';
                }
                field("Location Code"; Rec."Location Code")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Location Code, that will be used in the Purchase Order for Additional Configuration.';
                }
                field("Linked to Workshop"; Rec."Linked to Workshop")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies connection to Services';
                }
                field("Charging Method"; Rec."Charging Method")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies how this line is included in the calculation worksheet price and on the sales document.';
                }
                field(Description; Rec.Description)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Description of Configuration';
                }
                field("Unit of Measure"; Rec."Unit of Measure")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the Unit of Measure of the Item.';
                }
                field(Quantity; Rec.Quantity)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Configuration Quantity';
                }
                field("List Price"; Rec."List Price")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("List Price"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Configuration List Price';
                }
                field("Discount %"; Rec."Discount %")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Configuration Discount %';
                }
                field("Direct Unit Cost"; Rec."Direct Unit Cost")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Direct Unit Cost"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Configuration Direct Unit Cost';
                }
                field("Line Amount"; Rec."Line Amount")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Line Amount"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Configuration Line Amount';
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    BlankZero = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Margin % field';
                }
                field("Margin Amount"; Rec."Margin Amount")
                {
                    BlankZero = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Margin Amount field';
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price when this line is calculated separately.';
                }
                field("Calculated Sales Price"; Rec."Calculated Sales Price")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Configuration Calculated Sales Price';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field("Calculate Separately"; Rec."Calculate Separately")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should price be Calculated Separately';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field("Show in Sales Document"; Rec."Show in Sales Document")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should Configuration be shown in Sales Document';
                }
                field("Comments exist"; Rec."Comments exist")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies does Configuration have Comments';
                }
                field("Vendor Name"; Rec."Vendor Name")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Configuration Vendor Name';
                }
                field("Purchase Document No."; Rec."Purchase Document No.")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies External Configuration linked Purchase Document No.';
                    Visible = false;

                    trigger OnDrillDown()
                    begin
                        OpenLinkedPurchaseDocument();
                    end;
                }
            }
            group(Totals)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field("Total Equip. List Price"; TotalEquipListPrice)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalListPriceLbl, Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Line Amount (List Price) from all configuration lines.';
                }
                field("Total Equip. Costs"; TotalEquipCosts)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostsLbl, Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    DrillDown = false;
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Line Amount (Direct Unit Costs) from all configuration lines.';
                }
                field("Total Equip. Calc. Sales Price"; TotalEquipCalcSalesPrice)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCalcSalesPriceLbl, Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Line Amounts from all configuration lines.';
                }
            }
        }
    }

    actions
    {
        area(Processing)
        {
            group(Purchase)
            {
                Caption = 'Purchase';
                Image = Purchase;
                action("TSRD Open Purchase Document")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Open document';
                    Enabled = Rec."Purchase Document No." <> '';
                    Image = Document;
                    ToolTip = 'Opens the Purchase Document that is created from this Configuration.';

                    trigger OnAction()
                    begin
                        OpenLinkedPurchaseDocument();
                    end;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    trigger OnAfterGetCurrRecord()
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.CalculateExternalEquipmentSubPageTotals(Rec, TotalEquipListPrice, TotalEquipCosts, TotalEquipCalcSalesPrice);
    end;


    local procedure GetServiceItemStatus(CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch."): Enum "TSRM Status(Purchase)"
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
    begin
        if CalcExternalEquipment.Type <> CalcExternalEquipment.Type::"Service Item" then
            exit("TSRM Status(Purchase)"::" ");
        if not ServiceItem.Get(CalcExternalEquipment."No.") then
            exit("TSRM Status(Purchase)"::" ");
        exit(ServiceItem."TSRM Status(Purchase)");
    end;

    internal procedure OpenLinkedPurchaseDocument()
    var
        PurchaseInvoiceHeader: Record "Purch. Inv. Header";
        PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header";
    begin
        case Rec."Purchase Document Type" of
            Rec."Purchase Document Type"::Order:
                if PurchaseHeader.Get(PurchaseHeader."Document Type"::Order, Rec."Purchase Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Purchase Order", PurchaseHeader);
            Rec."Purchase Document Type"::"Posted Invoice":
                if PurchaseInvoiceHeader.Get(Rec."Purchase Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Posted Purchase Invoice", PurchaseInvoiceHeader);
        end
    end;

    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        TotalEquipCalcSalesPrice: Decimal;
        TotalEquipCosts: Decimal;
        TotalEquipListPrice: Decimal;
        TotalCalcSalesPriceLbl: Label 'Total Calc. Sales Price';
        TotalCostsLbl: Label 'Total Costs';
        TotalListPriceLbl: Label 'Total List Price';
}
page 5446137 "TSRD Calc. Ext Eqp. Arch. Lup"
{
    ApplicationArea = All;
    Caption = 'Additional Configuration Archive Lookup';
    DelayedInsert = true;
    Editable = false;
    PageType = List;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch.";
    UsageCategory = None;

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            repeater(Group)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field(Type; Rec.Type)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies type of Additional Configuration';
                }
                field("No."; Rec."No.")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Number of Additional Configuration';
                }
                field("Vendor Item No."; Rec."Vendor Item No.")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Vendor Item No. of Extermal Equipment';
                }
                field(Description; Rec.Description)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Description of Additional Configuration';
                }
                field(Quantity; Rec.Quantity)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Quantity';
                }
                field("List Price"; Rec."List Price")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration List Price';
                }
                field("Discount %"; Rec."Discount %")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Discount %';
                }
                field("Direct Unit Cost"; Rec."Direct Unit Cost")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Direct Unit Cost';
                }
                field("Line Amount"; Rec."Line Amount")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Line Amount';
                }
                field("Charging Method"; Rec."Charging Method")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies how this line is included in the calculation worksheet price and on the sales document.';
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price when this line is calculated separately.';
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Margin % field';
                }
                field("Calculated Sales Price"; Rec."Calculated Sales Price")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Calculated Sales Price';
                }
                field("Calculate Separately"; Rec."Calculate Separately")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should price be Calculated Separately';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field("Show in Sales Document"; Rec."Show in Sales Document")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should Additional Configuration be shown in Sales Document';
                }
                field("Vendor Name"; Rec."Vendor Name")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Additional Configuration Vendor Name';
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

table 5446036 "TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch."
{
    Caption = 'Additional Configuration Archive';
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Eqp. Arch. Lup";
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Eqp. Arch. Lup";

    fields
    {
        #region normal fields
        field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast Arch."."No." where("Document Version No." = field("Document Version No."));
        }
        field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
        }
        field(6; "No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = if (Type = const(Item)) Item."No."
            else
            if (Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."No." where("TSRM In Stock As" = filter("Current Asset" | "Fixed Asset"))
            else
            if (Type = const(Comment)) "Standard Text".Code;
        }
        field(7; "Unit of Measure"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Unit of Measure';
            TableRelation = if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const(Item)) "Item Unit of Measure".Code where("Item No." = field("No."))
            else
            if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."Unit of Measure Code" where("No." = field("No."))
            else
            "Unit of Measure".Code;
        }
        field(9; Type; Enum "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Type';
        }
        field(10; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(12; Quantity; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Quantity';
        }
        field(13; "List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'List Price';
        }
        field(14; "Direct Unit Cost"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Direct Unit Cost';
        }
        field(15; "Line Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Line Amount';
        }
        field(16; "Discount %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Discount % (List Price)';
        }
        field(17; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
        }
        field(19; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption();
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(30; "Calculated Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
        }
        field(31; "Calculate Separately"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculate Separately';
        }
        field(32; "Show in Sales Document"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show in Sales Document';
            InitValue = true;
        }
        field(33; "Comments exist"; Boolean)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Forecast Comment Arch." where("Comment Type" = const("External Equipment"), "No." = field("Forecast No."),
                                                                    "Document Line No." = field("Line No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Comments exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(36; "Attached to Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Attached to Line No.';
        }
        field(40; "Vendor No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor No.';
            TableRelation = Vendor."No.";
        }
        field(41; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor Name';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(50; "Workshop Line No."; Integer)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Services to Line No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(51; "Linked to Workshop"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. Workshop Arch." where("Line No." = field("Workshop Line No."),
                                                                  "Forecast No." = field("Forecast No."),
                                                                  "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Linked to Services';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(52; "Line Amount (List Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Line Amount (List Price)';
        }
        field(54; "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)';
        }
        field(60; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(61; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(62; "Purchase Document Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Line No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(67; "Discounted Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Discounted Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(70; "Vendor Item No."; Text[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor Item No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(75; "Purchase Order Type"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Order Type';
            TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Purchase" = const(true));
        }
        field(80; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
            TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;
        }
        field(85; "Location Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Location Code';
            TableRelation = Location.Code;
        }
        field(90; "Service Item Doc. Data Comment"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item Document Data Comment';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(100; "Attached Equipment"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Attached Equipmen';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(110; "Linked to Service Item"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Linked to Service Item';
        }
        field(120; "Line Action"; Enum "TSRD Service Line Action")
        {
            Caption = 'Line Action';
        }
        field(121; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Equip. Chrg. Method")
        {
            Caption = 'Charging Method';
        }
        field(122; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
        }
        #endregion normal fields
        #region Archive fields
        field(900; "Archive Entry No."; Integer)
        {
            AutoIncrement = true;
            Caption = 'Archive Entry No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(901; "Document Version No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Document Version No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(902; "Archived On (Date)"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived On (Date)';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(903; "Archive On (Time)"; Time)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived On (Time)';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(904; "Archived By"; Guid)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived By';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(905; "Archived By (Name)"; Code[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup(User."User Name" where("User Security ID" = field("Archived By")));
            Caption = 'Archived By (Name)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        #endregion Archive fields
    }

    keys
    {
        key(SK; "Archive Entry No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
        key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.", "Document Version No.")
        {
        }
    }

    fieldgroups
    {
        fieldgroup(DropDown; Type, "No.", Description)
        { }
    }

    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
}
table 5446032 "TSRD Calc. Forecast Arch."
{
    Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet Archive';
    DataCaptionFields = "No.", Description;
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Forecast Archive";
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Forecasts Archive";

    fields
    {
        #region normal fields
        field(1; "No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(2; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(3; "Vendor No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = Vendor."No.";
        }
        field(4; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor Name';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(5; "Manufacturer Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Manufacturer';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = Manufacturer.Code;
        }
        field(6; "Category Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Category';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Category"."Code";
        }
        field(7; "Subcategory Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Subcategory';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Subcategory"."Code" where("Category Code" = field("Category Code"));
        }
        field(8; "Model Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Model';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Model"."Code" where("Manufacturer Code" = field("Manufacturer Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code"), "Subcategory Code" = field("Subcategory Code"));
            ValidateTableRelation = false;
        }
        field(9; "Manufacturer Name"; Text[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup(Manufacturer.Name where(Code = field("Manufacturer Code")));
            Caption = 'Manufacturer Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(10; "Category Name"; Text[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Category".Name where(Code = field("Category Code")));
            Caption = 'Category Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(11; "Subcategory Name"; Text[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Subcategory".Name where(Code = field("Subcategory Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code")));
            Caption = 'Subcategory Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(12; "Model Name"; Text[100])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Model".Name where(Code = field("Model Code"), "Manufacturer Code" = field("Manufacturer Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code"), "Subcategory Code" = field("Subcategory Code")));
            Caption = 'Model Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(13; "Service Item No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "Service Item"."No.";
        }
        field(14; "Calc. Sales Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Configure Price Quote No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast Arch."."No." where("Document Version No." = field("Document Version No."));
        }
        field(15; Status; Enum "TSRD Calc. Status")
        {
            Caption = 'Status';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(16; "Series Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Series Code';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(17; "Series Name"; Text[100])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Series".Name where(Code = field("Series Code")));
            Caption = 'Series Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(18; "Creation Date"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Creation Date';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(19; "Creation by User"; Code[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Creation by User ID';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(20; "Last Date Modified"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Last Date Modified';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(21; "Last Modified by User"; Code[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Last Modified by User ID';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(22; "Base Code"; Code[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Base Code';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(23; "List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'List Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(25; "Purchase Document Exist"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("Purchase Header" where("TSRD Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(26; "Sales Document Exist"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("Sales Header" where("TSRD Sales Forecast No." = filter(<> ''), "TSRD Sales Forecast No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No.")));
            Caption = 'Sales Document Exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(27; Closed; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Closed';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(28; "Customer No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Customer No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = Customer."No.";
        }
        field(29; "Customer Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Customer Name';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(30; "Contact No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Contact No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = Contact."No.";
        }
        field(31; "Contact Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Contact Name';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(32; "List Price Conf. Options"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration Arch"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'List Price Configuration Options';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(33; "Configuration Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration Arch"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Configuration Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(34; "Total Discount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Purch. Disc. Arch."."Discount Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Total Purchase Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(35; "Workshop Amount Labour"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop Arch."."Amount (Labor)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Services Amount Labor';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(36; "Workshop Amount Parts"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop Arch."."Amount (Parts)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Services Amount Parts';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(37; "Workshop Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop Arch."."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(Included), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Services Amount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(38; "Total Costs"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost Arch.".Amount where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(Included), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Total Costs';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(39; "Equipment List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch."."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Equipment List Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(40; "Equipment Cost"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch."."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Equipment Cost';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(41; "Equipment Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch."."Line Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(Included), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Equipment Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(42; "Equipment (Separate)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch."."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Equipment (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(44; "Total Sales Discount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Sales Disc. Arch."."Discount Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Total Sales Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(45; "Base Machine List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Base Machine List Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            MinValue = 0;
        }
        field(50; Template; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Template';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(60; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(61; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(62; "Service Item Created"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item Created';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(70; "Location Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Location Code';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = Location.Code;
        }
        field(80; "Calculated Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            Caption = 'Calculated Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(CalculatedMarginLbl, ' %');
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
            MinValue = 0.0001;
        }
        field(81; "Calculated Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(82; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            MinValue = 0;
        }
        field(83; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            MinValue = 0;
        }
        field(84; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            CaptionClass = GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(), Rec."Calculation Currency");
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(90; "Workshop (Separate)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop Arch."."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Services (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(203; "Add. Conf. Cost (Sep.)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch."."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration Price (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(204; "Service Amount (Sep.)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop Arch."."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Service Amount (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(205; "Cost Amount (Sep.)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost Arch.".Amount where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Total Costs (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(206; "Costs Sales Price (Sep.)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost Arch."."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const(CalcSeparately), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Costs (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(96; "Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration Arch"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Discount" = const(true), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Direct unit cost Price with Calc. Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(100; "Return Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Forecast Ret Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Return Type';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(101; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(102; "Created from Template"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. Forecast Arch." where("No." = field("Template Forecast No."), Template = const(true), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Created from Template';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(103; Quantity; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Quantity';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
            InitValue = 1;
            MinValue = 1;
        }
        field(104; "Template Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet Template No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(105; "Sort No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Sort No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(106; "Version No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Version No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(107; "System-Created"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'System-Created';
            DataClassification = SystemMetadata;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(108; "Service Item Status(Purchase)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Purchase)")
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("Service Item"."TSRM Status(Purchase)" where("No." = field("Service Item No.")));
            Caption = 'Status (Purchase)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(109; "Service Item Status (Sales)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Sales)")
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("Service Item"."TSRM Status(Sales)" where("No." = field("Service Item No.")));
            Caption = 'Status (Sales)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(110; "Sales Calculation Status"; Enum "TSRD Sales Calculation Status")
        {
            Caption = 'Configure Price Quote Status';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(111; "Standard Equipment"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD St. Equipment Arch." where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Standard Configuration';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(121; "Show List Prices"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show List Prices';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(122; "Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(123; "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Surcharge Amount (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(124; "Surcharge % (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            Caption = 'Surcharge % (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(125; "Purchase Order Type"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Order Type';
            TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Purchase" = const(true));
        }
        field(126; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
            TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;
        }
        field(127; "Fix Price allowed"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Fix Price allowed';
        }
        field(128; "Calculated Machine Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Machine Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(129; "Show calculated Sales Prices"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show calculated Sales Prices';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(130; "Includes Sales Discount"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Includes Sales Discount';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(131; "FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Fixed Asset Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(132; "VAT Prod. Posting Group"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'VAT Prod. Posting Group';
            TableRelation = "VAT Product Posting Group".Code;
        }
        field(135; "Sales Price incl. VAT"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price incl. VAT';
        }
        field(140; "VAT %"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'VAT %';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(145; "VAT Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'VAT Amount';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(150; "Service Item In Stock As"; Enum "TSRM In Stock As")
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item In Stock As';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(151; "Calculated Price (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Price (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(152; "Configuration Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration Arch"."Calculated Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Configuration Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(160; "Calculation Currency"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Currency';
            TableRelation = Currency.Code;
        }
        field(165; "Calc Currency Exchange Rate"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Currency Exchange Rate';
            DecimalPlaces = 4;
            InitValue = 1;
        }
        field(170; "Calculated Sales Price (SCC)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(175; "Sales Price (SCC)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            MinValue = 0;
        }
        field(180; "Sales Currency Exchange Rate"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Currency Exchange Rate';
            DecimalPlaces = 4;
            Editable = false;
            InitValue = 1;
        }
        field(185; "Sales Currency"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Currency';
            Editable = false;
            TableRelation = Currency.Code;
        }
        field(190; "Service Item Calculation"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item Calculation Worksheet';
            Editable = false;
        }
        #endregion normal fields
        #region Archive fields
        field(900; "Archive Entry No."; Integer)
        {
            AutoIncrement = true;
            Caption = 'Archive Entry No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(901; "Document Version No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Document Version No.';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(902; "Archived On (Date)"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived On (Date)';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(903; "Archive On (Time)"; Time)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived On (Time)';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(904; "Archived By"; Guid)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived By';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(905; "Archived By (Name)"; Code[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup(User."User Name" where("User Security ID" = field("Archived By")));
            Caption = 'Archived By (Name)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        #endregion Archive fields
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; "Archive Entry No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
        key(SK; "No.", "Document Version No.")
        { }
        key(Sorting; "Sort No.", "No.")
        { }
    }

    local procedure GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode: Text; Currency: Code[10]): Text
    var
        GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
    begin
        if Currency = '' then
            exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
        GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
        if Currency = GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code" then
            exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
        exit(StrSubstNo('%1 (%2)', CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode, Currency));
    end;

    internal procedure GetStatusStyleText() StatusStyleText: Text
    begin
        case Status of
            Status::Open:
                StatusStyleText := 'Favorable';
            Status::Alternative:
                StatusStyleText := 'StrongAccent'
            else
                StatusStyleText := 'Strong';
        end;

        OnAfterGetStatusStyleText(Rec, StatusStyleText);
    end;

    internal procedure GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() BaseMachineListPriceSales: Decimal
    var
        Handled: Boolean;
    begin
        OnBeforeGetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, BaseMachineListPriceSales);
        if Handled then
            exit;
        exit(Rec."Base Machine List Price");
    end;

    internal procedure GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() ListPriceSales: Decimal
    var
        Handled: Boolean;
    begin
        OnBeforeGetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, ListPriceSales);
        if Handled then
            exit;
        exit(Rec."List Price");
    end;

    procedure GetCalculatedUnitCost() CalculatedUnitCost: Decimal
    begin
        CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount", "Configuration Price", "List Price Conf. Options");
        case true of
            "Show calculated Sales Prices":
                CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."Configuration Price"
                                       + "Base Machine List Price"
                                       + "Equipment Price"
                                       + "Total Costs"
                                       + "Workshop Amount"
                                       - "Total Discount";
            "Show List Prices":
                CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price Conf. Options"
                                           + "Base Machine List Price"
                                           + "Equipment Price"
                                           + "Total Costs"
                                           + "Workshop Amount"
                                           - "Total Discount";
            else
                CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price"
                                           + "Equipment Price"
                                           + "Total Costs"
                                           + "Workshop Amount"
                                           - "Total Discount";
        end;
    end;

    internal procedure GetCalculatedUnitPrice() CalculatedUnitPrice: Decimal
    begin
        CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Sales Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount");
        CalculatedUnitPrice := Rec.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc()
                                   + "Equipment Price"
                                   + "Total Costs"
                                   + "Workshop Amount"
                                   - "Total Sales Discount";
    end;

    [TryFunction]
    internal procedure GetFromNoAndDocVersion(ForecastNo: Code[20]; DocumentVersionNo: Integer)
    begin
        SetRange("No.", ForecastNo);
        SetRange("Document Version No.", DocumentVersionNo);
        FindFirst();
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterGetStatusStyleText(CalcForecastArch: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast Arch."; var StatusStyleText: Text)
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeGetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast Arch."; Handled: Boolean; var BaseMachineListPriceSales: Decimal)
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeGetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast Arch."; Handled: Boolean; var ListPriceSales: Decimal)
    begin
    end;

    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        CalculatedMarginLbl: Label 'Calc. ';
}
table 5446037 "TSRD Calc. Workshop Arch."
{
    Caption = 'Services Archive';
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Wshop Arch. Lookup";
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Wshop Arch. Lookup";

    fields
    {
        #region normal lines
        field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast Arch."."No." where("Document Version No." = field("Document Version No."));
        }
        field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
        }
        field(5; "Calculate Separately"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculate Separately';
        }
        field(8; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Charging Method")
        {
            Caption = 'Charging Method';
        }
        field(16; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
        }
        field(17; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
        }
        field(18; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
        }
        field(6; "Show in Sales Document"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show in Sales Document';
        }
        field(7; "Standard Service Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Standard Service Code';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "Standard Service Code".Code;
        }
        field(10; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(11; "Default Worktime Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Default Worktime Amount';
        }
        field(13; "Amount (Labor)"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Amount (Labor)';
        }
        field(14; "Amount (Parts)"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Amount (Parts)';
        }
        field(15; "Total Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Total Amount';
        }
        field(20; "Service Document Type"; Option)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Document Type';
            Editable = false;
            OptionCaption = ' ,Order,Quote,Invoice';
            OptionMembers = " ","Order",Quote,Invoice;
        }
        field(21; "Service Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Service Document';
            Editable = false;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(24; "Linked to External Equipment"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch." where("Workshop Line No." = field("Line No."),
                                                                "Forecast No." = field("Forecast No."),
                                                                "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Linked to Additional Configuration';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(25; "Comments exist"; Boolean)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Forecast Comment Arch." where("Comment Type" = const(Workshops), "No." = field("Forecast No."),
                                                                    "Document Line No." = field("Line No."), "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.")));
            Caption = 'Comments exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(30; "Service Order Type"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Service Order Type';
            TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Service" = const(true));
        }
        field(31; "Capitalized Service"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("Service Order Type"."TSRD Capitalized Service" where("Code" = field("Service Order Type")));
            Caption = 'Capitalized Service';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(35; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
            TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;
        }
        field(40; "Location Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Location Code';
            TableRelation = Location.Code;
        }
        field(50; "Line Action"; Enum "TSRD Service Line Action")
        {
            Caption = 'Line Action';
        }
        #endregion normal lines
        #region Archive fields
        field(900; "Archive Entry No."; Integer)
        {
            AutoIncrement = true;
            Caption = 'Archive Entry No.';
        }
        field(901; "Document Version No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Document Version No.';
        }
        field(902; "Archived On (Date)"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived On (Date)';
        }
        field(903; "Archive On (Time)"; Time)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived On (Time)';
        }
        field(904; "Archived By"; Guid)
        {
            Caption = 'Archived By';
        }
        field(905; "Archived By (Name)"; Code[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup(User."User Name" where("User Security ID" = field("Archived By")));
            Caption = 'Archived By (Name)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        #endregion Archive fields
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; "Archive Entry No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
        key(SK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.", "Document Version No.")
        {
        }
    }
}
page 5446147 "TSRD Calc. Workshops Arch."
{
    ApplicationArea = All;
    Caption = 'Services';
    ContextSensitiveHelpPage = '/machine-trade/trade-price-management/trade-dms-forecast';
    Editable = false;
    PageType = ListPart;
    ShowFilter = false;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Workshop Arch.";
    UsageCategory = None;
    InsertAllowed = false;
    DeleteAllowed = false;

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            repeater(Group)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field("Standard Service Code"; Rec."Standard Service Code")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Standard Service Code';
                }
                field("Default Worktime Amount"; Rec."Default Worktime Amount")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Default Worktime Amount';
                }
                field("Linked to Equipment"; Rec."Linked to External Equipment")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies connection to additional configuration';
                }
                field("Responsibility Center"; Rec."Responsibility Center")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Resp. Center for the Service Orders.';
                }
                field(Description; Rec.Description)
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Description of Services';
                }
                field("Order Type"; Rec."Service Order Type")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Service Order Type for Service Orders.';
                }
                field("Location Code"; Rec."Location Code")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Defines the Location Code for Service Orders.';
                }
                field("Amount (Labor)"; Rec."Amount (Labor)")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Amount (Labor)"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Amount (Labor)';
                }
                field("Amount (Parts)"; Rec."Amount (Parts)")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Amount (Parts)"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Amount (Parts)';
                }
                field("Total Amount"; Rec."Total Amount")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Amount"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Total Amount';
                }
                field("Charging Method"; Rec."Charging Method")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies whether the service amount is included in the main unit price or invoiced separately.';
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sales price when the service is charged separately.';
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the margin percentage when the service is charged separately.';
                }
                field("Margin Amount"; Rec."Margin Amount")
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Margin Amount"), Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the margin amount when the service is charged separately.';
                }
                field("Link to Service Document No."; Rec."Service Document No.")
                {
                    Enabled = Rec."Service Document No." <> '';
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Services Linked Service Document';

                    trigger OnDrillDown()
                    begin
                        OpenLinkedServiceDocument();
                    end;
                }
                field("Calculate Separately"; Rec."Calculate Separately")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies is Services Calculated Separately';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field("Show in Sales Document"; Rec."Show in Sales Document")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies should Services be shown in Sales Document';
                }
                field("Comments exist"; Rec."Comments exist")
                {
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies does Services have Comments';
                }
            }
            group(Totals)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                field("Total Cost Amount (Labour)"; TotalCostsAmountLabour)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostAmountLaborLbl, Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Cost Amounts (Labor) in the Services lines.';
                }
                field("Total Cost Amount (Parts)"; TotalCostsAmountParts)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostAmountPartsLbl, Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    DrillDown = false;
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Cost Amounts (Parts) in the Services lines.';
                }
                field("Total Cost Amount"; TotalCostsAmount)
                {
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(TotalCostAmountLbl, Rec."Forecast No.", Rec."Document Version No.");
                    Editable = false;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Cost Amounts in the Services lines.';
                }
            }
        }
    }
    actions
    {

        area(Processing)
        {
            action(TSRAddLineComment)
            {
                ApplicationArea = Basic, Suite;
                Caption = 'Add Comment Lines';
                Image = ViewComments;
                ObsoleteState = Pending;
                ObsoleteTag = '2402.250600';
                ObsoleteReason = 'Comments shall never be used in an archive';
                Visible = false;
                RunObject = page "TSRD Sale Fore. Arch. Comments";
                RunPageLink = "Comment Type" = const(Workshops),
                              "No." = field("Forecast No."),
                              "Document Line No." = field("Line No."),
                              "Document Version No." = field("Document Version No.");
                ToolTip = 'Add Comment Lines to Services';
            }
        }

    }

    trigger OnAfterGetCurrRecord()
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.CalculateWorkshopsSubPageTotals(Rec, TotalCostsAmountLabour, TotalCostsAmountParts, TotalCostsAmount);
    end;

    internal procedure OpenLinkedServiceDocument()
    var
        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
        ServiceInvoiceHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header";
    begin
        case Rec."Service Document Type" of
            Rec."Service Document Type"::Order:
                if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Order, Rec."Service Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Service Order", ServiceHeader);
            Rec."Service Document Type"::Quote:
                if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceHeader."Document Type"::Quote, Rec."Service Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Service Quote", ServiceHeader);
            Rec."Service Document Type"::Invoice:
                if ServiceInvoiceHeader.Get(Rec."Service Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Posted Service Invoice", ServiceInvoiceHeader);
        end
    end;

    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        TotalCostsAmount: Decimal;
        TotalCostsAmountLabour: Decimal;
        TotalCostsAmountParts: Decimal;
        TotalCostAmountLaborLbl: Label 'Total Cost Amount (Labor)';
        TotalCostAmountLbl: Label 'Total Cost Amount';
        TotalCostAmountPartsLbl: Label 'Total Cost Amount (Parts)';
}
codeunit 5445959 "TSRD Upgrade Tag Definitions"
{
    Access = Internal;

    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Upgrade Tag", 'OnGetPerCompanyUpgradeTags', '', false, false)]
    local procedure RegisterPerCompanyTags(var PerCompanyUpgradeTags: List of [Code[250]])
    begin
        AddAllPerCompanyUpgradeTags(PerCompanyUpgradeTags);
    end;

    internal procedure AddAllPerCompanyUpgradeTags(var UpgradeTags: List of [Code[250]])
    begin
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateToCommissionCalculationV2());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateToArchServiceCommentLine());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateCalcEquipmentDiscounts());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateDiscountGroupMapping());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateWarrentyClaimHeaderManufaturerCode());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdatePriceListLinesVendorItemNo());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateCalcForecastCalcSalesForecastNo());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateFreightChargeMappings());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateTransferCalcSalesForecastLineToCalcForecast());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateTradeNoCommissionLineArchive());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateCalcDiscountTypeField());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateServiceCharges());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpgradeCalcForecastAddedFields());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateForecastTemplateQuantity());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateSalesForecast());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateCalcConfigCommentLines());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateCatalogsPartialPriceFile());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateServiceLocationOnServiceItem());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateDefaultMargin());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateChecklistRelation());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateVendorItemNo());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateWarrantyPosting());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateFixServiceLineFieldIDs());
        UpgradeTags.add(UpdateVendorItemNoInDocuments());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts());
        UpgradeTags.Add(DeleteCalcSalesDiscountsWithoutForecast());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateDefaultMarginToMinimumMargin());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateWrongPriceOnItem());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateFullPriceFileCatalog());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateCatalogPriceListItemUOM());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateFulfillmentStatusOnSalesAndServiceLines());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateServiceLinesResourceGroupNo());
        UpgradeTags.Add(CorrectResourceOnServiceLine());
        UpgradeTags.Add(CorrectServiceLedgerEntry());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateHideLineAndPageBreakFields());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateBaseMachinePriceCalcForecast());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateCalcConfigurationLineAmountDirectUnitCost());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateRepairStatusSetFinishingDate());
        UpgradeTags.Add(GetUpdateServiceItemBinCode());
        UpgradeTags.Add(GetUpdateCurrencyExchangeRate());
        UpgradeTags.Add(CreateServiceItemCalculationOfCalculationTemplates());
        UpgradeTags.Add(CorrectAutomaticTransferBoolean());
        UpgradeTags.Add(EmptyServiceLineWarrantyClaimNo());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateServiceOrderType());
        UpgradeTags.Add(GetUpdateExcelTemplateSetup());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateBillToCustomerSalesCalc());
        UpgradeTags.Add(ReplaceStorageSourceTypeServiceItemLine());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsSalesCalculation());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateBarcodePrintoutCaption());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateSalesLineFixedPrice());

        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateCalcConfigurationOptionEntryNo());

        UpgradeTags.Add(GetUpdateDevaluationRuleItemFilters());
        UpgradeTags.Add(GetUpdateForecastEquipment());

        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateFixPriceLogic());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateVendorWarehouseAutomation());
        UpgradeTags.Add(GetUpdateServiceDocCustLedgerEntryNo());
        UpgradeTags.Add(GetSalesHeaderBlockStatus());
        UpgradeTags.Add(GetUpdateDevaluationSetup());
        UpgradeTags.Add(FixCorruptedPriceFactorRecords());
        UpgradeTags.Add(RemoveAttachedToLineNoFromCommentLines());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateEmptyWarrantyClaimNo());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateNonstockItemVendorItemNoUnf());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpgradeMaintInvoicePlan());
        UpgradeTags.Add(UpdateOrderDescriptionServItemLine());
        UpgradeTags.Add(DeleteUnassignedStandardEquipmentLines());
        UpgradeTags.Add(EmptyFillRatesEntryTable());
    end;

codeunit 5445961 "TSRD Upgrade - Traser DMS"
{
    Access = Internal;
    Permissions =
        TableData "Posted Whse. Receipt Line" = RM,
        TableData "Posted Whse. Shipment Line" = RM,
        TableData "Registered Whse. Activity Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Cust. Ledger Entry" = RM,
        tabledata "Vendor Ledger Entry" = RM,
        tabledata "G/L Entry" = RM,
        tabledata "Service Ledger Entry" = RM,
        tabledata "Sales Header" = RM,
        tabledata "Sales Invoice Header" = RM,
        tabledata "Sales Cr.Memo Header" = RM,
        tabledata "Sales Header Archive" = RM,
        tabledata "Sales Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Sales Invoice Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Sales Cr.Memo Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Service Item Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Service Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Service Invoice Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Service Cr.Memo Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Service Shipment Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Requisition Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Item Journal Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Purch. Rcpt. Line" = RM,
        tabledata "Sales Shipment Line" = RM,
        tabledata "TSRD Man. Conf. Std Equip" = RD;

    Subtype = Upgrade;

    var
        UpgradeTagDefinitions: Codeunit "TSRD Upgrade Tag Definitions";
        UpgradeTag: Codeunit "Upgrade Tag";

    trigger OnUpgradePerCompany()
    begin
        UpdateToCommissionCalculationV2();
        UpdateToArchServiceCommentLine();
        UpdateCalcEquipmentDiscounts();
        UpdateDiscountGroupMapping();
        UpdateWarrentyClaimHeaderManufaturerCode();
        UpdatePriceListLineVendorItemNo();
        UpgradeCatalogItemDeletedStatus();
        UpgradeItemCatalogItemDeletedStatus();
        UpdateCalcForecastCalcSalesForecastNo();
        UpdateFreightChargeMappings();
        UpdateTransferCalcSalesForecastLineToCalcForecast();
        UpdateTradeNoCommissionLineArchive();
        UpdateCalcDiscountTypeField();
        UpdateServiceCharges();
        UpgradeCalcForcastAddedFields();
        UpdateForecastTemplateQuantity();
        UpdateSalesForecast();
        UpdateCalcConfigCommentLines();
        UpdateCatalogsPartialPriceFile();
        UpdateServiceLocationOnServiceItem();
        UpdateVendorItemNo();
        UpdateWarrantyPosting();
        UpdateFixServiceLineFieldIDs();
        UpdateVendorItemNoInDocuments();
        UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts();
        UpdateDefaultMargin();
        UpdateChecklistRelation();
        UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts();
        DeleteCalcSalesDiscountsWithoutForecast();
        UpdateDefaultMarginToMinimumMargin();
        UpdateWrongPriceOnItem();
        UpdateCatalogPriceListItemUOM();
        UpdateFulfillmentStatusOnSalesAndServiceLines();
        UpdateFullPriceFileCatalog();
        UpdateServiceLinesResourceGroupNo();
        UpdateHideLineAndPageBreakFields();
        CorrectResourceOnServiceLine();
        CorrectServiceLedgerEntry();
        UpdateBaseMachinePriceCalcForecast();
        UpdateCalcConfigurationLineAmountDirectUnitCost();
        UpdateServiceItemBinCode();
        UpdateRepairStatusSetFinishingDate();
        UpdateCurrencyExchangeRate();
        CreateServiceItemCalculationOfCalculationTemplates();
        UpdateServiceOrderType();
        CorrectAutomaticTransferBoolean();
        EmptyServiceLineWarrantyClaimNo();
        UpdateExcelTemplateSetup();
        UpdateBillToCustomerSalesCalc();
        ReplaceStorageSourceTypeServiceItemLine();
        UpdateDiscountSurchargeFields();
        UpdateBarcodePrintoutCaption();
        UpdateSalesLineFixedPrice();
        UpdateCalcEquipmentToCalcOption();
        UpdateCalcConfigurationOptionEntryNo();
        UpdateCalcConfigurationImportLines();
        UpdateServOrderTypesReserveField();
        UpdateCalcDefaultSalesAndPurchaseDiscounts();
        UpdateMissingCustomerNoOnMaintenanceLines();
        UpdateZeroPriceWarningBehavior();
        UpdateDevaluationRuleItemFilters();
        UpdateForecastEquipment();
        UpgradeCalcWorksheetChargingFieldsFeat29748();
        UpdateFixPriceLogic();
        UpdateVendorWarehouseAutomation();
        UpdateServiceDocCustLedgerEntryNo();
        UpdateSalesHeaderBlockStatus();
        UpdateDevaluationSetup();
        FixCorruptedPriceFactorRecords();
        RemoveAttachedToLineNoFromCommentLines();
        UpdateEmptyWarrantyClaimNo();
        UpdateNonstockItemVendorItemNoUnf();
        UpgradeMaintInvoicePlan();
        MoveQuoteStatusToMachine();
        UpdateOrderDescriptionServItemLine();
        DeleteUnassignedStandardEquipmentLines();
        EmptyFillRatesEntryTable();
    end;

    trigger OnUpgradePerDatabase()
    begin
        UpdateExtensibleInvoicePostingEngine();
    end;

    #region UpdateToCommissionCalculationV2

    local procedure UpdateToCommissionCalculationV2()
    var
        CommissionCalculation: Record "TSR Commission Calculation";
        CommissionLine: Record "TSR Commission Line";
        CommissionLineArchive: Record "TSR Commission Line Archive";
        CommissionMigration: Record "TSR Commission Migration";
        CommissionSummationSetup: Record "TSR Commission Summation Setup";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateToCommissionCalculationV2()) then
            exit;

        if not CommissionCalculation.IsEmpty() then begin
            CommissionCalculation.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if CommissionCalculation.Calculation = CommissionCalculation.Calculation::"TSRD Machine" then begin
                    CommissionCalculation."Calculation V2" := "TSR Commission Calculation V2".FromInteger(CommissionCalculation.Calculation.AsInteger());
                    CommissionCalculation.Modify();
                end;
            until CommissionCalculation.Next() = 0;
        end;

        if not CommissionLine.IsEmpty() then begin
            CommissionLine.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if CommissionLine.Calculation = CommissionLine.Calculation::"TSRD Machine" then begin
                    CommissionLine."Calculation V2" := "TSR Commission Calculation V2".FromInteger(CommissionLine.Calculation.AsInteger());
                    CommissionLine.Modify();
                end;
            until CommissionLine.Next() = 0;
        end;

        if not CommissionLineArchive.IsEmpty() then begin
            CommissionLineArchive.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if CommissionLineArchive.Calculation = CommissionLineArchive.Calculation::"TSRD Machine" then begin
                    CommissionLineArchive."Calculation V2" := "TSR Commission Calculation V2".FromInteger(CommissionLineArchive.Calculation.AsInteger());
                    CommissionLineArchive.Modify();
                end;
            until CommissionLineArchive.Next() = 0;
        end;

        if not CommissionMigration.IsEmpty() then begin
            CommissionMigration.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if CommissionMigration.Calculation = CommissionMigration.Calculation::"TSRD Machine" then begin
                    CommissionMigration."Calculation V2" := "TSR Commission Calculation V2".FromInteger(CommissionMigration.Calculation.AsInteger());
                    CommissionMigration.Modify();
                end;
            until CommissionMigration.Next() = 0;
        end;

        if not CommissionSummationSetup.IsEmpty() then begin
            CommissionSummationSetup.FindSet(true);
            repeat
