                if CommissionSummationSetup.Calculation = CommissionSummationSetup.Calculation::"TSRD Machine" then begin
                    CommissionSummationSetup."Calculation V2" := "TSR Commission Calculation V2".FromInteger(CommissionSummationSetup.Calculation.AsInteger());
                    CommissionSummationSetup.Modify();
                end;
            until CommissionSummationSetup.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateToCommissionCalculationV2());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region UpdateToServiceCommentLineArchToArchServiceCommentLine

    local procedure UpdateToArchServiceCommentLine()
    var
        NewArchServiceCommentLine: Record "TSRD Arch Service Comment Line";
        OldArchServiceCommentLine: Record "TSRD Service Comment Line Arch";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateToArchServiceCommentLine()) then
            exit;

        if not OldArchServiceCommentLine.IsEmpty() then begin
            OldArchServiceCommentLine.FindSet();
            repeat
                NewArchServiceCommentLine.TransferFields(OldArchServiceCommentLine);
                NewArchServiceCommentLine.Insert();
            until OldArchServiceCommentLine.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateToArchServiceCommentLine());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region UpgradeCalcEquipmentDiscountPercentage

    local procedure UpdateCalcEquipmentDiscounts()
    var
        CalcEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. Equipment";
    begin

        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcEquipmentDiscounts()) then
            exit;
        //TODO: check if it needs to be deleted
        if not CalcEquipment.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcEquipment.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                CalcEquipment."Discount % (Direct Unit Cost)" /= 100;
                CalcEquipment."Discount % (List Price)" /= 100;
                CalcEquipment.Modify();
            until CalcEquipment.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcEquipmentDiscounts());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region UpdateDiscountGroupMapping

    local procedure UpdateDiscountGroupMapping()
    var
        DiscGroupMapping: Record "TSRD Disc. Group Mapping";
        DiscountGroupMapping: Record "TSRD Discount Group Mapping";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDiscountGroupMapping()) then
            exit;
        if not DiscountGroupMapping.IsEmpty() then begin
            DiscountGroupMapping.FindSet();
            repeat
                if not DiscGroupMapping.Get(DiscountGroupMapping."Manufacturer Code",
                                            DiscountGroupMapping."Purch Item. Disc. Group Code")
                then begin
                    DiscGroupMapping.Init();
                    DiscGroupMapping."Manufacturer Code" := DiscountGroupMapping."Manufacturer Code";
                    DiscGroupMapping."Purch Item. Disc. Group Code" := DiscountGroupMapping."Purch Item. Disc. Group Code";
                    DiscGroupMapping."Item Discount Group Code" := DiscountGroupMapping."Item Discount Group Code";
                    DiscGroupMapping.Description := DiscountGroupMapping.Description;
                    DiscGroupMapping.Insert();
                end;
            until DiscountGroupMapping.Next() = 0;
        end;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDiscountGroupMapping());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region UpdateWarrantyClaim

    local procedure UpdateWarrentyClaimHeaderManufaturerCode()
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        WarrantyClaimHeader: Record "TSRD Warranty Claim Header";
        WarrantyClaimHeader2: Record "TSRD Warranty Claim Header";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateWarrentyClaimHeaderManufaturerCode()) then
            exit;
        WarrantyClaimHeader.SetLoadFields("Manufacturer Code", "Service Item No.");
        WarrantyClaimHeader2.SetLoadFields("Manufacturer Code", "Service Item No.");
        ServiceItem.SetLoadFields("TSRM Manufacturer Code");
        WarrantyClaimHeader.SetRange("Manufacturer Code", '');
        WarrantyClaimHeader.SetFilter("Service Item No.", '<>%1', '');
        if not WarrantyClaimHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
            WarrantyClaimHeader.FindSet();
            repeat
                WarrantyClaimHeader2.Get(WarrantyClaimHeader."No.");
                if not ServiceItem.Get(WarrantyClaimHeader2."Service Item No.") then
                    WarrantyClaimHeader2."Manufacturer Code" := ''
                else
                    WarrantyClaimHeader2."Manufacturer Code" := ServiceItem."TSRM Manufacturer Code";
                WarrantyClaimHeader2.Modify();
            until WarrantyClaimHeader.Next() = 0;
        end;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateWarrentyClaimHeaderManufaturerCode());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region UpdateFreightChargeMappings

    local procedure UpdateFreightChargeMappings()
    var
        ServiceOrderType: Record "Service Order Type";
        FreightChargeMapping: Record "TSRD Freight Charge Mapping";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFreightChargeMappings()) then
            exit;
        if FreightChargeMapping.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFreightChargeMappings());
            exit;
        end;
        FreightChargeMapping.FindSet();
        repeat
            if ServiceOrderType.Get(FreightChargeMapping."Service Order Type") then
                if not ServiceOrderType."TSR Sales" then
                    FreightChargeMapping.Delete(true);
        until FreightChargeMapping.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFreightChargeMappings());
    end;

    #endregion

    local procedure UpdatePriceListLineVendorItemNo()
    var
        PriceListLine: Record "Price List Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdatePriceListLinesVendorItemNo()) then
            exit;
        PriceListLine.SetLoadFields("TSRD Vendor Item No.", "Asset Type", "Asset No.");
        PriceListLine.SetFilter("Asset No.", '<>%1', '');
        PriceListLine.SetFilter("Asset Type", '%1|%2', PriceListLine."Asset Type"::Item, PriceListLine."Asset Type"::"TSRD Nonstock Item");
        if not PriceListLine.IsEmpty() then begin
            PriceListLine.FindSet();
            repeat
                PriceListLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := PriceListLine.GetVendorItemNo();
                PriceListLine.Modify();
            until PriceListLine.Next() = 0;
        end;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdatePriceListLinesVendorItemNo());
    end;

    #region UpgradeCatalogItemDeletedStatus

    local procedure UpgradeCatalogItemDeletedStatus()
    var
        NonstockItem: Record "Nonstock Item";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeCatalogItemDeletedStatus()) then
            exit;
        NonstockItem.SetRange("TSRD Catalog Item Status", "TSRD Catalog Item Status"::Deleted);
        if not NonstockItem.IsEmpty() then
            NonstockItem.ModifyAll("TSRD Catalog Item Status", "TSRD Catalog Item Status"::Deprecated);
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeCatalogItemDeletedStatus());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region UpgradeItemCatalogItemDeletedStatus

    local procedure UpgradeItemCatalogItemDeletedStatus()
    var
        Item: Record Item;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeItemCatalogItemDeletedStatus()) then
            exit;
        Item.SetRange("TSRD Catalog Item Status", "TSRD Catalog Item Status"::Deleted);
        if not Item.IsEmpty() then
            Item.ModifyAll("TSRD Catalog Item Status", "TSRD Catalog Item Status"::Deprecated);
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeItemCatalogItemDeletedStatus());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Calc. Forecast Refactoring

    local procedure UpdateCalcForecastCalcSalesForecastNo()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        CalcSalesForecastLine: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcForecastCalcSalesForecastNo()) then
            exit;
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", '');
        if not CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcForecast.FindSet();
            repeat
                CalcSalesForecastLine.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
                if not CalcSalesForecastLine.IsEmpty() then begin
                    CalcSalesForecastLine.FindFirst();
                    CalcForecast."Calc. Sales Forecast No." := CalcSalesForecastLine."No.";
                    CalcForecast.Modify();
                end;
            until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
        end;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcForecastCalcSalesForecastNo());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateTransferCalcSalesForecastLineToCalcForecast()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        CalcSalesForecastLine: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateTransferCalcSalesForecastLineToCalcForecast()) then
            exit;
        if not CalcSalesForecastLine.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcSalesForecastLine.FindSet();
            repeat
                if CalcForecast.Get(CalcSalesForecastLine."Forecast No.") then begin
                    CalcForecast."Line No." := CalcSalesForecastLine."Line No.";
                    CalcForecast.Quantity := CalcSalesForecastLine.Quantity;
                    if CalcSalesForecastLine."Created from Template" then
                        CalcForecast."Template Forecast No." := CalcSalesForecastLine."Template Forecast No.";
                    CalcForecast."Sort No." := CalcSalesForecastLine."Sort No.";
                    CalcForecast.Modify();
                end;
            until CalcSalesForecastLine.Next() = 0;
        end;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateTransferCalcSalesForecastLineToCalcForecast());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcDiscountTypeField()
    var
        CalcDiscount: Record "TSRD Calc. Discount";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcDiscountTypeField()) then
            exit;

        CalcDiscount.ModifyAll("Calc. Discount Type", CalcDiscount."Calc. Discount Type"::Purchase);

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcDiscountTypeField());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region UpdateServiceCharges

    local procedure UpdateServiceCharges()
    var
        ServiceChargeSetup: Record "TSRD Service Charge Setup";
        ServiceChargesSetup: Record "TSRD Service Charges Setup";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServiceCharges()) then
            exit;
        if ServiceChargesSetup.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServiceCharges());
            exit;
        end;
        ServiceChargesSetup.FindSet();
        repeat
            ServiceChargeSetup.Init();
            ServiceChargeSetup."Order Type" := ServiceChargesSetup."Order Type";
            ServiceChargeSetup."Responsibility Center" := ServiceChargesSetup."Responsibility Center";
            ServiceChargeSetup."Line No." := ServiceChargeSetup.GetNextLineNo();
            ServiceChargeSetup."Resource No." := ServiceChargesSetup."Resource No.";
            ServiceChargeSetup."Calculation Base" := ServiceChargesSetup."Calculation Base";
            ServiceChargeSetup."Charge Type" := ServiceChargesSetup."Charge Type";
            ServiceChargeSetup."Charge Value" := ServiceChargesSetup."Charge Value";
            ServiceChargeSetup."Min. Charge Value" := ServiceChargesSetup."Min. Charge Value";
            ServiceChargeSetup."Max. Charge Value" := ServiceChargesSetup."Max. Charge Value";
            ServiceChargeSetup.Insert(true);
        until ServiceChargesSetup.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServiceCharges());
    end;

    #endregion

    local procedure UpdateTradeNoCommissionLineArchive()
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        CommissionMigration: Record "TSR Commission Migration";
        TradeNo: Record "TSRM Trade No.";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateTradeNoCommissionLineArchive()) then
            exit;

        CommissionMigration.SetRange("TSRD Trade No.", 0);
        if not CommissionMigration.IsEmpty() then begin
            CommissionMigration.FindSet();
            repeat
                if ServiceItem.Get(CommissionMigration."Service Item No.") then begin
                    if not TradeNo.Get(ServiceItem."No.", ServiceItem."TSRM Trade No.") then begin
                        Clear(TradeNo);
                        TradeNo.Init();
                        TradeNo."Service Item No." := ServiceItem."No.";
                        TradeNo."No." := ServiceItem."TSRM Trade No.";
                        TradeNo.Insert();
                    end;
                    CommissionMigration.Validate("TSRD Trade No.", ServiceItem."TSRM Trade No.");
                    CommissionMigration.Modify();
                end;
            until CommissionMigration.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateTradeNoCommissionLineArchive());
    end;

    local procedure UpgradeCalcForcastAddedFields()
    var
        Contact: Record Contact;
        Customer: Record Customer;
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeCalcForecastAddedFields()) then
            exit;

        CalcForecast.SetRange(Template, false);
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", 0);
        if not CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            CalcForecast.ModifyAll("Version No.", 1);

        CalcForecast.Reset();
        CalcForecast.SetRange(Template, false);
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Customer No.", '');
        if not CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcForecast.FindSet(true, true);
            repeat
                if CalcSalesForecast.Get(CalcForecast."Calc. Sales Forecast No.", CalcForecast."Version No.") then
                    if Customer.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Customer No.") then begin
                        CalcForecast."Customer No." := Customer."No.";
                        CalcForecast."Customer Name" := Customer.Name;
                        CalcForecast.Modify();
                    end;
            until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
        end;

        CalcForecast.Reset();
        CalcForecast.SetRange(Template, false);
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Contact No.", '');
        if not CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcForecast.FindSet(true, true);
            repeat
                if CalcSalesForecast.Get(CalcForecast."Calc. Sales Forecast No.", CalcForecast."Version No.") then
                    if Contact.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Contact No.") then begin
                        CalcForecast."Contact No." := Contact."No.";
                        CalcForecast."Contact Name" := Contact.Name;
                        CalcForecast.Modify();
                    end;
            until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeCalcForecastAddedFields());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateForecastTemplateQuantity()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateForecastTemplateQuantity()) then
            exit;

        CalcForecast.SetRange(Template, true);
        CalcForecast.SetRange(Quantity, 0);
        if not CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            CalcForecast.ModifyAll(Quantity, 1);

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateForecastTemplateQuantity());
    end;

    #region UpdateSalesForecast

    local procedure UpdateSalesForecast()
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
        SalesForecast2: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateSalesForecast()) then
            exit;

        SalesForecast.SetFilter("Sales Quote No.", '<>%1', '');
        if SalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        SalesForecast.FindSet();
        repeat
            SalesHeader.Reset();
            SalesForecast2.Get(SalesForecast."No.", SalesForecast."Version No.");
            SalesHeader.SetRange("No.", SalesForecast2."Sales Quote No.");
            if not SalesHeader.IsEmpty() then
                SalesForecast2."Sales Doc. No." := SalesForecast2."Sales Quote No.";

            SalesHeader.SetRange("No.");
            SalesHeader.SetRange("Quote No.", SalesForecast2."Sales Quote No.");
            if not SalesHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
                SalesHeader.FindFirst();
                if SalesHeader."Document Type" = SalesHeader."Document Type"::Order then begin
                    SalesForecast2."Sales Doc. No." := SalesHeader."No.";
                    SalesForecast2."Sales Doc. Type" := SalesHeader."Document Type";
                    SalesForecast2.Status := SalesForecast2.Status::Released;
                end;
            end;
            SalesForecast2."Sales Quote No." := '';
            SalesForecast2.Modify();
        until SalesForecast.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateSalesForecast());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcConfigCommentLines()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigCommentLines()) then
            exit;

        CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, CalcConfiguration.Type::Comment);
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcConfiguration.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            if CalcForecast.Get(CalcConfiguration."Forecast No.") then begin
                CalcConfiguration."Manufacturer Code" := CalcForecast."Manufacturer Code";
                CalcConfiguration."Category Code" := CalcForecast."Category Code";
                CalcConfiguration."Subcategory Code" := CalcForecast."Subcategory Code";
                CalcConfiguration."Series Code" := CalcForecast."Series Code";
                CalcConfiguration."Model Code" := CalcForecast."Model Code";
                CalcConfiguration.Modify();
            end;
        until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigCommentLines());
    end;

    #endregion UpdateSalesForecast

    local procedure UpdateCatalogsPartialPriceFile()
    var
        Catalog: Record "TSRD Catalog";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCatalogsPartialPriceFile()) then
            exit;
        if Catalog.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        Catalog.ModifyAll("Partial Price File", true);

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCatalogsPartialPriceFile());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceLocationOnServiceItem()
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        ServiceShipmentItemLine: Record "Service Shipment Item Line";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServiceLocationOnServiceItem()) then
            exit;

        if not ServiceItem.IsEmpty() then begin
            ServiceItem.FindSet();
            repeat
                ServiceShipmentItemLine.SetRange("Service Item No.", ServiceItem."No.");
                if not ServiceShipmentItemLine.IsEmpty() then begin
                    ServiceShipmentItemLine.FindLast();
                    ServiceMgt.SetLastServiceItemLocation(ServiceShipmentItemLine);
                end;
            until ServiceItem.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServiceLocationOnServiceItem());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDefaultMargin()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDefaultMargin()) then
            exit;

        MarginSetup.SetFilter("Margin %", '<>%1', 0);
        if not MarginSetup.IsEmpty() then begin
            MarginSetup.FindSet();
            repeat
                MarginSetup."Default Margin %" := MarginSetup."Margin %";
            until MarginSetup.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDefaultMargin());
    end;

    #region UpdateChecklist

    local procedure UpdateChecklistRelation()
    var
        TempServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line" temporary;
        ServiceHistoryMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service History Mgt.";
        ToRecordID: RecordId;
        SetUpgradeTag: Boolean;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateChecklistRelation()) then
            exit;

        CreateTempServItemLineRecFromRecordID(TempServiceItemLine);
        SetUpgradeTag := TempServiceItemLine.IsEmpty;

        if not SetUpgradeTag then begin
            TempServiceItemLine.FindSet();
            repeat
                if GetPostedServiceRecordID(TempServiceItemLine, ToRecordID) then
                    ServiceHistoryMgt.UpdateCheckListLinkAfterPosting(TempServiceItemLine.RecordId, ToRecordID);
            until TempServiceItemLine.Next() = 0;
            SetUpgradeTag := true;
        end;

        if SetUpgradeTag then
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateChecklistRelation());
    end;

    local procedure CreateTempServItemLineRecFromRecordID(var TempServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line" temporary)
    var
        ChecklistHeader: Record "TSR Checklist Header";
        TypeHelper: Codeunit "Type Helper";
        EmptyRecordID: RecordId;
        ServItemLineRef: RecordRef;
        TempServItemLineRef: RecordRef;
        ServFieldRef: FieldRef;
        i: Integer;
        ServKeyRef: KeyRef;
        PKValueList: List of [Text];
        PKValue: Text;
        RecordIDText: Text;
    begin
        ChecklistHeader.SetFilter("Linked to Record ID", '<>%1', EmptyRecordID);
        if ChecklistHeader.IsEmpty then
            exit;

        ChecklistHeader.FindSet();
        repeat
            if not ServItemLineRef.Get(ChecklistHeader."Linked to Record ID") then begin
                RecordIDText := Format(ChecklistHeader."Linked to Record ID");
                if TempServiceItemLine.TableName = CopyStr(RecordIDText, 1, StrPos(RecordIDText, ':') - 1) then begin
                    TempServItemLineRef.Open(Database::"Service Item Line", true);

                    TempServItemLineRef.Init();
                    ServKeyRef := TempServItemLineRef.KeyIndex(1);
                    PKValueList := CopyStr(RecordIDText, StrPos(RecordIDText, ':') + 2).Split(',');

                    for i := 1 to ServKeyRef.FieldCount do begin
                        ServFieldRef := ServKeyRef.FieldIndex(i);
                        PKValueList.Get(i, PKValue);
                        if ServFieldRef.Type = ServFieldRef.Type::Option then
                            ServFieldRef.Value(TypeHelper.GetOptionNoFromTableField(PKValue, TempServItemLineRef.Number, ServFieldRef.Number))
                        else
                            ServFieldRef.Value(PKValue);
                    end;

                    if TempServItemLineRef.Insert() then;
                    TempServItemLineRef.SetTable(TempServiceItemLine);
                    if TempServiceItemLine.Insert() then;

                    TempServItemLineRef.Close();
                end;
            end;
        until ChecklistHeader.Next() = 0;
    end;

    [TryFunction]
    local procedure GetPostedServiceRecordID(var TempServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line" temporary; var RecID: RecordId)
    var
        ServiceCrMemoHeader: Record "Service Cr.Memo Header";
        ServiceInvoiceHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header";
        ServiceCrMemoItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Cr.Memo Item Line";
        ServiceInvoiceItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Invoice Item Line";
    begin
        case TempServiceItemLine."Document Type" of
            TempServiceItemLine."Document Type"::Order:
                begin
                    ServiceInvoiceHeader.SetRange("Order No.", TempServiceItemLine."Document No.");
                    ServiceInvoiceHeader.FindFirst();
                    ServiceInvoiceItemLine.Get(ServiceInvoiceHeader."No.", TempServiceItemLine."Line No.");
                    RecID := ServiceInvoiceItemLine.RecordId;
                end;
            TempServiceItemLine."Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
                begin
                    ServiceCrMemoHeader.SetRange("Pre-Assigned No.", TempServiceItemLine."Document No.");
                    ServiceCrMemoHeader.FindFirst();
                    ServiceCrMemoItemLine.Get(ServiceCrMemoHeader."No.", TempServiceItemLine."Line No.");
                    RecID := ServiceCrMemoItemLine.RecordId;
                end;
        end;
    end;

    #endregion UpdateChecklist
    #region UpdateVendorItemNo

    local procedure UpdateVendorItemNo()
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
        CalcExternalEquipment2: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
        VendorItemNoMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Vendor Item No. Mgt.";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateVendorItemNo()) then
            exit;

        CalcExternalEquipment.Setfilter(Type, '<>%1', CalcExternalEquipment.Type::Comment);
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateVendorItemNo());
            exit;
        end;

        CalcExternalEquipment.FindSet();
        repeat
            if CalcExternalEquipment2.Get(CalcExternalEquipment."Forecast No.", CalcExternalEquipment."Line No.") then begin
                VendorItemNoMgt.TransferVendorItemNo(CalcExternalEquipment2);
                CalcExternalEquipment2.Modify();
            end;
        until CalcExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateVendorItemNo());
        exit;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateVendorItemNoInDocuments()
    var
        PostedWhseReceiptLine: Record "Posted Whse. Receipt Line";
        PostedWhseShipmentLine: Record "Posted Whse. Shipment Line";
        RegisteredWhseActivityLine: Record "Registered Whse. Activity Line";
        WarehouseActivityLine: Record "Warehouse Activity Line";
        WarehouseReceiptLine: Record "Warehouse Receipt Line";
        WarehouseShipmentLine: Record "Warehouse Shipment Line";
        VendorItemNoMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Vendor Item No. Mgt.";
        DocumentArea: Enum "TSRD Document Area";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateVendorItemNoInDocuments()) then
            exit;

        if PostedWhseReceiptLine.FindSet() then
            repeat
                case PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source Type" of
                    DATABASE::"Purchase Line":
                        PostedWhseReceiptLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Purchase, PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source No.", PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Sales Line":
                        PostedWhseReceiptLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Sales, PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source No.", PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source Line No.");

                    DATABASE::"Service Line":
                        PostedWhseReceiptLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Service, PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source No.", PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Transfer Line":
                        PostedWhseReceiptLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Transfer, 0,
                                                                                                                     PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source No.", PostedWhseReceiptLine."Source Line No.");
                end;
                PostedWhseReceiptLine.Modify();
            until PostedWhseReceiptLine.Next() = 0;

        if PostedWhseShipmentLine.FindSet() then
            repeat
                case PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source Type" of
                    DATABASE::"Purchase Line":
                        PostedWhseShipmentLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Purchase, PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source No.", PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Sales Line":
                        PostedWhseShipmentLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Sales, PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source No.", PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source Line No.");

                    DATABASE::"Service Line":
                        PostedWhseShipmentLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Service, PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source No.", PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Transfer Line":
                        PostedWhseShipmentLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Transfer, 0,
                                                                                                                     PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source No.", PostedWhseShipmentLine."Source Line No.");
                end;
                PostedWhseShipmentLine.Modify();
            until PostedWhseShipmentLine.Next() = 0;

        if RegisteredWhseActivityLine.FindSet() then
            repeat
                case RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source Type" of
                    DATABASE::"Purchase Line":
                        RegisteredWhseActivityLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Purchase, RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source No.", RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Sales Line":
                        RegisteredWhseActivityLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Sales, RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source No.", RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source Line No.");

                    DATABASE::"Service Line":
                        RegisteredWhseActivityLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Service, RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source No.", RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Transfer Line":
                        RegisteredWhseActivityLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Transfer, 0,
                                                                                                                     RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source No.", RegisteredWhseActivityLine."Source Line No.");
                end;
                RegisteredWhseActivityLine.Modify();
            until RegisteredWhseActivityLine.Next() = 0;

        if WarehouseActivityLine.FindSet() then
            repeat
                case WarehouseActivityLine."Source Type" of
                    DATABASE::"Purchase Line":
                        WarehouseActivityLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Purchase, WarehouseActivityLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     WarehouseActivityLine."Source No.", WarehouseActivityLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Sales Line":
                        WarehouseActivityLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Sales, WarehouseActivityLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     WarehouseActivityLine."Source No.", WarehouseActivityLine."Source Line No.");

                    DATABASE::"Service Line":
                        WarehouseActivityLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Service, WarehouseActivityLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     WarehouseActivityLine."Source No.", WarehouseActivityLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Transfer Line":
                        WarehouseActivityLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Transfer, 0,
                                                                                                                     WarehouseActivityLine."Source No.", WarehouseActivityLine."Source Line No.");
                end;
                WarehouseActivityLine.Modify();
            until WarehouseActivityLine.Next() = 0;

        if WarehouseReceiptLine.FindSet() then
            repeat
                case WarehouseReceiptLine."Source Type" of
                    DATABASE::"Purchase Line":
                        WarehouseReceiptLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Purchase, WarehouseReceiptLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     WarehouseReceiptLine."Source No.", WarehouseReceiptLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Sales Line":
                        WarehouseReceiptLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Sales, WarehouseReceiptLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     WarehouseReceiptLine."Source No.", WarehouseReceiptLine."Source Line No.");

                    DATABASE::"Service Line":
                        WarehouseReceiptLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Service, WarehouseReceiptLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     WarehouseReceiptLine."Source No.", WarehouseReceiptLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Transfer Line":
                        WarehouseReceiptLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Transfer, 0,
                                                                                                                     WarehouseReceiptLine."Source No.", WarehouseReceiptLine."Source Line No.");
                end;
                WarehouseReceiptLine.Modify();
            until WarehouseReceiptLine.Next() = 0;

        if WarehouseShipmentLine.FindSet() then
            repeat
                case WarehouseShipmentLine."Source Type" of
                    DATABASE::"Purchase Line":
                        WarehouseShipmentLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Purchase, WarehouseShipmentLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     WarehouseShipmentLine."Source No.", WarehouseShipmentLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Sales Line":
                        WarehouseShipmentLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Sales, WarehouseShipmentLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     WarehouseShipmentLine."Source No.", WarehouseShipmentLine."Source Line No.");

                    DATABASE::"Service Line":
                        WarehouseShipmentLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Service, WarehouseShipmentLine."Source Subtype",
                                                                                                                     WarehouseShipmentLine."Source No.", WarehouseShipmentLine."Source Line No.");
                    DATABASE::"Transfer Line":
                        WarehouseShipmentLine."TSRD Vendor Item No." := VendorItemNoMgt.GetVendorItemNoByDocumentType(DocumentArea::Transfer, 0,
                                                                                                                     WarehouseShipmentLine."Source No.", WarehouseShipmentLine."Source Line No.");
                end;
                WarehouseShipmentLine.Modify();
            until WarehouseShipmentLine.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateVendorItemNoInDocuments());
    end;

    #endregion UpdateVendorItemNo

    local procedure UpdateWarrantyPosting()
    var
        CustLedgerEntry: Record "Cust. Ledger Entry";
        GLEntry: Record "G/L Entry";
        ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line";
        VendorLedgerEntry: Record "Vendor Ledger Entry";
        WarrantyDocsMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Warranty Docs Mgt";
        Transfer: DataTransfer;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateWarrantyPosting()) then
            exit;

        ServiceItemLine.SetLoadFields("TSRD Warranty Claim No.");
        ServiceItemLine.SetFilter("TSRD Warranty Claim No.", '<>%1', '');
        if not ServiceItemLine.IsEmpty() then begin
            ServiceItemLine.FindSet();
            repeat
                WarrantyDocsMgt.SetHdrWarrantyClaimNoInLine(ServiceItemLine);
            until ServiceItemLine.Next() = 0;
        end;

        CustLedgerEntry.SetFilter("TSRD Warranty Claim No.", '<>%1', '');
        if not CustLedgerEntry.IsEmpty() then begin
            Clear(Transfer);
            Transfer.SetTables(Database::"Cust. Ledger Entry", Database::"G/L Entry");
            Transfer.AddSourceFilter(CustLedgerEntry.FieldNo("TSRD Warranty Claim No."), '<>%1', '');
            Transfer.AddJoin(CustLedgerEntry.FieldNo("Document Type"), GLEntry.FieldNo("Document Type"));
            Transfer.AddJoin(CustLedgerEntry.FieldNo("Document No."), GLEntry.FieldNo("Document No."));
            Transfer.AddFieldValue(CustLedgerEntry.FieldNo("TSRD Warranty Claim No."), GLEntry.FieldNo("TSRD Warranty Claim No."));
            Transfer.CopyFields();
        end;

        VendorLedgerEntry.SetFilter("TSRD Warranty Claim No.", '<>%1', '');
        if not VendorLedgerEntry.IsEmpty() then begin
            Clear(Transfer);
            Transfer.SetTables(Database::"Vendor Ledger Entry", Database::"G/L Entry");
            Transfer.AddSourceFilter(VendorLedgerEntry.FieldNo("TSRD Warranty Claim No."), '<>%1', '');
            Transfer.AddJoin(VendorLedgerEntry.FieldNo("Document Type"), GLEntry.FieldNo("Document Type"));
            Transfer.AddJoin(VendorLedgerEntry.FieldNo("Document No."), GLEntry.FieldNo("Document No."));
            Transfer.AddFieldValue(VendorLedgerEntry.FieldNo("TSRD Warranty Claim No."), GLEntry.FieldNo("TSRD Warranty Claim No."));
            Transfer.CopyFields();
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateWarrantyPosting());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateFixServiceLineFieldIDs()
    var
        ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
        ServicelineDT: DataTransfer;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFixServiceLineFieldIDs()) then
            exit;

        if not ServiceLine.IsEmpty() then begin
            ServicelineDT.SetTables(Database::"Service Line", Database::"Service Line");
            ServicelineDT.AddFieldValue(ServiceLine.FieldNo("TSRD Standard Service Code"), ServiceLine.FieldNo("TSRD Std. Service Code"));
            ServicelineDT.CopyFields();
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFixServiceLineFieldIDs());
    end;
    #region UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts

    local procedure UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts()
    var
        DiscountType: Record "TSRD Calc. Discount";
        CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts()) then
            exit;

        if DiscountType.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts());
            exit;
        end;

        DiscountType.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcSalesDiscounts.SetRange("Discount Type", DiscountType.Code);
            if not CalcSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
                CalcSalesDiscounts.ModifyAll(DescriptionText, DiscountType.Description);
        until DiscountType.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts());
    end;

    #endregion UpdateDescriptionInCalcSalesDiscounts

    #region DeleteCalcSalesDiscountsWithoutForecast

    local procedure DeleteCalcSalesDiscountsWithoutForecast()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
        SetUpgradeTag: Boolean;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.DeleteCalcSalesDiscountsWithoutForecast()) then
            exit;

        SetUpgradeTag := CalcSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty;
        if not SetUpgradeTag then begin
            CalcSalesDiscounts.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if not CalcForecast.Get(CalcSalesDiscounts."Forecast No.") then
                    CalcSalesDiscounts.Delete();
            until CalcSalesDiscounts.Next() = 0;
            SetUpgradeTag := true;
        end;

        if SetUpgradeTag then
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.DeleteCalcSalesDiscountsWithoutForecast());
    end;

    #endregion DeleteCalcSalesDiscountsWithoutForecast

    #region "Default Margin %" greater than "Minimum Margin %" bug

    local procedure UpdateDefaultMarginToMinimumMargin()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDefaultMarginToMinimumMargin()) then
            exit;

        if MarginSetup.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDefaultMarginToMinimumMargin());
            exit;
        end;

        MarginSetup.FindSet();
        repeat
            if MarginSetup."Margin %" > MarginSetup."Default Margin %" then begin
                MarginSetup.Validate("Default Margin %", MarginSetup."Margin %");
                MarginSetup.Modify();
            end;
        until MarginSetup.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDefaultMarginToMinimumMargin());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Wrong Catalog Price on Item

    local procedure UpdateWrongPriceOnItem()
    var
        Item: Record Item;
        NonstockItem: Record "Nonstock Item";
        CatalogPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Catalog Price Mgt";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateWrongPriceOnItem()) then
            exit;
        NonstockItem.SetFilter("TSRD Catalog Code", '<>%1', '');
        NonstockItem.SetFilter("Item No.", '<>%1', '');
        if NonstockItem.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateWrongPriceOnItem());
            exit;
        end;
        NonstockItem.SetCurrentKey("Item No.");
        NonstockItem.FindSet();
        repeat
            Item.Get(NonstockItem."Item No.");
            CatalogPriceMgt.UpdateSalesPriceAfterCreateItem(Item, NonstockItem);
            CatalogPriceMgt.UpdatePurchPricesAfterCreateItem(Item, NonstockItem);
        until NonstockItem.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateWrongPriceOnItem());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Full Price File Catalog

    local procedure UpdateFullPriceFileCatalog()
    var
        Catalog: Record "TSRD Catalog";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFullPriceFileCatalog()) then
            exit;
        Catalog.SetRange("Partial Price File", false);
        if not Catalog.IsEmpty() then
            Catalog.ModifyAll("Full Price File", true);
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFullPriceFileCatalog());
    end;

    #endregion 

    #region Update Catalog Price List Item UOM 

    local procedure UpdateCatalogPriceListItemUOM()
    var
        PriceListLine: Record "Price List Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCatalogPriceListItemUOM()) then
            exit;
        PriceListLine.SetFilter("TSRD Linked Catalog", '<>%1', '');
        PriceListLine.SetRange("Asset Type", "Price Asset Type"::Item);
        PriceListLine.SetFilter("Unit of Measure Code", '<>%1', '');
        if PriceListLine.IsEmpty() then
            PriceListLine.ModifyAll("Unit of Measure Code", '');
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCatalogPriceListItemUOM());
    end;

    #endregion
    #region Update Fulfillment status on Sales and Service Lines

    local procedure UpdateFulfillmentStatusOnSalesAndServiceLines()
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFulfillmentStatusOnSalesAndServiceLines()) then
            exit;

        SetFulfillmentStatusOnSalesAndServiceLines();

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFulfillmentStatusOnSalesAndServiceLines());
    end;

    internal procedure SetFulfillmentStatusOnSalesAndServiceLines()
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
        FulfillmentStatusMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fulfillment Status Mgt";
    begin
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesLine."Document Type"::Order);
        SalesLine.SetRange(Type, SalesLine.Type::Item);
        if not SalesLine.IsEmpty then begin
            SalesLine.FindSet();
            repeat
                FulfillmentStatusMgt.SetFulfillmentStatusAndModifyLine(SalesLine);
            until SalesLine.Next() = 0;
        end;

        ServiceLine.SetRange("Document Type", ServiceLine."Document Type"::Order);
        ServiceLine.SetRange(Type, ServiceLine.Type::Item);
        if not ServiceLine.IsEmpty then begin
            ServiceLine.FindSet();
            repeat
                FulfillmentStatusMgt.SetFulfillmentStatusAndModifyLine(ServiceLine);
            until ServiceLine.Next() = 0;
        end;
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Fulfillment status on Sales and Service Lines

    local procedure UpdateServiceLinesResourceGroupNo()
    var
        Resource: Record Resource;
        ServiceCrMemoHeader: Record "Service Cr.Memo Header";
        ServiceCrMemoLine: Record "Service Cr.Memo Line";
        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
        ServiceInvoiceHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header";
        ServiceInvoiceLine: Record "Service Invoice Line";
        ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServiceLinesResourceGroupNo()) then
            exit;

        ServiceHeader.SetFilter("TSRD Machine Community", '<>%1', ServiceHeader."TSRD Machine Community"::Member);
        if not ServiceHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
            ServiceHeader.FindSet();
            repeat
                ServiceLine.SetRange("Document No.", ServiceHeader."No.");
                ServiceLine.SetRange("Document Type", ServiceHeader."Document Type");
                ServiceLine.SetRange(Type, ServiceLine.Type::Resource);
                if not ServiceLine.IsEmpty() then begin
                    ServiceLine.FindSet(true);
                    repeat
                        if Resource.Get(ServiceLine."No.") then begin
                            ServiceLine."TSRD Resource Group No." := Resource."Resource Group No.";
                            ServiceLine.Modify();
                        end;
                    until ServiceLine.Next() = 0;
                end
            until ServiceHeader.Next() = 0;
        end;

        ServiceInvoiceHeader.SetFilter("TSRD Machine Comm. Doc. Source", '=%1', '');
        if not ServiceInvoiceHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
            ServiceInvoiceHeader.FindSet();
            repeat
                ServiceInvoiceLine.SetRange("Document No.", ServiceInvoiceHeader."No.");
                ServiceInvoiceLine.SetRange(Type, ServiceInvoiceLine.Type::Resource);
                if not ServiceInvoiceLine.IsEmpty() then begin
                    ServiceInvoiceLine.FindSet(true);
                    repeat
                        if Resource.Get(ServiceInvoiceLine."No.") then begin
                            ServiceInvoiceLine."TSRD Resource Group No." := Resource."Resource Group No.";
                            ServiceInvoiceLine.Modify();
                        end;
                    until ServiceInvoiceLine.Next() = 0;
                end
            until ServiceInvoiceHeader.Next() = 0;
        end;

        ServiceCrMemoHeader.SetFilter("TSRD Machine Comm. Doc. Source", '=%1', '');
        if not ServiceCrMemoHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
            ServiceCrMemoHeader.FindSet();
            repeat
                ServiceCrMemoLine.SetRange("Document No.", ServiceCrMemoHeader."No.");
                ServiceCrMemoLine.SetRange(Type, ServiceCrMemoLine.Type::Resource);
                if not ServiceCrMemoLine.IsEmpty() then begin
                    ServiceCrMemoLine.FindSet(true);
                    repeat
                        if Resource.Get(ServiceCrMemoLine."No.") then begin
                            ServiceCrMemoLine."TSRD Resource Group No." := Resource."Resource Group No.";
                            ServiceCrMemoLine.Modify();
                        end;
                    until ServiceCrMemoLine.Next() = 0;
                end
            until ServiceCrMemoHeader.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServiceLinesResourceGroupNo());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Hide Line and Page Break fields

    local procedure UpdateHideLineAndPageBreakFields()
    var
        ServiceCrMemoLine: Record "Service Cr.Memo Line";
        ServiceInvoiceLine: Record "Service Invoice Line";
        ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateHideLineAndPageBreakFields()) then
            exit;

        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Hide Line", true);
        if not ServiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            ServiceLine.ModifyAll("TSR Hide Line", true);

        ServiceLine.Reset();
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Page Break", true);
        if not ServiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            ServiceLine.ModifyAll("TSR Page Break", true);

        ServiceInvoiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Hide Line", true);
        if not ServiceInvoiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            ServiceInvoiceLine.ModifyAll("TSR Hide Line", true);

        ServiceInvoiceLine.Reset();
        ServiceInvoiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Page Break", true);
        if not ServiceInvoiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            ServiceInvoiceLine.ModifyAll("TSR Page Break", true);

        ServiceCrMemoLine.SetRange("TSRD Hide Line", true);
        if not ServiceCrMemoLine.IsEmpty() then
            ServiceCrMemoLine.ModifyAll("TSR Hide Line", true);

        ServiceCrMemoLine.Reset();
        ServiceCrMemoLine.SetRange("TSRD Page Break", true);
        if not ServiceCrMemoLine.IsEmpty() then
            ServiceCrMemoLine.ModifyAll("TSR Page Break", true);

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateHideLineAndPageBreakFields());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Correct Service Line & Service Ledger Entry

    local procedure CorrectResourceOnServiceLine()
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.CorrectResourceOnServiceLine()) then
            exit;

        CorrectServiceLineLabor();
        CorrectServiceLineCalcType();
        CorrectServiceLineInternalInvoicing();

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.CorrectResourceOnServiceLine());
    end;

    local procedure CorrectServiceLineLabor()
    var
        ResourceGroup: Record "Resource Group";
        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
        ServiceLine, ServiceLine2 : Record "Service Line";
    begin
        ServiceLine.SetRange(Type, ServiceLine.Type::Resource);
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Labor", false);
        ServiceLine.SetFilter("TSRD Resource Group No.", '<>%1', '');
        if ServiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        ServiceLine.FindSet();
        repeat
            if CheckServiceLineIfLabor(ResourceGroup, ServiceHeader, ServiceLine) then begin
                ServiceLine2.Get(ServiceLine."Document Type", ServiceLine."Document No.", ServiceLine."Line No.");
                ServiceLine2."TSRD Labor" := true;
                ServiceLine2.Modify();
            end;
        until ServiceLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CheckServiceLineIfLabor(ResourceGroup: Record "Resource Group"; ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"): Boolean
    begin
        if not ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceLine."Document Type", Serviceline."Document No.") or not ResourceGroup.Get(ServiceLine."TSRD Resource Group No.") then
            exit(false);
        if not ServiceHeader."TSR Internal Invoicing" or not ResourceGroup."TSRD Labor" then
            exit(false);
        if ServiceHeader."TSRD Machine Community" = ServiceHeader."TSRD Machine Community"::" " then
            exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CorrectServiceLineCalcType()
    var
        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
    begin
        ServiceLine.SetRange(Type, ServiceLine.Type::Resource);
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Labor", true);
        if ServiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        ServiceLine.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            if CheckServiceLineCalcType(ServiceHeader, ServiceItem, ServiceLine) then begin
                ServiceLine."TSRM Trade No." := ServiceItem."TSRM Trade No.";
                ServiceLine."TSRM Calc. Type" := ServiceLine."TSRM Calc. Type"::"Service Labor";
                ServiceLine.Modify();
            end;
        until ServiceLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CheckServiceLineCalcType(ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header"; var ServiceItem: Record "Service Item"; ServiceLine: Record "Service Line"): Boolean
    begin
        if not ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceLine."Document Type", Serviceline."Document No.") then
            exit(false);
        if not ServiceHeader."TSR Internal Invoicing" then
            exit(false);
        if ServiceHeader."TSRD Machine Community" <> ServiceHeader."TSRD Machine Community"::" " then
            exit(false);
        if ServiceItem.Get(ServiceLine."Service Item No.") then
            exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CorrectServiceLineInternalInvoicing()
    var
        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
        ServiceLine, ServiceLine2 : Record "Service Line";
    begin
        ServiceLine.SetRange(Type, ServiceLine.Type::Resource);
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRM Internal Invoicing", false);
        if ServiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        ServiceLine.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            if ServiceHeader.Get(ServiceLine."Document Type", Serviceline."Document No.") and (ServiceHeader."TSR Internal Invoicing") then begin
                ServiceLine2.Get(ServiceLine."Document Type", ServiceLine."Document No.", ServiceLine."Line No.");
                ServiceLine2."TSRM Internal Invoicing" := true;
                ServiceLine2.Modify();
            end;
        until ServiceLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CorrectServiceLedgerEntry()
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.CorrectServiceLedgerEntry()) then
            exit;

        CorrectServiceLedgerEntryTradeNo();
        CorrectServiceLedgerEntryCalcType8();
        CorrectServiceLedgerEntryCalcType23();

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.CorrectServiceLedgerEntry());
    end;

    local procedure CorrectServiceLedgerEntryTradeNo()
    var
        ServiceLedgerEntry: Record "Service Ledger Entry";
        TradeNo: Record "TSRM Trade No.";
    begin
        ServiceLedgerEntry.SetRange(Type, ServiceLedgerEntry.Type::Resource);
        ServiceLedgerEntry.SetRange("TSRM Internal Invoicing", true);
        if ServiceLedgerEntry.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        ServiceLedgerEntry.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            TradeNo.SetRange("Service Item No.", ServiceLedgerEntry."TSRM Service Item No.");
            TradeNo.SetFilter("Start Date", '<=%1', ServiceLedgerEntry."Posting Date");
            TradeNo.SetFilter("End Date", '>=%1', ServiceLedgerEntry."Posting Date");
            if not TradeNo.IsEmpty() then begin
                TradeNo.FindFirst();
                ServiceLedgerEntry."TSRM Trade No." := TradeNo."No.";
                ServiceLedgerEntry.Modify();
            end
            else begin
                TradeNo.SetRange("Start Date");
                TradeNo.SetRange("End Date");
                if not TradeNo.IsEmpty() then begin
                    TradeNo.FindLast();
                    ServiceLedgerEntry."TSRM Trade No." := TradeNo."No.";
                    ServiceLedgerEntry.Modify();
                end;
            end;
        until ServiceLedgerEntry.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CorrectServiceLedgerEntryCalcType8()
    var
        ServiceInvoiceLine: Record "Service Invoice Line";
        ServiceLedgerEntry: Record "Service Ledger Entry";
    begin
        ServiceLedgerEntry.SetRange(Type, ServiceLedgerEntry.Type::Resource);
        ServiceLedgerEntry.SetRange("TSRM Internal Invoicing", true);
        if ServiceLedgerEntry.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        ServiceLedgerEntry.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            if FindServiceInvoiceLineLabor(ServiceInvoiceLine, ServiceLedgerEntry) then begin
                ServiceLedgerEntry."TSRM Calc. Type" := ServiceLedgerEntry."TSRM Calc. Type"::"Service Labor";
                ServiceLedgerEntry.Modify();
            end;
        until ServiceLedgerEntry.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure FindServiceInvoiceLineLabor(var ServiceInvoiceLine: Record "Service Invoice Line"; ServiceLedgerEntry: Record "Service Ledger Entry"): Boolean
    begin
        ServiceInvoiceLine.SetRange("Appl.-to Service Entry", ServiceLedgerEntry."Entry No.");
        if ServiceInvoiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(false);
        ServiceInvoiceLine.FindFirst();
        if ServiceInvoiceLine."TSRD Labor" then
            exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CorrectServiceLedgerEntryCalcType23()
    var
        ServiceLedgerEntry: Record "Service Ledger Entry";
        ServiceOrderType: Record "Service Order Type";
    begin
        ServiceLedgerEntry.SetFilter("Service Order Type", '<>%1', '');
        if ServiceLedgerEntry.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        ServiceLedgerEntry.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            if CheckServiceLedgerEntryForInternalWarranty(ServiceOrderType, ServiceLedgerEntry) then begin
                ServiceLedgerEntry."TSRM Calc. Type" := ServiceLedgerEntry."TSRM Calc. Type"::"Internal Warranty";
                ServiceLedgerEntry.Modify();
            end;
        until ServiceLedgerEntry.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CheckServiceLedgerEntryForInternalWarranty(var ServiceOrderType: Record "Service Order Type"; ServiceLedgerEntry: Record "Service Ledger Entry"): Boolean
    begin
        if not ServiceOrderType.Get(ServiceLedgerEntry."Service Order Type") then
            exit(false);
        if (ServiceOrderType."TSRM Calc. Type" = ServiceOrderType."TSRM Calc. Type"::"Internal Warranty") and (ServiceLedgerEntry."TSRM Calc. Type" <> ServiceLedgerEntry."TSRM Calc. Type"::"Internal Warranty") then
            exit(true);
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Base Machine Price Calc. Forecast

    local procedure UpdateBaseMachinePriceCalcForecast()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateBaseMachinePriceCalcForecast()) then
            exit;

        if not CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcForecast.FindSet();
            repeat
                CalcForecast.SetDoNotTestStatusOpen(true);
                CalcForecast."Base Machine List Price" := CalcForecast."Base Machine Net Price";
                CalcForecast.UpdateListPrice();
                CalcForecast.UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
                if CalcForecast."Show calculated Sales Prices" then
                    CalcForecast.UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
                CalcForecast.Modify();
            until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateBaseMachinePriceCalcForecast());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Calc Configuration Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)

    local procedure UpdateCalcConfigurationLineAmountDirectUnitCost()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigurationLineAmountDirectUnitCost()) then
            exit;

        CalcForecast.SetFilter(Status, '<>%1', CalcForecast.Status::Released);
        if not CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcForecast.FindSet();
            repeat
                CalcConfiguration.Reset();
                CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", CalcForecast."No.");
                CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Line Amount (List Price)", '<>%1', 0);
                if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
                    CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
                    repeat
                        CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" := CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (List Price)";
                        CalcConfiguration.Modify();
                    until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
                end;
            until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigurationLineAmountDirectUnitCost());
    end;
    #endregion 

    #region Update Service Item Bin Code

    local procedure UpdateServiceItemBinCode()
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        WarehouseEntry: Record "Warehouse Entry";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateServiceItemBinCode()) then
            exit;
        WarehouseEntry.SetRange("Entry Type", WarehouseEntry."Entry Type"::Movement);
        WarehouseEntry.SetRange("Source Document", "Warehouse Journal Source Document"::"Reclass. Jnl.");
        WarehouseEntry.SetRange(Quantity, 1);
        WarehouseEntry.SetFilter("Serial No.", '<>%1', '');
        if WarehouseEntry.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateServiceItemBinCode());
            exit;
        end;
        WarehouseEntry.FindSet();
        repeat
            ServiceItem.SetRange("Item No.", WarehouseEntry."Item No.");
            ServiceItem.SetRange("Serial No.", WarehouseEntry."Serial No.");
            if not ServiceItem.IsEmpty() then begin
                ServiceItem.FindFirst();
                ServiceItem."TSRD Bin Code" := WarehouseEntry."Bin Code";
                ServiceItem.Modify();
            end;
        until WarehouseEntry.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateServiceItemBinCode());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Repair Status Setup

    local procedure UpdateRepairStatusSetFinishingDate()
    var
        RepairStatus: Record "Repair Status";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateRepairStatusSetFinishingDate()) then
            exit;

        RepairStatus.SetRange(Finished, true);
        RepairStatus.SetRange(Initial, false);
        RepairStatus.SetRange("In Process", false);
        if not RepairStatus.IsEmpty() then
            RepairStatus.ModifyAll("TSRD Set Finishing Date", true);

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateRepairStatusSetFinishingDate());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Currency Exchange Rate

    local procedure UpdateCurrencyExchangeRate()
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateCurrencyExchangeRate()) then
            exit;
        UpdateSalesForecastCurrencyExchangeRate();
        UpdateCalcForecastCalcCurrencyExchangeRate();
        UpdateCalcForecastSalesCurrencyExchangeRate();
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateCurrencyExchangeRate());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesForecastCurrencyExchangeRate()
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", 0);
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", 1);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcForecastCalcCurrencyExchangeRate()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", 0);
        if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcForecast.ModifyAll("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", 1);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcForecastSalesCurrencyExchangeRate()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", 0);
        if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", 1);
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Create Service Item Calculation Worksheet of Calculation Worksheet Templates

    local procedure CreateServiceItemCalculationOfCalculationTemplates()
    var
        CalculationTemplate: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.CreateServiceItemCalculationOfCalculationTemplates()) then
            exit;

        CalculationTemplate.SetRange(Template, true);
        CalculationTemplate.SetFilter("Service Item No.", '<>%1', '');
        if not CalculationTemplate.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalculationTemplate.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if CheckCreateServiceItemCalculation(CalculationTemplate."Service Item No.") then
                    if not CalcForecastMgt.HasServiceItemCalculation(CalculationTemplate."Service Item No.") then
                        CalcForecastMgt.CreateCopyOfCalcForecast(CalculationTemplate, CalculationTemplate."Calc. Sales Forecast No.", 0, false, true, CalculationTemplate."Service Item No.");
                Clear(CalculationTemplate."Service Item No.");
                CalculationTemplate.modify();
            until CalculationTemplate.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.CreateServiceItemCalculationOfCalculationTemplates());
    end;

    local procedure CheckCreateServiceItemCalculation(ServiceItemNo: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
    begin
        if not ServiceItem.Get(ServiceItemNo) then
            exit;
        if Serviceitem."TSRM Status(Sales)" = ServiceItem."TSRM Status(Sales)"::Sold then
            exit;
        if ServiceItem."TSRM Status(Purchase)" <> ServiceItem."TSRM Status(Purchase)"::" " then
            exit(true);
    end;

    #endregion


    #region Update Service Order Type
    local procedure UpdateServiceOrderType()
    var
        ServiceHeader: Record "Service Header";
        ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line";
        ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServiceOrderType()) then
            exit;

        ServiceHeader.SetFilter("Service Order Type", '<>%1', '');
        if ServiceHeader.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        ServiceHeader.FindSet();
        repeat
            ServiceItemLine.SetRange("Document Type", ServiceHeader."Document Type");
            ServiceItemLine.SetRange("Document No.", ServiceHeader."No.");
            if not ServiceItemLine.IsEmpty() then
                ServiceItemLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Service Order Type", ServiceHeader."Service Order Type");

            ServiceLine.SetRange("Document Type", ServiceHeader."Document Type");
            ServiceLine.SetRange("Document No.", ServiceHeader."No.");
            if not ServiceLine.IsEmpty() then
                ServiceLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Service Order Type", ServiceHeader."Service Order Type");
        until ServiceHeader.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServiceOrderType());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Set Automatic Transfer false

    local procedure CorrectAutomaticTransferBoolean()
    var
        Location: Record Location;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.CorrectAutomaticTransferBoolean()) then
            exit;

        Location.SetRange("Use As In-Transit", false);
        Location.SetRange("TSRD Automatic Transfer", true);
        if not Location.IsEmpty() then
            Location.ModifyAll("TSRD Automatic Transfer", false);

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.CorrectAutomaticTransferBoolean());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Empty Warranty Claim No.

    local procedure EmptyServiceLineWarrantyClaimNo()
    var
        PurchaseLine: Record "Purchase Line";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
        WarrantyClaimHeader: Record "TSRD Warranty Claim Header";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.EmptyServiceLineWarrantyClaimNo()) then
            exit;

        ServiceLine.SetFilter("TSRD Warranty Claim No.", '<>%1', '');
        if not ServiceLine.isEmpty() then begin
            ServiceLine.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                WarrantyClaimHeader.SetRange("No.", ServiceLine."TSRD Warranty Claim No.");
                if WarrantyClaimHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
                    Clear(ServiceLine."TSRD Warranty Claim No.");
                    ServiceLine.Modify();
                end;
            until ServiceLine.Next() = 0;
        end;

        PurchaseLine.SetFilter("TSRD Warranty Claim No.", '<>%1', '');
        if not PurchaseLine.isEmpty() then begin
            PurchaseLine.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                WarrantyClaimHeader.SetRange("No.", PurchaseLine."TSRD Warranty Claim No.");
                if WarrantyClaimHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
                    Clear(PurchaseLine."TSRD Warranty Claim No.");
                    PurchaseLine.Modify();
                end;
            until PurchaseLine.Next() = 0;
        end;

        SalesLine.SetFilter("TSRD Warranty Claim No.", '<>%1', '');
        if not SalesLine.isEmpty() then begin
            SalesLine.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                WarrantyClaimHeader.SetRange("No.", SalesLine."TSRD Warranty Claim No.");
                if WarrantyClaimHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
                    Clear(SalesLine."TSRD Warranty Claim No.");
                    SalesLine.Modify();
                end;
            until SalesLine.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.EmptyServiceLineWarrantyClaimNo());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Fix Catalog Excel Template Setup

    local procedure UpdateExcelTemplateSetup()
    var
        CatExcelTemplateSetup: Record "TSRD Cat Excel Template Setup";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateExcelTemplateSetup()) then
            exit;
        CatExcelTemplateSetup.SetRange("Vendor Item No.", false);
        if CatExcelTemplateSetup.IsEmpty() then
            CatExcelTemplateSetup.ModifyAll("Vendor Item No.", true);
        Clear(CatExcelTemplateSetup);
        CatExcelTemplateSetup.SetRange("Description", false);
        if CatExcelTemplateSetup.IsEmpty() then
            CatExcelTemplateSetup.ModifyAll("Description", true);
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateExcelTemplateSetup());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Fill Bill-to Customer No. on Sales Calculations

    local procedure UpdateBillToCustomerSalesCalc()
    var
        Customer: Record Customer;
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateBillToCustomerSalesCalc()) then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("Bill-to Customer No.", '=%1', '');
        CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("Customer No.", '<>%1', '');
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateBillToCustomerSalesCalc());
            exit;
        end;
        CalcSalesForecast.FindSet();
        repeat
            Customer.SetRange("No.", CalcSalesForecast."Customer No.");
            if not Customer.IsEmpty() then begin
                CalcSalesForecast.Validate("Bill-to Customer No.", CalcSalesForecast."Customer No.");
                CalcSalesForecast.Modify();
            end;
        until CalcSalesForecast.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateBillToCustomerSalesCalc());
    end;
    #endregion

    #region Replace Storage Source Type Service Item Line

    local procedure ReplaceStorageSourceTypeServiceItemLine()
    var
        MediaStorage: Record "TSRST Media Storage";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.ReplaceStorageSourceTypeServiceItemLine()) then
            exit;

        MediaStorage.SetRange("Source Type", MediaStorage."Source Type"::"TSRD Serv. Item Line");
        if not MediaStorage.IsEmpty() then begin
            MediaStorage.FindSet();
            repeat
                MediaStorage.Rename(MediaStorage."Source GUID", MediaStorage."Entry No.", MediaStorage."Source Type"::"TSR Service Item Line");
            until MediaStorage.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.ReplaceStorageSourceTypeServiceItemLine());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Remove %-symbol from discount & surcharge fields in Configure Price Quote

    local procedure UpdateDiscountSurchargeFields()
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsSalesCalculation()) then
            exit;
        UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcConfiguration();
        UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcEquipment();
        UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcExternalEquipment();
        UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcForecast();
        UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcPurchaseDiscounts();
        UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcSalesDiscounts();
        UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsMarginSetup();
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsSalesCalculation());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcConfiguration()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Discount % (List Price)", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcConfiguration.FindSet() then
            repeat
                CalcConfiguration."Discount % (List Price)" := CalcConfiguration."Discount % (List Price)" * 100;
                CalcConfiguration.Modify();
            until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;

        CalcConfiguration.Reset();
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Discount % (Dir. Unit Cost)", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcConfiguration.FindSet() then
            repeat
                CalcConfiguration."Discount % (Dir. Unit Cost)" := CalcConfiguration."Discount % (Dir. Unit Cost)" * 100;
                CalcConfiguration.Modify();
            until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcEquipment()
    var
        CalcEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. Equipment";
    begin
        CalcEquipment.SetFilter("Discount % (List Price)", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcEquipment.FindSet() then
            repeat
                CalcEquipment."Discount % (List Price)" := CalcEquipment."Discount % (List Price)" * 100;
                CalcEquipment.Modify();
            until CalcEquipment.Next() = 0;

        CalcEquipment.Reset();
        CalcEquipment.SetFilter("Discount % (Direct Unit Cost)", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcEquipment.FindSet() then
            repeat
                CalcEquipment."Discount % (Direct Unit Cost)" := CalcEquipment."Discount % (Direct Unit Cost)" * 100;
                CalcEquipment.Modify();
            until CalcEquipment.Next() = 0;
    end;
