    local procedure UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcExternalEquipment()
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetFilter("Discount %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcExternalEquipment.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcExternalEquipment."Discount %" := CalcExternalEquipment."Discount %" * 100;
            CalcExternalEquipment.Modify();
        until CalcExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcForecast()
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetFilter("Margin %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcForecast.FindSet() then
            repeat
                CalcForecast."Margin %" := CalcForecast."Margin %" * 100;
                CalcForecast.Modify();
            until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;

        CalcForecast.Reset();
        CalcForecast.SetFilter("Calculated Margin %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcForecast.FindSet() then
            repeat
                CalcForecast."Calculated Margin %" := CalcForecast."Calculated Margin %" * 100;
                CalcForecast.Modify();
            until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;

        CalcForecast.Reset();
        CalcForecast.SetFilter("Surcharge % (Fix Price)", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcForecast.FindSet() then
            repeat
                CalcForecast."Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := CalcForecast."Surcharge % (Fix Price)" * 100;
                CalcForecast.Modify();
            until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcPurchaseDiscounts()
    var
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts";
    begin
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetFilter("Discount %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcPurchaseDiscounts.FindSet() then
            repeat
                CalcPurchaseDiscounts."Discount %" := CalcPurchaseDiscounts."Discount %" * 100;
                CalcPurchaseDiscounts.Modify();
            until CalcPurchaseDiscounts.Next() = 0;

        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.Reset();
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetFilter("Absolute Discount %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcPurchaseDiscounts.FindSet() then
            repeat
                CalcPurchaseDiscounts."Absolute Discount %" := CalcPurchaseDiscounts."Absolute Discount %" * 100;
                CalcPurchaseDiscounts.Modify();
            until CalcPurchaseDiscounts.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsCalcSalesDiscounts()
    var
        CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
    begin
        CalcSalesDiscounts.SetFilter("Discount %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcSalesDiscounts.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcSalesDiscounts."Discount %" := CalcSalesDiscounts."Discount %" * 100;
            CalcSalesDiscounts.Modify();
        until CalcSalesDiscounts.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDiscountSurchargeFieldsMarginSetup()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
    begin
        MarginSetup.SetFilter("Margin %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if MarginSetup.FindSet() then
            repeat
                MarginSetup."Margin %" := MarginSetup."Margin %" * 100;
                MarginSetup.Modify();
            until MarginSetup.Next() = 0;

        MarginSetup.Reset();
        MarginSetup.SetFilter("Default Margin %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if MarginSetup.FindSet() then
            repeat
                MarginSetup."Default Margin %" := MarginSetup."Default Margin %" * 100;
                MarginSetup.Modify();
            until MarginSetup.Next() = 0;
    end;

    #endregion
    #region Update Barcode Printout

    local procedure UpdateBarcodePrintoutCaption()
    var
        BardcodeLabelSetupLine: Record "TSRD Barcode Label Setup Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateBarcodePrintoutCaption()) then
            exit;

        BardcodeLabelSetupLine.SetRange("Show Field Caption", true);
        if not BardcodeLabelSetupLine.IsEmpty() then begin
            BardcodeLabelSetupLine.SetAutoCalcFields("Field Caption");
            BardcodeLabelSetupLine.FindSet();
            repeat
                BardcodeLabelSetupLine."Printout Caption" := BardcodeLabelSetupLine."Field Caption";
                BardcodeLabelSetupLine.Modify()
            until BardcodeLabelSetupLine.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateBarcodePrintoutCaption());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Sales Line Fixed Price

    local procedure UpdateSalesLineFixedPrice()
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateSalesLineFixedPrice()) then
            exit;

        SalesHeader.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Calculated", false);
        SalesHeader.SetFilter("TSRD Sales Forecast No.", '<>%1', '');
        if not SalesHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
            SalesHeader.FindSet();
            repeat
                SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
                SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
                SalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Fixed Price", true);
                if not SalesLine.IsEmpty() then
                    SalesLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fixed Price", false);
            until SalesHeader.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateSalesLineFixedPrice());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Calc. Equipment to Calc. Option

    local procedure UpdateCalcEquipmentToCalcOption()
    var
        CalcEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. Equipment";
        CalcOption: Record "TSRD Calc. Option";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcEquipmentToCalcOption()) then
            exit;
        CalcEquipment.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
        if CalcEquipment.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcEquipmentToCalcOption());
            exit;
        end;
        CalcEquipment.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcOption.Init();
            CalcOption."Entry No." := CalcOption.GetNextEntryNo();
            CalcOption.TransferFields(CalcEquipment);
            CalcOption.Insert(true);
            TransferCalcEquipCommentsToCalcOption(CalcEquipment, CalcOption);
        until CalcEquipment.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcEquipmentToCalcOption());
    end;

    local procedure TransferCalcEquipCommentsToCalcOption(CalcEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. Equipment"; CalcOption: Record "TSRD Calc. Option")
    var
        CalcOptionCommentLine: Record "TSRD Calc. Option Comment Line";
        EquipmentCommentLine: Record "TSRD Equipment Comment Line";
    begin
        EquipmentCommentLine.SetRange("Manufacturer Code", CalcEquipment."Manufacturer Code");
        EquipmentCommentLine.SetRange("Category Code", CalcEquipment."Category Code");
        EquipmentCommentLine.SetRange("Subcategory Code", CalcEquipment."Subcategory Code");
        EquipmentCommentLine.SetRange("Model Code", CalcEquipment."Model Code");
        EquipmentCommentLine.SetRange("No.", CalcEquipment."No.");
        if EquipmentCommentLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        EquipmentCommentLine.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcOptionCommentLine.Init();
            CalcOptionCommentLine."Calc. Option Entry No." := CalcOption."Entry No.";
            CalcOptionCommentLine."Line No." := EquipmentCommentLine."Line No.";
            CalcOptionCommentLine.Date := EquipmentCommentLine.Date;
            CalcOptionCommentLine.Comment := EquipmentCommentLine.Comment;
            CalcOptionCommentLine.Insert();
        until EquipmentCommentLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Calc. Configuration Option Entry No.

    local procedure UpdateCalcConfigurationOptionEntryNo()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcOption: Record "TSRD Calc. Option";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigurationOptionEntryNo()) then
            exit;
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, "TSRD Calc. Configuration Type"::Equipment);
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigurationOptionEntryNo());
            exit;
        end;
        CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcOption.SetRange("Manufacturer Code", CalcConfiguration."Manufacturer Code");
            CalcOption.SetRange("Category Code", CalcConfiguration."Category Code");
            CalcOption.SetRange("Subcategory Code", CalcConfiguration."Subcategory Code");
            CalcOption.SetRange("Series Code", CalcConfiguration."Series Code");
            CalcOption.SetRange("Model Code", CalcConfiguration."Model Code");
            if not CalcOption.IsEmpty() then begin
                CalcOption.FindFirst();
                CalcConfiguration."Option Entry No." := CalcOption."Entry No.";
                CalcConfiguration.Modify();
            end;
        until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigurationOptionEntryNo());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Calc. Configuration Import Lines

    local procedure UpdateCalcConfigurationImportLines()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigurationImportLines()) then
            exit;
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, "TSRD Calc. Configuration Type"::Import);
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigurationImportLines());
            exit;
        end;
        CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll(Type, "TSRD Calc. Configuration Type"::Equipment);
        CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll("Manufacturer Configuration", true);
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcConfigurationImportLines());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Service Order Types Field Reserve

    local procedure UpdateServOrderTypesReserveField()
    var
        ServiceOrderType: Record "Service Order Type";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServOrderTypesReserveField()) then
            exit;

        if not ServiceOrderType.IsEmpty() then
            ServiceOrderType.ModifyAll("TSRD Reserve", ServiceOrderType."TSRD Reserve"::Optional);

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateServOrderTypesReserveField());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Default Calc. Sales and Purchase discounts

    local procedure UpdateCalcDefaultSalesAndPurchaseDiscounts()
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcDefaultSalesAndPurchaseDiscountLines()) then
            exit;
        UpdateCalcDefaultSalesDiscounts();
        UpdateCalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts();
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateCalcDefaultSalesAndPurchaseDiscountLines())
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcDefaultSalesDiscounts()
    var
        CalcDefaultSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Def. Sls. Disc Line";
    begin
        CalcDefaultSalesDiscounts.SetFilter("Discount %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcDefaultSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcDefaultSalesDiscounts.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcDefaultSalesDiscounts."Discount %" := CalcDefaultSalesDiscounts."Discount %" * 100;
            CalcDefaultSalesDiscounts.Modify();
        until CalcDefaultSalesDiscounts.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts()
    var
        CalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Def Purc Disc Line";
    begin
        CalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts.SetFilter("Discount %", '%1..%2', 0, 1);
        if CalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts."Discount %" := CalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts."Discount %" * 100;
            CalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts.Modify();
        until CalcDefaultPurchaseDiscounts.Next() = 0;
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update missing Customer No. on Maintenance Lines

    local procedure UpdateMissingCustomerNoOnMaintenanceLines()
    var
        MaintenanceHeader: Record "TSRD Maintenance Header";
        MaintenanceLine: Record "TSRD Maintenance Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateMissingCustomerNoOnMaintenanceLines()) then
            exit;
        MaintenanceHeader.SetFilter("Customer No.", '<>%1', '');
        if MaintenanceHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateMissingCustomerNoOnMaintenanceLines());
            exit;
        end;
        MaintenanceHeader.FindSet();
        repeat
            MaintenanceLine.SetRange("Document No.", MaintenanceHeader."No.");
            if not MaintenanceLine.IsEmpty() then
                MaintenanceLine.ModifyAll("Customer No.", MaintenanceHeader."Customer No.", false);
        until MaintenanceHeader.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateMissingCustomerNoOnMaintenanceLines());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Zero Price Warning

    local procedure UpdateZeroPriceWarningBehavior()
    var
        ServiceMgtSetup: Record "Service Mgt. Setup";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateZeroPriceWarningBehavior()) then
            exit;

        if ServiceMgtSetup.Get() then
            if ServiceMgtSetup."TSRD Warning Zero Service" then begin
                ServiceMgtSetup."TSRD Behavior Zero Prices" := ServiceMgtSetup."TSRD Behavior Zero Prices"::"Block Posting";
                ServiceMgtSetup.Modify();
            end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateZeroPriceWarningBehavior());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Devaluation Rule Item Filters

    local procedure UpdateDevaluationRuleItemFilters()
    var
        Item: Record Item;
        DevaluationRule: Record "TSRD Devaluation Rule";
        TranslationHelper: Codeunit "Translation Helper";
        TableFilter: Page "Table Filter";
        Filters: Text;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateDevaluationRuleItemFilters()) then
            exit;
        DevaluationRule.SetFilter("Item Filter", '<>%1', '');
        if DevaluationRule.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateDevaluationRuleItemFilters());
            exit;
        end;
        DevaluationRule.FindSet();
        repeat
            Clear(TableFilter);
            TranslationHelper.SetGlobalLanguageById(1033);
            TableFilter.SetSourceTable(MakeTableFilterText(DevaluationRule."Item Filter"), Database::Item, Item.TableCaption());
            Filters := TableFilter.GetViewFilter();
            TranslationHelper.RestoreGlobalLanguage();
            if Filters <> '' then begin
                Filters := Filters.Remove(1, Filters.IndexOf('WHERE(') + 5);
                Filters := Filters.Remove(StrLen(Filters) - 1, 1);
                if Filters <> '' then begin
                    DevaluationRule."Item Filter" := CopyStr(Filters, 1, MaxStrLen(DevaluationRule."Item Filter"));
                    DevaluationRule.Modify();
                end;
            end;
        until DevaluationRule.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateDevaluationRuleItemFilters());
    end;

    local procedure MakeTableFilterText(ItemFilterText: Text): Text
    var
        Item: Record Item;
        TxtBuilder: TextBuilder;
    begin
        if ItemFilterText = '' then
            exit;
        TxtBuilder.Append(Item.TableName());
        TxtBuilder.Append(': ');
        TxtBuilder.Append(ItemFilterText);
        exit(TxtBuilder.ToText());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Forecast Equipment

    local procedure UpdateForecastEquipment()
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateForecastEquipment()) then
            exit;
        ServiceItem.SetFilter("TSRD Forecast No.", '<>%1', '');
        if ServiceItem.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateForecastEquipment());
            exit;
        end;
        ServiceItem.FindSet();
        repeat
            SetForecastEquipment(ServiceItem);
        until ServiceItem.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateForecastEquipment());
    end;

    local procedure SetForecastEquipment(var ServiceItem: Record "Service Item")
    var
        Equipment: Record "TSRM Equipment";
    begin
        Equipment.SetRange("Service Item No.", ServiceItem."No.");
        Equipment.SetFilter(Type, '<>%1', "TSRM Equipment Type"::Comment);
        if Equipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        Equipment.FindSet();
        repeat
            if ShouldSetForecastEquipment(ServiceItem, Equipment) then begin
                Equipment."TSRD Forecast Equipment" := true;
                Equipment.Modify();
            end;
        until Equipment.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure ShouldSetForecastEquipment(
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        Equipment: Record "TSRM Equipment"
    ): Boolean
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", ServiceItem."TSRD Forecast No.");
        case Equipment.Type of
            "TSRM Equipment Type"::Attribute:
                begin
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, "TSRD Calc. Configuration Type"::Attribute);
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("No.", Equipment."No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Attribute Value", Equipment."Attribute Value");
                    exit(not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty());
                end;
            "TSRM Equipment Type"::Option:
                begin
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, "TSRD Calc. Configuration Type"::Equipment);
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Option Entry No.", Equipment."TSRD Option Entry No.");
                    exit(not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty());
                end;
            "TSRM Equipment Type"::Item:
                begin
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange(Type, "TSRD Calc. Configuration Type"::Item);
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("No.", Equipment."No.");
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        exit(true);
                    CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange(Type, "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type"::Item);
                    CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("No.", Equipment."No.");
                    exit(not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty());
                end;
            "TSRM Equipment Type"::"Service Item":
                begin
                    CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange(Type, "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type"::"Service Item");
                    CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("No.", Equipment."No.");
                    exit(not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty());
                end;
        end;
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Upgrade calc worksheet charging (Feat. 29748)

    local procedure UpgradeCalcWorksheetChargingFieldsFeat29748()
    var
        CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
        CalcWorkshopArch: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop Arch.";
        CalcExtEqtArch: Record "TSRD Calc. Ext. Eqt Arch.";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        LineAction: Enum "TSRD Service Line Action";
        TotalWorkshopAmt: Decimal;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeCalcWorksheetChargingFieldsFeat29748()) then
            exit;

        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();

        if not CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcWorkshop.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if CalcWorkshop."Calculate Separately" then begin
                    CalcWorkshop."Charging Method" := CalcWorkshop."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately;
                    TotalWorkshopAmt := CalcWorkshop."Total Amount";
                    if TotalWorkshopAmt = 0 then
                        TotalWorkshopAmt := CalcWorkshop."Amount (Labor)" + CalcWorkshop."Amount (Parts)";
                    if CalcWorkshop."Sales Price" = 0 then
                        CalcWorkshop."Sales Price" := TotalWorkshopAmt;
                    CalcWorkshop."Margin Amount" := CalcWorkshop."Sales Price" - TotalWorkshopAmt;
                    CalcWorkshop."Margin %" :=
                        CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage(TotalWorkshopAmt, CalcWorkshop."Sales Price", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
                end else begin
                    CalcWorkshop."Charging Method" := CalcWorkshop."Charging Method"::Included;
                    CalcWorkshop."Sales Price" := 0;
                    CalcWorkshop."Margin %" := 0;
                    CalcWorkshop."Margin Amount" := 0;
                end;
                CalcWorkshop.Modify(false);
            until CalcWorkshop.Next() = 0;
        end;

        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcExternalEquipment.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if CalcExternalEquipment."Calculate Separately" then begin
                    CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" := CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately;
                    if CalcExternalEquipment."Sales Price" = 0 then
                        CalcExternalEquipment."Sales Price" := CalcExternalEquipment."Line Amount";
                end else begin
                    LineAction := CalcExternalEquipment."Line Action";
                    case LineAction of
                        LineAction::Attach:
                            CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" := CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::Attach;
                        LineAction::"Cap. Service":
                            CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" := CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::CapService;
                        else
                            CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method" := CalcExternalEquipment."Charging Method"::Included;
                    end;
                end;
                CalcExternalEquipment.Modify(false);
            until CalcExternalEquipment.Next() = 0;
        end;

        if not CalcWorkshopArch.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcWorkshopArch.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if CalcWorkshopArch."Calculate Separately" then begin
                    CalcWorkshopArch."Charging Method" := CalcWorkshopArch."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately;
                    TotalWorkshopAmt := CalcWorkshopArch."Total Amount";
                    if TotalWorkshopAmt = 0 then
                        TotalWorkshopAmt := CalcWorkshopArch."Amount (Labor)" + CalcWorkshopArch."Amount (Parts)";
                    if CalcWorkshopArch."Sales Price" = 0 then
                        CalcWorkshopArch."Sales Price" := TotalWorkshopAmt;
                    CalcWorkshopArch."Margin Amount" := CalcWorkshopArch."Sales Price" - TotalWorkshopAmt;
                    CalcWorkshopArch."Margin %" :=
                        CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage(TotalWorkshopAmt, CalcWorkshopArch."Sales Price", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
                end else begin
                    CalcWorkshopArch."Charging Method" := CalcWorkshopArch."Charging Method"::Included;
                    CalcWorkshopArch."Sales Price" := 0;
                    CalcWorkshopArch."Margin %" := 0;
                    CalcWorkshopArch."Margin Amount" := 0;
                end;
                CalcWorkshopArch.Modify(false);
            until CalcWorkshopArch.Next() = 0;
        end;

        if not CalcExtEqtArch.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcExtEqtArch.FindSet(true);
            repeat
                if CalcExtEqtArch."Calculate Separately" then begin
                    CalcExtEqtArch."Charging Method" := CalcExtEqtArch."Charging Method"::CalcSeparately;
                    if CalcExtEqtArch."Sales Price" = 0 then
                        CalcExtEqtArch."Sales Price" := CalcExtEqtArch."Line Amount";
                end else begin
                    LineAction := CalcExtEqtArch."Line Action";
                    case LineAction of
                        LineAction::Attach:
                            CalcExtEqtArch."Charging Method" := CalcExtEqtArch."Charging Method"::Attach;
                        LineAction::"Cap. Service":
                            CalcExtEqtArch."Charging Method" := CalcExtEqtArch."Charging Method"::CapService;
                        else
                            CalcExtEqtArch."Charging Method" := CalcExtEqtArch."Charging Method"::Included;
                    end;
                end;
                CalcExtEqtArch.Modify(false);
            until CalcExtEqtArch.Next() = 0;
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeCalcWorksheetChargingFieldsFeat29748());
    end;

    #endregion

    internal procedure UpdateExtensibleInvoicePostingEngine()
    var
        FeatureKey: Record "Feature Key";
        FeatureManagementFacade: Codeunit "Feature Management Facade";
        ExtensibleInvoicePostingEngineLbl: Label 'ExtensibleInvoicePostingEngine', Locked = true;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateExtensibleInvoicePostingEngine()) then
            exit;

        if not FeatureManagementFacade.IsEnabled(ExtensibleInvoicePostingEngineLbl) then begin
            if not FeatureKey.Get(ExtensibleInvoicePostingEngineLbl) then
                exit;

            FeatureKey.Enabled := FeatureKey.Enabled::"All Users";
            FeatureKey.Modify();
            FeatureManagementFacade.AfterValidateEnabled(FeatureKey);
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateExtensibleInvoicePostingEngine());
    end;

    #region UpdateFixPriceLogic

    local procedure UpdateFixPriceLogic()
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFixPriceLogic()) then
            exit;

        UpdateSalesHeaderFixPrice();
        UpdateSalesInvoiceFixPrice();
        UpdateSalesCrMemoFixPrice();
        UpdateSalesArchiveFixPrice();

        UpdateServiceItemLineFixPrice();
        UpdateServiceItemLineInvoiceFixPrice();
        UpdateServiceItemLineCrMemoFixPrice();
        UpdateServiceArchiveFixPrice();

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateFixPriceLogic());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesHeaderFixPrice()
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        Identifier: Code[20];
    begin
        SalesHeader.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Entered", true);
        if SalesHeader.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        SalesHeader.FindSet();
        repeat
            if UpdateSalesLinesFixPrice(SalesHeader, Identifier) then
                CreateDocFixPrice(SalesHeader, Identifier);
        until SalesHeader.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesLinesFixPrice(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var Identifier: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        SalesLine.SetRange("TSR Alt. Position Line", false);
        if SalesLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(false);

        Identifier := SalesHeader."No.";
        SalesLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier", SalesLine."Document No.");
        SalesLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);

        exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateDocFixPrice(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; Identifier: Code[20])
    var
        DocFixPrice: Record "TSRD Doc. Fix Price";
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        DocFixPrice.Init();
        DocFixPrice."Document Type" := FixPriceMgt.GetFixPriceDocumentType(Salesheader."Document Type");
        DocFixPrice."Document No." := SalesHeader."No.";
        DocFixPrice."Fixed Price Identifier" := Identifier;
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Labor" := SalesHeader."TSRD Fix Price Labor";
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Parts" := SalesHeader."TSRD Fix Price Parts";
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Resources" := SalesHeader."TSRD Fix Price Resources";
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Fixed Asset" := SalesHeader."TSRD Fix Price Fixed Asset";
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" := SalesHeader."TSRD Fix Price Total";
        DocFixPrice.Difference := SalesHeader."TSRD Difference";
        DocFixPrice.Calculated := SalesHeader."TSRD Fix Price Calculated";
        DocFixPrice.Insert(true);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesInvoiceFixPrice()
    var
        SalesInvoiceHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header";
        Identifier: Code[20];
    begin
        SalesInvoiceHeader.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Entered", true);
        if SalesInvoiceHeader.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        SalesInvoiceHeader.FindSet();
        repeat
            if UpdateSalesLinesFixPrice(SalesInvoiceHeader, Identifier) then
                CreateDocFixPrice(SalesInvoiceHeader, Identifier);
        until SalesInvoiceHeader.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesLinesFixPrice(SalesInvoiceHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header"; var Identifier: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        SalesInvoiceLine: Record "Sales Invoice Line";
    begin
        SalesInvoiceLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesInvoiceHeader."No.");
        SalesInvoiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        SalesInvoiceLine.SetRange("TSR Alt. Position Line", false);
        if SalesInvoiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(false);

        Identifier := SalesInvoiceHeader."No.";
        SalesInvoiceLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier", Identifier);
        SalesInvoiceLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);

        exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateDocFixPrice(SalesInvoiceHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header"; Identifier: Code[20])
    var
        PostDocFixPrice: Record "TSRD Post. Doc. Fix Price";
    begin
        PostDocFixPrice.Init();
        PostDocFixPrice."Document Type" := PostDocFixPrice."Document Type"::Invoice;
        PostDocFixPrice."Document No." := SalesInvoiceHeader."No.";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fixed Price Identifier" := Identifier;
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Labor" := SalesInvoiceHeader."TSRD Fix Price Labor";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Parts" := SalesInvoiceHeader."TSRD Fix Price Parts";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Resources" := SalesInvoiceHeader."TSRD Fix Price Resources";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Fixed Asset" := SalesInvoiceHeader."TSRD Fix Price Fixed Asset";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" := SalesInvoiceHeader."TSRD Fix Price Total";
        PostDocFixPrice.Difference := SalesInvoiceHeader."TSRD Difference";
        PostDocFixPrice.Insert(true);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesCrMemoFixPrice()
    var
        SalesCrMemoHeader: Record "Sales Cr.Memo Header";
        Identifier: Code[20];
    begin
        SalesCrMemoHeader.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Entered", true);
        if SalesCrMemoHeader.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        SalesCrMemoHeader.FindSet();
        repeat
            if UpdateSalesLinesFixPrice(SalesCrMemoHeader, Identifier) then
                CreateDocFixPrice(SalesCrMemoHeader, Identifier);
        until SalesCrMemoHeader.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesLinesFixPrice(SalesCrMemoHeader: Record "Sales Cr.Memo Header"; var Identifier: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        SalesCrMemoLine: Record "Sales Cr.Memo Line";
    begin
        SalesCrMemoLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesCrMemoHeader."No.");
        SalesCrMemoLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        SalesCrMemoLine.SetRange("TSR Alt. Position Line", false);
        if SalesCrMemoLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(false);

        Identifier := SalesCrMemoHeader."No.";
        SalesCrMemoLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier", Identifier);
        SalesCrMemoLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);

        exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateDocFixPrice(SalesCrMemoHeader: Record "Sales Cr.Memo Header"; Identifier: Code[20])
    var
        PostDocFixPrice: Record "TSRD Post. Doc. Fix Price";
    begin
        PostDocFixPrice.Init();
        PostDocFixPrice."Document Type" := PostDocFixPrice."Document Type"::"Credit Memo";
        PostDocFixPrice."Document No." := SalesCrMemoHeader."No.";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fixed Price Identifier" := Identifier;
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Labor" := SalesCrMemoHeader."TSRD Fix Price Labor";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Parts" := SalesCrMemoHeader."TSRD Fix Price Parts";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Resources" := SalesCrMemoHeader."TSRD Fix Price Resources";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Fixed Asset" := SalesCrMemoHeader."TSRD Fix Price Fixed Asset";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" := SalesCrMemoHeader."TSRD Fix Price Total";
        PostDocFixPrice.Difference := SalesCrMemoHeader."TSRD Difference";
        PostDocFixPrice.Insert(true);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesArchiveFixPrice()
    var
        SalesHeaderArchive: Record "Sales Header Archive";
        Identifier: Code[20];
    begin
        SalesHeaderArchive.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Calculated", true);
        if SalesHeaderArchive.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        SalesHeaderArchive.FindSet();
        repeat
            if UpdateSalesLinesFixPrice(SalesHeaderArchive, Identifier) then
                CreateDocFixPrice(SalesHeaderArchive, Identifier);
        until SalesHeaderArchive.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesLinesFixPrice(SalesHeaderArchive: Record "Sales Header Archive"; var Identifier: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        SalesLineArchive: Record "Sales Line Archive";
    begin
        SalesLineArchive.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeaderArchive."Document Type");
        SalesLineArchive.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeaderArchive."No.");
        SalesLineArchive.SetRange("Doc. No. Occurrence", SalesHeaderArchive."Doc. No. Occurrence");
        SalesLineArchive.SetRange("Version No.", SalesHeaderArchive."Version No.");
        if SalesLineArchive.IsEmpty() then
            exit(false);

        Identifier := SalesHeaderArchive."No.";
        SalesLineArchive.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier", SalesLineArchive."Document No.");
        SalesLineArchive.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);

        exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateDocFixPrice(SalesHeaderArchive: Record "Sales Header Archive"; Identifier: Code[20])
    var
        PostDocFixPriceArch: Record "TSRD Doc. Fix Price Arch.";
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        PostDocFixPriceArch.Init();
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Document Type" := FixPriceMgt.GetFixPriceDocumentType(SalesHeaderArchive."Document Type");
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Document No." := SalesHeaderArchive."No.";
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Doc. No. Occurrence" := SalesHeaderArchive."Doc. No. Occurrence";
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Version No." := SalesHeaderArchive."Version No.";
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Fixed Price Identifier" := Identifier;
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Labor" := SalesHeaderArchive."TSRD Fix Price Labor";
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Parts" := SalesHeaderArchive."TSRD Fix Price Parts";
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Resources" := SalesHeaderArchive."TSRD Fix Price Resources";
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Fixed Asset" := SalesHeaderArchive."TSRD Fix Price Fixed Asset";
        PostDocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Total Amount" := SalesHeaderArchive."TSRD Fix Price Total";
        PostDocFixPriceArch.Difference := SalesHeaderArchive."TSRD Difference";
        PostDocFixPriceArch.Calculated := true;
        PostDocFixPriceArch.Insert(true);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceItemLineFixPrice()
    var
        ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line";
        Identifier: Code[20];
    begin
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Entered", true);
        if ServiceItemLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        ServiceItemLine.FindSet();
        repeat
            if UpdateServiceLinesFixPriceFixPrice(ServiceItemLine, Identifier) then
                CreateDocFixPrice(ServiceItemLine, Identifier);
        until ServiceItemLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceLinesFixPriceFixPrice(ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; var Identifier: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        ServiceLine: Record "Service Line";
    begin
        ServiceLine.SetRange("Document Type", ServiceItemLine."Document Type");
        ServiceLine.SetRange("Document No.", ServiceItemLine."Document No.");
        ServiceLine.SetRange("Service Item Line No.", ServiceItemLine."Line No.");
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        ServiceLine.SetRange("TSR Alt. Position Line", false);
        if ServiceLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(false);

        Identifier := ServiceItemLine."Service Item No.";
        ServiceLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier", ServiceLine."Service Item No.");
        ServiceLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);

        exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateDocFixPrice(ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line"; Identifier: Code[20])
    var
        DocFixPrice: Record "TSRD Doc. Fix Price";
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        DocFixPrice.Init();
        DocFixPrice."Document Type" := FixPriceMgt.GetFixPriceDocumentType(ServiceItemLine."Document Type");
        DocFixPrice."Document No." := ServiceItemLine."Document No.";
        DocFixPrice."Service Item Line No." := ServiceItemLine."Line No.";
        DocFixPrice."Fixed Price Identifier" := Identifier;
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Labor" := ServiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Labor";
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Parts" := ServiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Parts";
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Resources" := ServiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Resources";
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Costs" := ServiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Costs";
        DocFixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" := ServiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Total";
        DocFixPrice.Difference := ServiceItemLine."TSRD Difference";
        DocFixPrice.Calculated := ServiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Calculated";
        DocFixPrice.Insert(true);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceItemLineInvoiceFixPrice()
    var
        ServiceInvoiceItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Invoice Item Line";
        Identifier: Code[20];
    begin
        ServiceInvoiceItemLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Entered", true);
        if ServiceInvoiceItemLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        ServiceInvoiceItemLine.FindSet();
        repeat
            if UpdateServiceLinesFixPrice(ServiceInvoiceItemLine, Identifier) then
                CreateDocFixPrice(ServiceInvoiceItemLine, Identifier);
        until ServiceInvoiceItemLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceLinesFixPrice(ServiceInvoiceItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Invoice Item Line"; var Identifier: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Invoice Line";
    begin
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("Document No.", ServiceInvoiceItemLine."No.");
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("Service Item Line No.", ServiceInvoiceItemLine."Line No.");
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("TSR Alt. Position Line", false);
        if ServiceItemLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(false);

        Identifier := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."Service Item No.";
        ServiceItemLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier", ServiceItemLine."Service Item No.");
        ServiceItemLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);

        exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateDocFixPrice(ServiceInvoiceItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Invoice Item Line"; Identifier: Code[20])
    var
        PostDocFixPrice: Record "TSRD Post. Doc. Fix Price";
    begin
        PostDocFixPrice.Init();
        PostDocFixPrice."Document Type" := PostDocFixPrice."Document Type"::Invoice;
        PostDocFixPrice."Document No." := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."No.";
        PostDocFixPrice."Service Item Line No." := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."Line No.";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fixed Price Identifier" := Identifier;
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Labor" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Labor";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Parts" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Parts";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Resources" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Resources";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Costs" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Costs";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Total";
        PostDocFixPrice.Difference := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Difference";
        PostDocFixPrice.Insert(true);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceItemLineCrMemoFixPrice()
    var
        ServiceCrMemoItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Cr.Memo Item Line";
        Identifier: Code[20];
    begin
        ServiceCrMemoItemLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Entered", true);
        if ServiceCrMemoItemLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        ServiceCrMemoItemLine.FindSet();
        repeat
            if UpdateServiceLinesFixPrice(ServiceCrMemoItemLine, Identifier) then
                CreateDocFixPrice(ServiceCrMemoItemLine, Identifier);
        until ServiceCrMemoItemLine.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceLinesFixPrice(ServiceCrMemoItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Cr.Memo Item Line"; var Identifier: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Cr.Memo Line";
    begin
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("Document No.", ServiceCrMemoItemLine."No.");
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("TSRM Service Item Line No.", ServiceCrMemoItemLine."Line No.");
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("TSR Alt. Position Line", false);
        if ServiceItemLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(false);

        Identifier := ServiceCrMemoItemLine."Service Item No.";
        ServiceItemLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier", ServiceItemLine."Service Item No.");
        ServiceItemLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);

        exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateDocFixPrice(ServiceInvoiceItemLine: Record "TSRM Service Cr.Memo Item Line"; Identifier: Code[20])
    var
        PostDocFixPrice: Record "TSRD Post. Doc. Fix Price";
    begin
        PostDocFixPrice.Init();
        PostDocFixPrice."Document Type" := PostDocFixPrice."Document Type"::"Credit Memo";
        PostDocFixPrice."Document No." := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."No.";
        PostDocFixPrice."Service Item Line No." := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."Line No.";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fixed Price Identifier" := Identifier;
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Labor" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Labor";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Parts" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Parts";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Resources" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Resources";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Costs" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Costs";
        PostDocFixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Fix Price Total";
        PostDocFixPrice.Difference := ServiceInvoiceItemLine."TSRD Difference";
        PostDocFixPrice.Insert(true);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceArchiveFixPrice()
    var
        ServiceItemLineArchive: Record "TSRD Service Item Line Archive";
        Identifier: Code[20];
    begin
        ServiceItemLineArchive.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price Calculated", true);
        if ServiceItemLineArchive.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        ServiceItemLineArchive.FindSet();
        repeat
            if UpdateServiceLinesFixPrice(ServiceItemLineArchive, Identifier) then
                CreateDocFixPrice(ServiceItemLineArchive, Identifier);
        until ServiceItemLineArchive.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceLinesFixPrice(ServiceItemLineArchive: Record "TSRD Service Item Line Archive"; var Identifier: Code[20]): Boolean
    var
        ServiceItemLine: Record "TSRD Service Line Archive";
    begin
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("Document Type", ServiceItemLineArchive."Document Type");
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("Document No.", ServiceItemLineArchive."Document No.");
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("Service Item Line No.", ServiceItemLineArchive."Line No.");
        ServiceItemLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        if ServiceItemLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(false);

        Identifier := ServiceItemLineArchive."Service Item No.";
        ServiceItemLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier", ServiceItemLine."Service Item No.");
        ServiceItemLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Fix Price Identifier Set", true);

        exit(true);
    end;

    local procedure CreateDocFixPrice(ServiceItemLineArchive: Record "TSRD Service Item Line Archive"; Identifier: Code[20])
    var
        DocFixPriceArch: Record "TSRD Doc. Fix Price Arch.";
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
    begin
        DocFixPriceArch.Init();
        DocFixPriceArch."Document Type" := FixPriceMgt.GetFixPriceDocumentType(ServiceItemLineArchive."Document Type");
        DocFixPriceArch."Document No." := ServiceItemLineArchive."Document No.";
        DocFixPriceArch."Service Item Line No." := ServiceItemLineArchive."Line No.";
        DocFixPriceArch."Doc. No. Occurrence" := ServiceItemLineArchive."Doc. No. Occurrence";
        DocFixPriceArch."Version No." := ServiceItemLineArchive."Version No.";
        DocFixPriceArch."Fixed Price Identifier" := Identifier;
        DocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Labor" := ServiceItemLineArchive."TSRD Fix Price Labor";
        DocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Parts" := ServiceItemLineArchive."TSRD Fix Price Parts";
        DocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Resources" := ServiceItemLineArchive."TSRD Fix Price Resources";
        DocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Costs" := ServiceItemLineArchive."TSRD Fix Price Costs";
        DocFixPriceArch."Fix Price Total Amount" := ServiceItemLineArchive."TSRD Fix Price Total";
        DocFixPriceArch.Difference := ServiceItemLineArchive."TSRD Difference";
        DocFixPriceArch.Calculated := true;
        DocFixPriceArch.Insert(true);
    end;

    #endregion UpdateFixPriceLogic

    #region Automatic Receipt Creation

    local procedure UpdateVendorWarehouseAutomation()
    var
        Vendor: Record Vendor;
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateVendorWarehouseAutomation()) then
            exit;
        Vendor.ModifyAll("TSRD Warehouse Automation", true);
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateVendorWarehouseAutomation());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Service Invoice/Cr Memo Customer Ledger Entry No.

    local procedure UpdateServiceDocCustLedgerEntryNo()
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateServiceDocCustLedgerEntryNo()) then
            exit;
        UpdateServiceInvoiceCustLedgerEntryNo();
        UpdateServiceCrMemoCustLedgerEntryNo();
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateServiceDocCustLedgerEntryNo());
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceInvoiceCustLedgerEntryNo()
    var
        CustLedgerEntry: Record "Cust. Ledger Entry";
        ServiceInvoiceHeader: Record "Service Invoice Header";
    begin
        ServiceInvoiceHeader.SetRange("TSRD Cust. Ledger Entry No.", 0);
        if ServiceInvoiceHeader.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        ServiceInvoiceHeader.FindSet();
        repeat
            if FindCustLedgEntry(ServiceInvoiceHeader."Posting Date", ServiceInvoiceHeader."No.", CustLedgerEntry) then begin
                ServiceInvoiceHeader."TSRD Cust. Ledger Entry No." := CustLedgerEntry."Entry No.";
                ServiceInvoiceHeader.Modify();
            end;
        until ServiceInvoiceHeader.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateServiceCrMemoCustLedgerEntryNo()
    var
        CustLedgerEntry: Record "Cust. Ledger Entry";
        ServiceCrMemoHeader: Record "Service Cr.Memo Header";
    begin
        ServiceCrMemoHeader.SetRange("TSRD Cust. Ledger Entry No.", 0);
        if ServiceCrMemoHeader.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        ServiceCrMemoHeader.FindSet();
        repeat
            if FindCustLedgEntry(ServiceCrMemoHeader."Posting Date", ServiceCrMemoHeader."No.", CustLedgerEntry) then begin
                ServiceCrMemoHeader."TSRD Cust. Ledger Entry No." := CustLedgerEntry."Entry No.";
                ServiceCrMemoHeader.Modify();
            end;
        until ServiceCrMemoHeader.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure FindCustLedgEntry(
        PostingDate: Date;
        DocNo: Code[20];
        var CustLedgerEntry: Record "Cust. Ledger Entry"
        ): Boolean
    begin
        CustLedgerEntry.SetRange("Posting Date", PostingDate);
        CustLedgerEntry.SetRange("Document No.", DocNo);
        exit(CustLedgerEntry.FindLast());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Initialize Devaluation Setup
    internal procedure UpdateDevaluationSetup()
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateDevaluationSetup()) then
            exit;
        InsertDevalEntryTypeSetup("Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale, true);
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::" ",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Sales Credit Memo",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Sales Invoice",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Sales Return Receipt",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Sales Shipment",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"TSRD Trade In Receipt",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Service Shipment",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Service Invoice",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Sale,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Service Credit Memo",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalEntryTypeSetup("Item Ledger Entry Type"::Purchase, true);
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Purchase,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::" ",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Purchase,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Purchase Credit Memo",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Purchase,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Purchase Invoice",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Purchase,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Purchase Return Shipment",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Purchase,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Purchase Receipt",
            true
        );
        InsertDevalEntryTypeSetup("Item Ledger Entry Type"::"Positive Adjmt.", false);
        InsertDevalEntryTypeSetup("Item Ledger Entry Type"::"Negative Adjmt.", false);
        InsertDevalEntryTypeSetup("Item Ledger Entry Type"::Consumption, false);
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Consumption,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Inventory Receipt",
            false
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Consumption,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Inventory Shipment",
            false
        );
        InsertDevalEntryTypeSetup("Item Ledger Entry Type"::Output, false);
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Output,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Inventory Receipt",
            false
        );
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::Output,
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Inventory Shipment",
            false
        );
        InsertDevalEntryTypeSetup("Item Ledger Entry Type"::"Assembly Consumption", false);
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::"Assembly Consumption",
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Posted Assembly",
            false
        );
        InsertDevalEntryTypeSetup("Item Ledger Entry Type"::"Assembly Output", false);
        InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
            "Item Ledger Entry Type"::"Assembly Output",
            "Item Ledger Document Type"::"Posted Assembly",
            false
        );
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetUpdateDevaluationSetup());
    end;

    local procedure InsertDevalEntryTypeSetup(ItemLedgerEntryType: Enum "Item Ledger Entry Type"; Active: Boolean)
    var
        DevalEntryTypeSetup: Record "TSRD Deval Entry Type Setup";
    begin
        if DevalEntryTypeSetup.Get(ItemLedgerEntryType) then
            exit;
        DevalEntryTypeSetup.Init();
        DevalEntryTypeSetup."Entry Type" := ItemLedgerEntryType;
        DevalEntryTypeSetup.Active := Active;
        DevalEntryTypeSetup.Insert();
    end;

    local procedure InsertDevalDocumentTypeSetup(
        ItemLedgerEntryType: Enum "Item Ledger Entry Type";
        ItemLedgerDocumentType: Enum "Item Ledger Document Type";
        Active: Boolean
    )
    var
        DevalDocumentTypeSetup: Record "TSRD Deval Document Type Setup";
    begin
        if DevalDocumentTypeSetup.Get(ItemLedgerEntryType, ItemLedgerDocumentType) then
            exit;
        DevalDocumentTypeSetup.Init();
        DevalDocumentTypeSetup."Entry Type" := ItemLedgerEntryType;
        DevalDocumentTypeSetup."Document Type" := ItemLedgerDocumentType;
        DevalDocumentTypeSetup.Active := Active;
        DevalDocumentTypeSetup.Insert();
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Sales Header Block Status

    local procedure UpdateSalesHeaderBlockStatus()
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetSalesHeaderBlockStatus()) then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.SetFilter("TSRD Block Status", '<>%1', Enum::"TSRD Block Status"::" ");
        if SalesHeader.IsEmpty() then begin
            UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetSalesHeaderBlockStatus());
            exit;
        end;
        SalesHeader.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            case SalesHeader."TSRD Block Status" of
                Enum::"TSRD Block Status"::Shipment:
                    SalesHeader."TSR Block Status" := Enum::"TSR Block Status"::Shipment;
                Enum::"TSRD Block Status"::Invoice:
                    SalesHeader."TSR Block Status" := Enum::"TSR Block Status"::Invoice;
                Enum::"TSRD Block Status"::"Shipment & Invoice":
                    SalesHeader."TSR Block Status" := Enum::"TSR Block Status"::"Shipment & Invoice";
            end;
            SalesHeader.Modify();
        until SalesHeader.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.GetSalesHeaderBlockStatus());
    end;
    #endregion

    #region Fix Corrupted Price Factor Records
    local procedure FixCorruptedPriceFactorRecords()
    var
        ItemJournalLine: Record "Item Journal Line";
        PurchRcptLine: Record "Purch. Rcpt. Line";
        RequisitionLine: Record "Requisition Line";
        SalesShipmentLine: Record "Sales Shipment Line";
        ServiceShipmentLine: Record "Service Shipment Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.FixCorruptedPriceFactorRecords()) then
            exit;

        RequisitionLine.SetRange("TSRD Price Factor", 0);
        if not RequisitionLine.IsEmpty() then
            RequisitionLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Price Factor", 1);

        ItemJournalLine.SetRange("TSRD Price Factor", 0);
        if not ItemJournalLine.IsEmpty() then
            ItemJournalLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Price Factor", 1);

        PurchRcptLine.SetRange("TSRD Price Factor", 0);
        if not PurchRcptLine.IsEmpty() then
            PurchRcptLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Price Factor", 1);

        SalesShipmentLine.SetRange("TSRD Price Factor", 0);
        if not SalesShipmentLine.IsEmpty() then
            SalesShipmentLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Price Factor", 1);

        ServiceShipmentLine.SetRange("TSRD Price Factor", 0);
        if not ServiceShipmentLine.IsEmpty() then
            ServiceShipmentLine.ModifyAll("TSRD Price Factor", 1);

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.FixCorruptedPriceFactorRecords());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region RemoveAttachedToLineNoFromCommentLines

    local procedure RemoveAttachedToLineNoFromCommentLines()
    var
        Equipment: Record "TSRM Equipment";
        ParentEquipment: Record "TSRM Equipment";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.RemoveAttachedToLineNoFromCommentLines()) then
            exit;

        Equipment.SetRange(Type, Equipment.Type::Comment);
        Equipment.SetFilter("Attached to Line No.", '<>%1', 0);
        if Equipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        Equipment.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            if ParentEquipment.Get(Equipment."Service Item No.", Equipment."Attached to Line No.") then
                if ParentEquipment.Type = ParentEquipment.Type::Comment then begin
                    Equipment."Attached to Line No." := 0;
                    Equipment.Modify();
                end;
        until Equipment.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.RemoveAttachedToLineNoFromCommentLines());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region MoveQuoteStatusToMachine

    local procedure MoveQuoteStatusToMachine()
    var
        QuoteStatusDMS: Record "TSRD Quote Status";
        QuoteStatusMachine: Record "TSRM Quote Status";
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesHeaderArchive: Record "Sales Header Archive";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.MoveQuoteStatusToMachine()) then
            exit;

        if not QuoteStatusDMS.IsEmpty() then begin
            QuoteStatusDMS.FindSet();
            repeat
                if not QuoteStatusMachine.Get(QuoteStatusDMS.Code) then begin
                    QuoteStatusMachine.Init();
                    QuoteStatusMachine.Code := QuoteStatusDMS.Code;
                    QuoteStatusMachine.Description := QuoteStatusDMS.Description;
                    case true of
                        QuoteStatusDMS.Initial:
                            QuoteStatusMachine.Status := Enum::"TSRM Quote Status"::Initial;
                        QuoteStatusDMS.Won:
                            QuoteStatusMachine.Status := Enum::"TSRM Quote Status"::Won;
                        QuoteStatusDMS.Lost:
                            QuoteStatusMachine.Status := Enum::"TSRM Quote Status"::Lost;
                    end;
                    QuoteStatusMachine.Insert();
                end;
            until QuoteStatusDMS.Next() = 0;
        end;

        if QuoteStatusMachine.FindSet() then
            repeat
                SalesHeader.SetRange("TSRD Quote Status", QuoteStatusMachine.Code);
                SalesHeader.ModifyAll("TSRM Quote Status", QuoteStatusMachine.Code);
                SalesHeaderArchive.SetRange("TSRD Quote Status", QuoteStatusMachine.Code);
                SalesHeaderArchive.ModifyAll("TSRM Quote Status", QuoteStatusMachine.Code);
            until QuoteStatusMachine.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.MoveQuoteStatusToMachine());
    end;

    #endregion MoveQuoteStatusToMachine
    #region UpdateEmptyWarrantyClaimNo

    local procedure UpdateEmptyWarrantyClaimNo()
    var
        NewWarrantyClaim, WarrantyClaim, WarrantyClaim2 : Record "TSRD Warranty Claim Header";
        NewWarrantyClaimLine, WarrantyClaimLine : Record "TSRD Warranty Claim Line";
        WarrantySetup: Record "TSRD Warranty Setup";
        MediaStorage: Record "TSRST Media Storage";
        NoSeries: Codeunit "No. Series";
        NewClaimNo: Code[20];
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateEmptyWarrantyClaimNo()) then
            exit;

        if WarrantyClaim.Get('') then begin
            WarrantySetup.Get();
            NewClaimNo := NoSeries.GetNextNo(WarrantySetup."Warranty Claim Nos.");
            WarrantyClaim2.ReadIsolation(IsolationLevel::ReadUncommitted);
            WarrantyClaim2.SetLoadFields("No.");
            while WarrantyClaim2.Get(NewClaimNo) do
                NewClaimNo := NoSeries.GetNextNo(WarrantySetup."Warranty Claim Nos.");

            NewWarrantyClaim.Init();
            NewWarrantyClaim.TransferFields(WarrantyClaim);
            NewWarrantyClaim."No." := NewClaimNo;
            NewWarrantyClaim.Insert(true);

            WarrantyClaimLine.SetRange("Claim No.", WarrantyClaim."No.");
            if WarrantyClaimLine.FindSet() then
                repeat
                    NewWarrantyClaimLine.Init();
                    NewWarrantyClaimLine.TransferFields(WarrantyClaimLine);
                    NewWarrantyClaimLine.Validate("Claim No.", NewClaimNo);
                    NewWarrantyClaimLine.Insert(true);
                until WarrantyClaimLine.Next() = 0;

            MediaStorage.SetRange(SystemId, WarrantyClaim.SystemId);
            MediaStorage.SetRange("Source Type", MediaStorage."Source Type"::"TSRD Warranty Claim");
            if not MediaStorage.IsEmpty() then
                MediaStorage.ModifyAll(SystemId, NewWarrantyClaim.SystemId);

            WarrantyClaim.Delete();
            WarrantyClaimLine.SetRange("Claim No.", WarrantyClaim."No.");
            if not WarrantyClaimLine.IsEmpty() then
                WarrantyClaimLine.DeleteAll();
        end;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateEmptyWarrantyClaimNo());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Update Nonstock Item Vendor Item No. Unf.

    local procedure UpdateNonstockItemVendorItemNoUnf()
    var
        NonstockItem: Record "Nonstock Item";
        InventoryMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inventory Mgt.";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateNonstockItemVendorItemNoUnf()) then
            exit;
        NonstockItem.SetRange("TSRD Vendor Item No. (Unf.)", '');
        if NonstockItem.FindSet() then
            repeat
                NonstockItem."TSRD Vendor Item No. (Unf.)" :=
                    CopyStr(
                        InventoryMgt.GetUnformattedText(NonstockItem."Vendor Item No."),
                        1,
                        MaxStrLen(NonstockItem."TSRD Vendor Item No. (Unf.)")
                    );
                NonstockItem.Modify();
            until NonstockItem.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateNonstockItemVendorItemNoUnf());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Upgrade Maint Invoice Plan

    internal procedure UpgradeMaintInvoicePlan()
    var
        SalesInvoiceHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header";
        SalesInvoiceLine: Record "Sales Invoice Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeMaintInvoicePlan()) then
            exit;

        SalesInvoiceHeader.SetFilter("TSRD Maint. Contract No.", '<>%1', '');
        SalesInvoiceHeader.SetRange("TSRM Machine Comm. Doc. Source", '');
        if SalesInvoiceHeader.FindSet() then
            repeat
                SalesInvoiceLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesInvoiceHeader."No.");
                SalesInvoiceLine.SetFilter("TSRD Maint. Contract No.", '<>%1', '');
                SalesInvoiceLine.SetFilter("TSRD Maint. Inv. Plan Line No.", '<>%1', 0);
                if SalesInvoiceLine.FindSet() then
                    repeat
                        FindMainContrInvoicePlan(SalesInvoiceHeader."Pre-Assigned No.", SalesInvoiceLine);
                    until SalesInvoiceLine.Next() = 0;
            until SalesInvoiceHeader.Next() = 0;

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpgradeMaintInvoicePlan());
    end;

    local procedure FindMainContrInvoicePlan(UnpostedDocNo: Code[20]; SalesInvoiceLine: Record "Sales Invoice Line")
    var
        MaintContrInvoicePlan: Record "TSRD Maint. Contr.Invoice Plan";
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
    begin
        MaintContrInvoicePlan.SetRange("Maintenance Contract No.", SalesInvoiceLine."TSRD Maint. Contract No.");
        MaintContrInvoicePlan.SetRange("Document No.", UnpostedDocNo);
        MaintContrInvoicePlan.SetRange(Status, MaintContrInvoicePlan.Status::"In Invoice");
        MaintContrInvoicePlan.SetRange("Document Type", MaintContrInvoicePlan."Document Type"::Invoice);
        MaintContrInvoicePlan.SetFilter("Document No.", '<>%1', '');
        MaintContrInvoicePlan.SetRange("Posted Document No.", '');
        if not MaintContrInvoicePlan.FindFirst() then
            exit;
        if SalesHeader.Get(MaintContrInvoicePlan."Document Type", MaintContrInvoicePlan."Document No.") then
            exit;
        MaintContrInvoicePlan."Posted Document No." := SalesInvoiceLine."Document No.";
        MaintContrInvoicePlan."Posted Document Line No." := SalesInvoiceLine."Line No.";
        MaintContrInvoicePlan.Status := MaintContrInvoicePlan.Status::Invoiced;
        MaintContrInvoicePlan.Modify();
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Upgrade Order Description 

    local procedure UpdateOrderDescriptionServItemLine()
    var
        ServiceItemLine: Record "Service Item Line";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateOrderDescriptionServItemLine()) then
            exit;
        ServiceItemLine.SetFilter(ServiceItemLine."TSRD Order Description", '<>%1', '');
        ServiceItemLine.SetAutoCalcFields("TSRD Order Description");
        if ServiceItemLine.FindSet(true) then
            repeat
                ServiceItemLine."TSRD Order Desc." := ServiceItemLine."TSRD Order Description";
                ServiceItemLine.Modify();
            until ServiceItemLine.Next() = 0;
        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.UpdateOrderDescriptionServItemLine());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region Delete Unassigned Standard Equipment Lines

    local procedure DeleteUnassignedStandardEquipmentLines()
    var
        ManConfStdEquip: Record "TSRD Man. Conf. Std Equip";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.DeleteUnassignedStandardEquipmentLines()) then
            exit;

        ManConfStdEquip.SetRange("Manufacturer Config Entry No.", 0);
        if not ManConfStdEquip.IsEmpty() then
            ManConfStdEquip.DeleteAll();

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.DeleteUnassignedStandardEquipmentLines());
    end;

    #endregion

    #region EmptyFillRatesEntryTable

    local procedure EmptyFillRatesEntryTable()
    var
        FillRatesEntry: Record "TSRD Fill Rates Entry";
    begin
        if UpgradeTag.HasUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.EmptyFillRatesEntryTable()) then
            exit;

        if not FillRatesEntry.IsEmpty() then
            FillRatesEntry.DeleteAll();

        UpgradeTag.SetUpgradeTag(UpgradeTagDefinitions.EmptyFillRatesEntryTable());
    end;

    #endregion

}
